      %font_main_big_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_big_array[$i]

    if($NUM_USER_PRESETS > 0)
      $i := 0

        if(%user_deleted_presets[$i] = 1)
          !user_preset_titles[$ii] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
          %user_preset_tags[$ii] := %user_preset_tags[$i]
          %user_preset_numbers[$ii] := %user_preset_numbers[$i]
          inc($ii)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      $NUM_USER_PRESETS := $ii
      $i := 0
      while($i <= ($NUM_USER_PRESETS - 1)) 
        !preset_title_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
        !final_preset_title_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
        !file_name_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
        %preset_tags[%user_preset_numbers[$i]] := %user_preset_tags[$i]
        %preset_numbers_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := %user_preset_numbers[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%user_deleted_presets) - 1)) 
      if($i < $NUM_USER_PRESETS)
        %user_deleted_presets[$i] := 1
      else
        %user_deleted_presets[$i] := 0
        !user_preset_titles[$i] := 0
        %user_preset_tags[$i] := 0
        %user_preset_numbers[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__load), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__location_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $preset_buttons_show_state)

    end if
    if($see_page = 6)
      if($mixer__comp_bypass = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)

      else

      end if

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
      else

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])

    if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 47))

      else

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[2])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[3])
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%sat_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)

      else

function update_arp_label_pos
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%array_A0) - 1)) 
    %array_A0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $label_pos_y_A0 := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%array_B0) - 1)) 
    %array_B0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $label_pos_y_B0 := 0
  $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := 0
  $rhythm_table_height0 := 0
  $rhythm_edit0 := 0
  $i4 := 0
  $SIZE0 := 0
  select($see_main_subpage)
    case 8
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 31) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %arp1__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $arp1__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 32
    case 9
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 31) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $arp2__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 32
    case 10
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 31) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $arp3__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 32
    case 11
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 31) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %arp4__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $arp4__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 32
    case 13
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 99) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $env1__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 100
    case 14
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 99) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $env2__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 100
    case 15
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 99) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $env3__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 100
    case 16
      $i4 := 0
      while($i4 <= 99) 
        %array_A0[$i4] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i4]
        %array_B0[$i4] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i4]
        inc($i4)
      end while
      $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3
      $rhythm_table_height0 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6
      $rhythm_edit0 := $env4__edit_active
      $SIZE0 := 100
  end select
  $i4 := 0
  while($i4 <= ($SIZE0 - 1)) 
    $label_pos_y_A0 := $rhythm_table_pos_y0 + real_to_int((int_to_real($rhythm_table_height0) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %array_A0[$i4]))
    $label_pos_y_B0 := $rhythm_table_pos_y0 + real_to_int((int_to_real($rhythm_table_height0) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %array_B0[$i4]))
    if((%array_A0[$i4] - %array_B0[$i4]) < 0)
      if($rhythm_edit0 = 0)
        set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
      else
        if($rhythm_edit0 = 1)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
        end if
      end if
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B0)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A0 - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
    else
      if($rhythm_edit0 = 0)
        set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
      else
        if($rhythm_edit0 = 1)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
        end if
      end if
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A0)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B0 - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i4], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
    end if
    inc($i4)
  end while
end function
function update_mod_graphics
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%playback_array0) - 1)) 
    %playback_array0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  $rhythm_edit1 := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%array_A1) - 1)) 
    %array_A1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%array_B1) - 1)) 
    %array_B1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $i5 := 0
  $n1 := 0
  $SIZE1 := 0
  select($see_main_subpage)
    case 8
      $SIZE1 := 32
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %arp1__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $arp1__edit_active
    case 9
      $SIZE1 := 32
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $arp2__edit_active
    case 10
      $SIZE1 := 32
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $arp3__edit_active
    case 11
      $SIZE1 := 32
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %arp4__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $arp4__edit_active
    case 13
      $SIZE1 := 100
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $env1__edit_active
    case 14
      $SIZE1 := 100
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $env2__edit_active
    case 15
      $SIZE1 := 100
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $env3__edit_active
    case 16
      $SIZE1 := 100
      $i5 := 0
      while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
        %array_A1[$i5] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i5]
        %array_B1[$i5] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i5]
        inc($i5)
      end while
      $rhythm_edit1 := $env4__edit_active
  end select
  $i5 := 0
  while($i5 <= ($SIZE1 - 1)) 
    if((%array_A1[$i5] - %array_B1[$i5]) <= 0)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
    else
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
    end if
    inc($i5)
  end while
end function
function _update_shown_table
  select($see_main_subpage)
    case 8
      if($arp1__rate > 4)
        $arp1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp1__time_signature]
      else
        $arp1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp1__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp1__steps := $arp1__rhythm_steps
      if($arp1__steps <= $arp1__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm, $arp1__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm_indicator, $arp1__h)
        $arp1__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp1__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp1__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp1__steps))
        ~arp1__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp1__h)) / int_to_real($arp1__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm, $arp1__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm_indicator, $arp1__steps)
        $arp1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp1__steps
        ~arp1__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp1__steps)) / int_to_real($arp1__steps)
      end if
      $arp1__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp1__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp1__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp1__steps) or (($arp1__steps < $arp1__h) and ($i < $arp1__h)))
          if($arp1__label_width_indicator > $arp1__z)
            $arp1__z := $arp1__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp1__steps < $arp1__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    case 9
      if($arp2__rate > 4)
        $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp2__time_signature]
      else
        $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp2__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp2__steps := $arp2__rhythm_steps
      if($arp2__steps <= $arp2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__h)
        $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps))
        ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__h)) / int_to_real($arp2__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__steps)
        $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp2__steps
        ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__steps)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps)
      end if
      $arp2__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp2__steps) or (($arp2__steps < $arp2__h) and ($i < $arp2__h)))
          if($arp2__label_width_indicator > $arp2__z)
            $arp2__z := $arp2__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp2__steps < $arp2__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    case 10
      if($arp3__rate > 4)
        $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp3__time_signature]
      else
        $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp3__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp3__steps := $arp3__rhythm_steps
      if($arp3__steps <= $arp3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__h)
        $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp3__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp3__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps))
        ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__h)) / int_to_real($arp3__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__steps)
        $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp3__steps
        ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__steps)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps)
      end if
      $arp3__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp3__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp3__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp3__steps) or (($arp3__steps < $arp3__h) and ($i < $arp3__h)))
          if($arp3__label_width_indicator > $arp3__z)
            $arp3__z := $arp3__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp3__steps < $arp3__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp3__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp3__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    case 11
      if($arp4__rate > 4)
        $arp4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp4__time_signature]
      else
        $arp4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp4__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp4__steps := $arp4__rhythm_steps
      if($arp4__steps <= $arp4__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp4__rhythm, $arp4__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp4__rhythm_indicator, $arp4__h)
        $arp4__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp4__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp4__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp4__steps))
        ~arp4__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp4__h)) / int_to_real($arp4__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp4__rhythm, $arp4__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp4__rhythm_indicator, $arp4__steps)
        $arp4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp4__steps
        ~arp4__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp4__steps)) / int_to_real($arp4__steps)
      end if
      $arp4__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp4__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp4__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp4__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp4__steps) or (($arp4__steps < $arp4__h) and ($i < $arp4__h)))
          if($arp4__label_width_indicator > $arp4__z)
            $arp4__z := $arp4__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp4__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp4__steps < $arp4__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
  end select
end function
function _update_shown_envelope
  if($see_main_subpage = 13)
    if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
      $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
      ~env1__label_width_dynamic := 3.
      $env1__steps := 100
      set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, 100)
      set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, 100)
      if($env1__edit_active = 0)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
    else
      if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $env1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env1__time_signature]
        else
          $env1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env1__time_signature]
        end if
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env1__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        $env1__steps := $env1__rhythm_steps
        if($env1__steps <= $env1__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, $env1__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, $env1__h)
          $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env1__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env1__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env1__steps))
          ~env1__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env1__h)) / int_to_real($env1__h)
        else
          set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, $env1__steps)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, $env1__steps)
          $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env1__steps
          ~env1__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env1__steps)) / int_to_real($env1__steps)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $env1__z := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      $env1__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env1__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env1__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      if(($i < $env1__steps) or ((($env1__steps < $env1__h) and ($i < $env1__h)) and ($env1__mode_menu = 1)))
        if($env1__steps > 32)
          if($env1__label_width_indicator > $env1__z)
            $env1__z := $env1__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          end if
        else
          if($env1__label_width_indicator > $env1__z)
            $env1__z := $env1__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env1__steps < $env1__h)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    end if
    ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
    if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  else
    if($see_main_subpage = 14)
      if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
        $env2__steps := 100
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99)

                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
                else
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
                end if
                if($i = 0)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
                else
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
                end if
              else
                if($env1__label_width_indicator > $env1__z)
                  $env1__z := $env1__label_width_indicator
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
                else
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
                end if
                if($i = 0)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
                else
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
            inc($i)
          end while
          if($env1__steps < $env1__h)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
          end if
          ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.

            call update_arp_label_pos
            call update_mod_graphics
          end if
          if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
            $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
            ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
            $env2__steps := 100
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
            if($env2__edit_active = 0)
              $i := 0
              while($i <= 99) 
                %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
                inc($i)
              end while
            else
              $i := 0
              while($i <= 99) 
                %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
                inc($i)
              end while
            end if
          else
            if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
              if($env2__rate > 4)
                $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env2__time_signature]
              else
                $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env2__time_signature]
              end if
              $i := 0
              while($i <= 99) 
                %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
                inc($i)
              end while
              $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
              if($env2__steps <= $env2__h)
                set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__h)
                set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__h)
                $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env2__steps))
                ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__h)) / int_to_real($env2__h)
              else
                set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__steps)
                set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__steps)
                $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env2__steps
                ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__steps)) / int_to_real($env2__steps)
              end if
            end if
          end if

                if($i = 0)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
                else
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
                  set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
            inc($i)
          end while
          if($env4__steps < $env4__h)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          else
            set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
          end if
          ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
          if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
            call update_arp_label_pos
            call update_mod_graphics
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function motion_fx
  $n2 := 0
  $mod_idx0 := 0
  $target_idx0 := 0
  $rr0 := 0
  $a10 := 0
  while($a10 <= 3) 
    $n2 := 0
    while($n2 <= 4) 
      if((%_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 1] = 0) and (%_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 2] = 0))
        %_fx_motion_values[($n2 * 4) + $a10] := get_control_par(%_fx_control_values[($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      else
        if(%_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 3] = 0)
          %_fx_motion_values[($n2 * 4) + $a10] := %_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 1] + real_to_int((int_to_real(%_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 2] - %_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 1]) / 128.) * int_to_real(%CC[$motion_cc]))
        else
          %_fx_motion_values[($n2 * 4) + $a10] := %_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 2] - real_to_int((int_to_real(%_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 2] - %_fx_control_values[(($n2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4) + 1]) / 128.) * int_to_real(%CC[$motion_cc]))
        end if
      end if
      inc($n2)
    end while
    inc($a10)
  end while
  $a10 := 0
  while($a10 <= 3) 
    $rr0 := %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$a10]]
    if($rr0 # 0)
      $n2 := 0
      while($n2 <= ($rr0 - 1)) 
        $mod_idx0 := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] + $n2, "ENV_AHDSR")
        $target_idx0 := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] + $n2, $mod_idx0, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, %_fx_motion_values[$a10], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] + $n2, $mod_idx0, $target_idx0)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, %_fx_motion_values[4 + $a10], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] + $n2, $mod_idx0, $target_idx0)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, %_fx_motion_values[4 + $a10], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] + $n2, $mod_idx0, $target_idx0)
        inc($n2)
      end while
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 0)
      set_engine_par(%_sat_type_links[get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7], %_fx_motion_values[8 + $a10], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10)
    else
      set_engine_par(%_sat_type_links[get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7], (%_fx_motion_values[8 + $a10] - 500000) * 2, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10)
    end if
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, %_fx_motion_values[12 + $a10], -1, 2, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, %_fx_motion_values[16 + $a10], -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10)
    inc($a10)
  end while
  $a10 := 0
  while($a10 <= 3) 
    if(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]] # -1)
      $mod_idx0 := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]], "ENV_AHDSR")
      $target_idx0 := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]], $mod_idx0, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
      set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(5 * $a10) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]], $mod_idx0, $target_idx0))
      set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(1 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$a10]], $mod_idx0, $target_idx0))
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 0)
      set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par(%_sat_type_links[get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10))
    else
      set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(2 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par(%_sat_type_links[get_control_par(%sat_menu[$a10], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10) / 2) + 500000)
    end if
    set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(3 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, -1, 2, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10))
    set_control_par(%_fx_control_values[(4 + (5 * $a10)) * 4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $a10))
    inc($a10)
  end while
end function
function update_fx_motion_values
  $i7 := 0
  while($i7 <= 3) 
    %_fx_control_values[((5 * $i7) * 4) + 1] := get_control_par(%attack_min[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%attack_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((1 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 1] := get_control_par(%decay_min[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%decay_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((2 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 1] := get_control_par(%sat_gain_min[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%sat_gain_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((3 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 1] := get_control_par(%filter_cut_min[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%filter_cut_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((4 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 1] := get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_min[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((5 * $i7) * 4) + 2] := get_control_par(%attack_max[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%attack_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((1 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 2] := get_control_par(%decay_max[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%decay_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((2 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 2] := get_control_par(%sat_gain_max[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%sat_gain_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((3 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 2] := get_control_par(%filter_cut_max[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%filter_cut_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((4 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 2] := get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_max[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_motion[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((5 * $i7) * 4) + 3] := get_control_par(%attack_motion_invert[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((1 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 3] := get_control_par(%decay_motion_invert[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((2 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 3] := get_control_par(%sat_gain_motion_invert[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((3 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 3] := get_control_par(%filter_cut_motion_invert[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %_fx_control_values[((4 + (5 * $i7)) * 4) + 3] := get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_motion_invert[$i7], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    inc($i7)
  end while
  call motion_fx
end function
function handle_control_change
  $s := search(%core__control_ids, $ctrl_id)
  %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %last_cb0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %time_remaining0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %time_remaining0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1000000
  %visible_allow0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter1 := 0
  while($_iter1 <= 9) 
    %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + $_iter1] := 0
    inc($_iter1)
  end while
  if(((get_control_par($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) or (get_control_par($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_BG)) or (get_control_par($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_VALUE))
    %visible_allow0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  end if
  if($visible_deny = 1)
    %visible_allow0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  end if
  if($s # -1)
    if(%core__motion[$s] = 1)
      set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
      %visible_allow0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      call update_fx_motion_values
    else
      if(((search(%attack, $ctrl_id) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%attack, $ctrl_id)] > 0)) or ((search(%decay, $ctrl_id) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%decay, $ctrl_id)] > 0)))
        if(search(%attack, $ctrl_id) # -1)
          %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%attack, $ctrl_id)
        else
          %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%decay, $ctrl_id)
        end if
        %rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]
        %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - 1)) 
          %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR")
          %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
          set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $ctrl, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          if(search(%decay, $ctrl_id) # -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, $ctrl, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end if
          inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) & @ctrl_unit)
      else
        if((search(%btn_sustain, $ctrl_id) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%btn_sustain, $ctrl_id)] > 0))
          %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_sustain, $ctrl_id)
          %rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]
          %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - 1)) 
            %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR")
            %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
            set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], 1000000 * $ctrl, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
        else
          if((search(%sld_sample_start_rand, $ctrl_id) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%sld_sample_start_rand, $ctrl_id)] > 0))
            %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sld_sample_start_rand, $ctrl_id)
            %rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]
            %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - 1)) 
              %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "src_mod_samplestart")
              %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := -1
              set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $ctrl, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1)
              inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, (get_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) / 10000) & @ctrl_unit)
          else
            if(search(%mixer__pan, $ctrl_id) # -1)
              %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mixer__pan, $ctrl_id)
              if(($pan1__step_active_button .or. $pan2__step_active_button) = 1)
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10] := $pan1__slot1_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 1] := $pan1__slot2_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 2] := $pan1__slot3_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 3] := $pan1__slot4_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 4] := $pan2__slot1_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 5] := $pan2__slot2_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 6] := $pan2__slot3_active_button
                %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + 7] := $pan2__slot4_active_button
                if((($pan1__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = 0) and (($pan2__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + (%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 4)]) = 0))
                  %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                  while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], get_control_par(%mixer__pan[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                    inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  end while
                  set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], -1, -1))
                else
                  %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                  while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], 500000, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                    inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  end while
                  set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Engine")
                end if
              else
                %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], get_control_par(%mixer__pan[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                  inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
                set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], -1, -1))
              end if
            else
              if(search(%pre_lowcut, $ctrl_id) # -1)
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, 1 - $ctrl, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s])
                set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], 170000, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s])
              else
                if(search(%sat_gain, $ctrl_id) # -1)
                  %sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sat_gain, $ctrl_id)
                  message("sat menu" & %sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & " value is " & get_control_par(%sat_menu[%sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
                  if(get_control_par(%sat_menu[%sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 0)
                    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $ctrl, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  else
                    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], ($ctrl - 500000) * 2, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %sat_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  end if
                else
                  if(search(%filter_type_menu, $ctrl_id) # -1)
                    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_NONE, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                    select($ctrl)
                      case 0
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_DAFT_LP, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                      case 1
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP2, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                      case 2
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP4, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                      case 3
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP2, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                      case 4
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP4, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                      case 5
                        wait_async(set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP2, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]))
                    end select
                  else
                    if(((((($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback)) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)))
                      set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $ctrl, -1, %core__slot[$s], %core__generic[$s])
                      set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], -1, %core__slot[$s], %core__generic[$s]) & @ctrl_unit)
                    else
                      if(%core__engine_par[$s] = $ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS)
                        set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], 1 - $ctrl, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s])
                      else
                        if(%core__engine_par[$s] = $ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS)
                          set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], 1 - $ctrl, -1, %core__slot[$s], %core__generic[$s])
                        else
                          if(search(%mixer__vol, $ctrl_id) # -1)
                            %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                            while(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
                              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, get_control_par(%mixer__vol[%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                              inc(%i8[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                            end while
                            set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]) & @ctrl_unit)
                          else
                            set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], $ctrl, -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s])
                            set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]) & @ctrl_unit)
                          end if
                        end if
                      end if
                    end if
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if(%visible_allow0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
    if(((((($s # -1) and (%core__engine_par[$s] # $ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS)) and (%core__engine_par[$s] # $ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS)) and (%core__engine_par[$s] # $ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE)) and (search(%pre_lowcut, $ctrl_id) = -1)) and (search(%btn_sustain, $ctrl_id) = -1))
      if((search(%attack, $ctrl_id) # -1) or (search(%decay, $ctrl_id) # -1))
        set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) & @ctrl_unit)
      else
        if(search(%sld_sample_start_rand, $ctrl_id) # -1)
          set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (get_engine_par(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) / 10000) & @ctrl_unit)
        else
          if(search(%mixer__pan, $ctrl_id) # -1)
            if((($pan1__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + %slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = 0) and (($pan2__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons0[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 10) + (%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 5)]) = 0))
              set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%slot_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], -1, -1))
            else
              set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "ENGINE")
            end if
          else
            if(((((($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback)) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time))) or ($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)))
              set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], -1, %core__slot[$s], %core__generic[$s]) & @ctrl_unit)
            else
              set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[$s], -1, %core__slot[$s], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[$s]) & @ctrl_unit)
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if($ctrl_id = get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time))
        if($mixer__delay_sync = 0)
          set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME, -1, 1, 0) & "ms")
        else
          set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, @ctrl_unit)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if(search(%mixer__vol, $ctrl_id) # -1)
      set_control_par($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 8) + (82 - real_to_int(0.000130200063512 * int_to_real(get_control_par($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))))
    end if
    if($last_ctrl_id = 0)
      $last_ctrl_id := $ctrl_id
      $last_ctrl_label := $ctrl_label
      @last_ctrl_label_text := @ctrl_label_text
    end if
    if($ctrl_id # $last_ctrl_id)
      set_control_par_str($last_ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, @last_ctrl_label_text)
      $last_ctrl_id := $ctrl_id
      $last_ctrl_label := $ctrl_label
      @last_ctrl_label_text := @ctrl_label_text
    end if
    %last_cb0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    while((%time_remaining0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0) and ($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %last_cb0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) 
      %time_remaining0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %time_remaining0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - 10000
      wait(10000)
    end while
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %last_cb0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, @ctrl_label_text)
    end if
  else
    set_control_par_str($ctrl_label, $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, @ctrl_label_text)
  end if
end function
function update_visibility
  $slot_count0 := 0
  $s4 := 0
  $n14 := 0
  $i25 := 1
  while($i25 <= 47) 
    if($i25 # $see_page)
      if($see_page = 4)
        if($i25 # $see_main_subpage)
          $slot_count0 := 0
          while($slot_count0 <= 399) 
            if(%_page_assigns[($i25 * 800) + ($slot_count0 * 2)] # 0)
              set_control_par(%_page_assigns[($i25 * 800) + ($slot_count0 * 2)], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            end if
            inc($slot_count0)
          end while
        end if
      else
        $slot_count0 := 0
        while($slot_count0 <= 399) 
          if(%_page_assigns[($i25 * 800) + ($slot_count0 * 2)] # 0)
            set_control_par(%_page_assigns[($i25 * 800) + ($slot_count0 * 2)], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          end if
          inc($slot_count0)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    inc($i25)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  $settings_page := 0
  $i25 := 0
  while($i25 <= 399) 
    if(%_page_assigns[$i25 * 2] # 0)
      set_control_par(%_page_assigns[$i25 * 2], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %_page_assigns[($i25 * 2) + 1])
    end if
    if(%_page_assigns[($see_page * 800) + ($i25 * 2)] # 0)
      set_control_par(%_page_assigns[($see_page * 800) + ($i25 * 2)], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %_page_assigns[($see_page * 800) + (($i25 * 2) + 1)])
    end if
    if($see_page = 4)
      if(%_page_assigns[($see_main_subpage * 800) + ($i25 * 2)] # 0)
        set_control_par(%_page_assigns[($see_main_subpage * 800) + ($i25 * 2)], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %_page_assigns[($see_main_subpage * 800) + (($i25 * 2) + 1)])
      end if
    end if
    inc($i25)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_box), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (- sh_right(abs($see_page - 4) - 1, 31) * 165) + (- sh_right(abs($see_page - 3) - 1, 31) * 60))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_box), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[- sh_right(abs($see_page - 4) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($see_page - 3) - 1, 31)])
  $target_idx00000 := - sh_right(abs($see_page - 3) - 1, 31)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($file_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$target_idx00000])
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_categories) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_categories[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$target_idx00000])
    inc($i)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_save_dialog), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_button), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($see_page = 4)
    set_skin_offset(608 * $bg_offset)
    if($bg_picturestate > 59)
      $bg_picturestate := 59
    end if
    if($bg_picturestate < 20)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - $bg_picturestate)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    else
      if($bg_picturestate > 39)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - ($bg_picturestate - 40))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - ($bg_picturestate - 20))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      end if
    end if
    if($see_page = 4)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 71 + (154 * $i))
        set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 39 + %slot_position_offset[$i])
        set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 85 + (154 * $i))
        set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 39 + %slot_position_offset[$i])
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    if($see_page = 6)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 70 + (154 * $i))
        set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 78 + %slot_position_offset[$i])
        set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 83 + (154 * $i))
        set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 78 + %slot_position_offset[$i])
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if($see_main_subpage = 7)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_submain), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

    else

      end while
    end if
    if($see_main_subpage = 2)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_submain), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      $label_pos_y0 := 0

        set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc($label_pos_y0)
      end while
      $i5 := 0
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      $n1 := 0
      $label_pos_y0 := 0
      while($label_pos_y0 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc($label_pos_y0)
      end while
      if(($instr_browser__current_art_selection # -1) and ($instr_browser__current_character_selection # -1))
        $i5 := 0
        while($i5 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          inc($i5)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 12))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_submain), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
      $slot_count0 := 0
      while($slot_count0 <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        inc($slot_count0)
      end while
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_prev_slot), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_next_slot), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_current_slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_half_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_normal_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_double_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($rhythm_swing), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($rhythm_swing_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($humanize_amount), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($humanize_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    else
      if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 13, 17))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_submain), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 2)
        $slot_count0 := 0
        while($slot_count0 <= 99) 
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          inc($slot_count0)
        end while
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_prev_slot), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_next_slot), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_current_slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_half_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_normal_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_double_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($rhythm_swing), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($rhythm_swing_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($humanize_amount), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($humanize_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

            set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

          else
