              set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
            end if
          end if
        else
          if($see_main_subpage = 14)
            if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
              set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
            else
              if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
              end if
            end if
          else
            if($see_main_subpage = 15)
              if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
              else
                if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                end if
              end if
            else
              if($see_main_subpage = 16)
                if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                  set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                else
                  if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
                    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
                    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__table_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
                    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__steps_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      else
        $slot_count0 := 0
        while($slot_count0 <= 99) 
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          inc($slot_count0)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 47))

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_min1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_min_value1, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_max1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_max_value1, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 40)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 6)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 35)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 6)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel2), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_min2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_min_value2, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_max2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_max_value2, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 40)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 6)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 35)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 6)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_value3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_max_bg3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 2)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel3), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_min3), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_min_value3, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_max3), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
    set_text($motion_max_value3, $motion_value_hold & "%")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
    if($mixer__rev_type = 0)
      set_skin_offset(1216 + (608 * $bg_offset))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__ir_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_ir_bg), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_bg), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    else
      set_skin_offset(1824 + (608 * $bg_offset))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__ir_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_ir_bg), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_bg), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    end if
  end if
  if($see_page = 3)
    set_skin_offset(2432 + (608 * $bg_offset))
    $slot_count0 := 0
    while($slot_count0 <= 3) 
      set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$slot_count0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      inc($slot_count0)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__load), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__location_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $preset_buttons_show_state)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(@preset__location), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $preset_buttons_show_state)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
  if($see_page = 6)
    if($mixer__comp_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
    end if
    if($mixer__delay_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
    end if
    if($mixer__rev_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
  end if
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 47))
    if(%loaded_instruments[$fx_slot] > 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_grey_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_grey_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%sat_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%filter_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%amp_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_envelope_target
  $n4 := 0
  $group_id0 := 0
  $midi_velo_value0 := 0
  $midi_1_value0 := 0
  $midi_102_value0 := 0
  $midi_103_value0 := 0
  $midi_104_value0 := 0
  $midi_105_value0 := 0
  $is_stutter0 := 0
  $i9 := 0
  while($i9 <= 3) 
    if(%art_length[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] = 1)
      $midi_velo_value0 := 0
      $midi_1_value0 := 0
      $midi_102_value0 := 0
      $midi_103_value0 := 0
      $midi_104_value0 := 0
      $midi_105_value0 := 0
      $is_stutter0 := 0
      select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[$i9], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
        case 0
          $midi_1_value0 := 1
        case 1
          $midi_velo_value0 := 1
        case 2
          if($i9 = 0)
            $midi_102_value0 := 1
            $is_stutter0 := $env1__mode_menu
          else
            if($i9 = 1)
              $midi_103_value0 := 1
              $is_stutter0 := $env2__mode_menu
            else
              if($i9 = 2)
                $midi_104_value0 := 1
                $is_stutter0 := $env3__mode_menu
              else
                if($i9 = 3)
                  $midi_105_value0 := 1
                  $is_stutter0 := $env4__mode_menu
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
      end select
      if(%length_hdr[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] = 1)
        $n4 := 0
        while($n4 <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] - 1)) 
          $group_id0 := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] + $n4
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_102_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_stut"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_103_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_stut"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_104_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_stut"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_105_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_stut"), -1)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), find_target($group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
          if($n4 = 0)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_102_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_103_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_104_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_105_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_plus"), -1)
          else
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 865800 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 865800 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (865800 * $midi_102_value0) - ((865800 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (865800 * $midi_103_value0) - ((865800 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (865800 * $midi_104_value0) - ((865800 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (865800 * $midi_105_value0) - ((865800 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_plus"), -1)
          end if
          inc($n4)
        end while
        message("")
      else
        if((%length_hdr[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] = 0) and (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] # 1))
          $n4 := 0
          while($n4 <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] - 1)) 
            $group_id0 := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] + $n4
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 840000 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 840000 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_102_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (840000 * $midi_102_value0) - ((840000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_stut"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_103_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (840000 * $midi_103_value0) - ((840000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_stut"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_104_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (840000 * $midi_104_value0) - ((840000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_stut"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_105_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (840000 * $midi_105_value0) - ((840000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_plus"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_stut"), -1)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), find_target($group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
            inc($n4)
          end while
          message("")
        else
          if((%length_hdr[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] = 0) and (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] = 1))
            $n4 := 0
            while($n4 <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] - 1)) 
              $group_id0 := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$i9]] + $n4
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_velo_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_velo_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000 * $midi_1_value0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_1_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_102_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_102_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_102_stut"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_103_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_103_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_103_stut"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_104_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_104_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_104_stut"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_105_value0) - ((1000000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0), $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_plus"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (1000000 * $midi_105_value0) * $is_stutter0, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "mod_105_stut"), -1)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 1000000, $group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), find_target($group_id0, find_mod($group_id0, "ENV_AHDSR"), "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
              inc($n4)
            end while
            message("")
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i9)
  end while
end function
function update_key_colors
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 127) 
    set_key_color($i, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    set_key_type($i, $NI_KEY_TYPE_NONE)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    $n := %loaded_instruments[$i] - 1
    if($n >= 0)
      $s := 24
      while($s <= 96) 
        set_key_color($s, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
        set_key_type($s, $NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT)
        inc($s)
      end while
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_assigned_instruments
  %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (num_elements(%_assigned_instruments) - 1)) 
    %_assigned_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
    inc(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %_assigned_instruments[$assign_slot_menu0 * 4] := %loaded_instruments[0]
  %_assigned_instruments[($assign_slot_menu1 * 4) + 1] := %loaded_instruments[1]
  %_assigned_instruments[($assign_slot_menu2 * 4) + 2] := %loaded_instruments[2]
  %_assigned_instruments[($assign_slot_menu3 * 4) + 3] := %loaded_instruments[3]
  %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (num_elements(%assign_slot_menu) - 1)) 
    set_control_par_str(%assign_slot_menu[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !assign_slot_list[get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
    inc(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        if(($see_main_subpage = (8 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) or ($see_main_subpage = (13 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])))
          $see_main_subpage := 7
        end if
      case 1
        %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
        %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        if($see_main_subpage = (13 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
          $see_main_subpage := 8 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          call _update_shown_table
        end if
      case 2
        %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
        if($see_main_subpage = (8 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
          $see_main_subpage := 13 + %i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          call _update_shown_envelope
        end if
    end select
    if(%loaded_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 0)
      %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    end if
    select(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      case 0
        $arp1__latch_mode := %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $env1__latch_mode := %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        if(%loaded_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Sample Start Rand"
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($attack0)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($attack0)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($decay0)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($decay0)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl := $btn_sustain0
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($btn_sustain0)
          @ctrl_unit := ""
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($btn_sustain0)
          @ctrl_label_text := ""
          call handle_control_change
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($decay0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
        end if
      case 1
        $arp2__latch_mode := %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $env2__latch_mode := %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        if(%loaded_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Sample Start Rand"
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand1)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand1)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($attack1)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($attack1)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($decay1)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($decay1)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl := $btn_sustain1
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($btn_sustain1)
          @ctrl_unit := ""
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($btn_sustain1)
          @ctrl_label_text := ""
          call handle_control_change
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand1), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack1), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($decay1), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
        end if
      case 2
        $arp3__latch_mode := %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $env3__latch_mode := %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        if(%loaded_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Sample Start Rand"
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand2)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand2)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($attack2)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($attack2)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($decay2)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($decay2)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl := $btn_sustain2
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($btn_sustain2)
          @ctrl_unit := ""
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($btn_sustain2)
          @ctrl_label_text := ""
          call handle_control_change
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand2), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack2), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($decay2), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
        end if
      case 3
        $arp4__latch_mode := %arp_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $env4__latch_mode := %env_latch0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        if(%loaded_instruments[%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Sample Start Rand"
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand3)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand3)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($attack3)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($attack3)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($decay3)
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($decay3)
          call handle_control_change
          !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
          $ctrl := $btn_sustain3
          $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($btn_sustain3)
          @ctrl_unit := ""
          $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($btn_sustain3)
          @ctrl_label_text := ""
          call handle_control_change
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand3), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack3), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($decay3), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
        end if
    end select
    inc(%i12[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  if($preset__is_loading # 1)
    call update_visibility
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
  call update_key_colors
end function
function update_octave_shifts
  %assigned_octave_shifts[0] := %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu0]
  set_control_par_str(%octave_shift_label[0], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "OCT: " & %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu0])
  %assigned_octave_shifts[1] := %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu1]
  set_control_par_str(%octave_shift_label[1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "OCT: " & %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu1])
  %assigned_octave_shifts[2] := %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu2]
  set_control_par_str(%octave_shift_label[2], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "OCT: " & %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu2])
  %assigned_octave_shifts[3] := %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu3]
  set_control_par_str(%octave_shift_label[3], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "OCT: " & %octave_shift_value_map[$octave_shift_menu3])
end function
function remote_instr_number_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%instr_number_button) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_number_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function remote_fx_page_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%fx_page_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_instr_labels
  set_text($instr_slot_button0, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[0]])
  set_text($instr_slot_button1, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[1]])
  set_text($instr_slot_button2, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[2]])
  set_text($instr_slot_button3, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[3]])
  set_text($mixer__instr_labels0, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[0]])
  set_text($mixer__instr_labels1, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[1]])
  set_text($mixer__instr_labels2, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[2]])
  set_text($mixer__instr_labels3, !instr_names[%loaded_instruments[3]])
end function
function update_order_label
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp1__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !arp_noteorder_pictures[$arp1__note_order - 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp2__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !arp_noteorder_pictures[$arp2__note_order - 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp3__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !arp_noteorder_pictures[$arp3__note_order - 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp4__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !arp_noteorder_pictures[$arp4__note_order - 2])
end function
function update_btn_monophonic_text
  if($btn_monophonic = 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_monophonic), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Mono")
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_monophonic), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Poly")
  end if
end function
function update_engine_visibility
  $i5 := 0
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  while($label_pos_y0 <= 2) 
    $i5 := 0
    while($i5 <= 3) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(%assign_slots_ids[$i5], $label_pos_y0, 1)
      inc($i5)
    end while
    inc($label_pos_y0)
  end while
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  while($label_pos_y0 <= (num_elements(%loaded_instruments) - 1)) 
    if((%loaded_instruments[$label_pos_y0] # 0) and (%art_length[%loaded_instruments[$label_pos_y0]] = 0))
      if(get_control_par(%assign_slots_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 2)
        set_control_par(%assign_slots_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_menu_item_visibility(%assign_slots_ids[$label_pos_y0], 2, 0)
    end if
    inc($label_pos_y0)
  end while
end function
function relink_control_to_ep
  $hold_value50 := search(%core__control_ids, $i330)
  %core__engine_par[$hold_value50] := $hold24
  %core__slot[$hold_value50] := $n144
  %core__generic[$hold_value50] := $v14
  %core__motion[$hold_value50] := $idx24
end function
function update_sat_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_gain_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob0_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob1_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob2_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 3])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob3_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 4])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob4_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 5])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sat_knob5_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 6])
end function
function update_sat_type
  %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    %menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par(%sat_menu[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    if((get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) # %sat_types[%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE = $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED))
      if(($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED))
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, %sat_types[%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
      end if
      $i330 := %sat_gain[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := %core__motion[search(%core__control_ids, %sat_gain[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])]
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob0[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 1]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob1[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 2]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob2[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 3]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob3[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 4]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob4[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 5]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %sat_knob5[%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(%menu_value0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 6]
      $n144 := 1
      $v14 := %i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
    end if
    inc(%i14[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  call update_sat_labels
end function
function update_amp_type
  %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    %menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par(%amp_menu[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    if((get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) # %amp_types[%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE = $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED))
      if(($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED))
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, %amp_types[%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
      end if
      $i330 := %amp_knob0[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob1[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 1]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob2[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 2]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob3[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 3]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob4[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 4]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob5[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 5]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
      $i330 := %amp_knob6[%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      $hold24 := %_amp_type_links[(%menu_value1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 7) + 6]
      $n144 := 3
      $v14 := %i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      $idx24 := 0
      call relink_control_to_ep
    end if
    inc(%i15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob0_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob1_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob2_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob3_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 3])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob4_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 4])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob5_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 5])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob6_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 6])
end function
function update_ir
  $load_id := load_ir_sample(!mixer__ir_names[$mixer__ir_menu], 0, 0)
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(1)
  end while
end function
function update_rev_type
  $load_id := set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, %mixer__REVERB_TYPES[$mixer__rev_type], -1, 0, 0)
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(2000)
  end while
  if(%mixer__REVERB_SUBTYPES[$mixer__rev_type] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TYPE, %mixer__REVERB_SUBTYPES[$mixer__rev_type], -1, 0, 0)
  end if
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
  end if
  $visible_deny := 1
  if($mixer__rev_type = 0)
    call update_ir
  end if
  if($mixer__rev_type < 3)
    $i330 := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY
    $n144 := 0
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    call handle_control_change
    $i330 := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME
    $n144 := 0
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__rev_time
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    @ctrl_unit := ""
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  else
    $i330 := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY
    $n144 := 0
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    call handle_control_change
    $i330 := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY
    $n144 := 0
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__rev_time
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    @ctrl_unit := ""
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  end if
  if($mixer__rev_type = 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_AUTOMATION_NAME, "N/A")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_AUTOMATION_NAME, "N/A")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_AUTOMATION_NAME, "Predelay")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_AUTOMATION_NAME, "Time")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY, -1, 0, 0) & " ms")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME, -1, 0, 0) & " ms")
  end if
  $visible_deny := 0
end function
function update_rev_preset_menu
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(!rev_preset_names) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) > 0)
    $mixer__rev_preset_menu := 6 * (get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 5) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $i + (6 * (get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1)), 1)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end function
function update_solo
  %i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %solo_active0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %solo_active0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    if(get_control_par(%mixer__solo[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      %solo_active0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    end if
    inc(%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    if(%solo_active0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
      if((get_control_par(%mixer__solo[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) and (%loaded_instruments[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0))
        %mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 1
      else
        %mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
      end if
    else
      if((get_control_par(%mixer__mute[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) or (%loaded_instruments[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] <= 0))
        %mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
      else
        %mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 1
      end if
    end if
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * %mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 4, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%mixer__solo_hold[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
      set_control_par(%octave_shift_label[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_small_blue)
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_instr_labels_array[0])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_instr_labels_array[1])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_instr_labels_array[2])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_instr_labels_array[3])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_assign_slot_menu_array[0])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_assign_slot_menu_array[1])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_assign_slot_menu_array[2])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_assign_slot_menu_array[3])
      set_control_par(%mixer__instr_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
      set_control_par(%preview_number_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
      set_control_par(%preview_engine_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(%octave_shift_label[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_small_grey)
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_array[0])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_array[1])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_array[2])
      set_control_par(%instr_slot_button[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_array[3])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_array[0])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_array[1])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_array[2])
      set_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_array[3])
      set_control_par(%mixer__instr_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_small_grey)
      set_control_par(%preview_number_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_small_grey)
      set_control_par(%preview_engine_labels[%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_small_grey)
    end if
    inc(%i16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "dB"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__vol0)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__vol_value0)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "dB"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__vol1)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__vol_value1)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "dB"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__vol2)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__vol_value2)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "dB"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__vol3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__vol3)
  @ctrl_unit := "dB"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__vol_value3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
  $visible_deny := 0
end function
function update_delay_time
  if($mixer__delay_sync = 1)
    $v := ($mixer__delay_time - 1) / (1000000 / num_elements(%mixer__SYNC_UNITS))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT, %mixer__SYNC_UNITS[$v], -1, 1, 0)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME, %mixer__SYNC_EP[%mixer__SYNC_COUNTER[$v] - 1], -1, 1, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, !mixer__SYNC_NAMES[$v])
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !mixer__SYNC_NAMES[$v]
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__delay_time
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time)
    @ctrl_unit := !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time_label)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  else
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT, $NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS, -1, 1, 0)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME, $mixer__delay_time, -1, 1, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME, -1, 1, 0) & " ms")
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "ms"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__delay_time
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time)
    @ctrl_unit := "ms"
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time_label)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  end if
end function
function update_fx_controls
  %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter1 := 0
  while($_iter1 <= 7) 
    %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + $_iter1] := 0
    inc($_iter1)
  end while
  $visible_deny := 1
  %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    $i330 := %attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := get_control_par(%attack_motion[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    call relink_control_to_ep
    $i330 := %decay[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_DECAY
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := get_control_par(%decay_motion[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    call relink_control_to_ep
    $i330 := %sat_gain[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[get_control_par(%sat_menu[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7]
    $n144 := 1
    $v14 := %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    $idx24 := get_control_par(%sat_gain_motion[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    call relink_control_to_ep
    $i330 := %filter_cut[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF
    $n144 := 2
    $v14 := %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    $idx24 := get_control_par(%filter_cut_motion[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    call relink_control_to_ep
    $i330 := %mixer__senddel[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1
    $n144 := 7
    $v14 := %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    $idx24 := get_control_par(%mixer__senddel_motion[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    call relink_control_to_ep
    inc(%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %sld_sample_start_rand[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
    if(%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
      %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "src_mod_samplestart")
        %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := -1
        set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $ctrl, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1)
        inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, (get_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) / 10000) & " %")
    else
      set_control_par_str($ctrl_id, $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
    end if
    %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %pre_lowcut[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, 1 - get_control_par(%pre_lowcut[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], 170000, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 0)
      %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %btn_sustain[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]) 
        %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR")
        %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], 1000000 * get_control_par(%btn_sustain[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      if(%core__motion[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
        set_control_par_str(%attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
      else
        %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR")
          %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
          set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(%attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        set_control_par_str(%attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], %mod_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %target_idx2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) & " ms")

      %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %decay[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])

        set_control_par_str(%decay[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
      else

          inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

      end if

      set_control_par_str(%attack[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
