      %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + 3] := $pan1__slot4_active_button
      %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + 4] := $pan2__slot1_active_button
      %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + 5] := $pan2__slot2_active_button
      %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + 6] := $pan2__slot3_active_button
      %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + 7] := $pan2__slot4_active_button
      if((($pan1__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = 0) and (($pan2__step_active_button * %_panstep_active_buttons1[(($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) * 8) + (%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 4)]) = 0))
        %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(%mixer__pan[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
          inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        set_control_par_str(%mixer__pan[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], -1, -1))
      else
        set_control_par_str(%mixer__pan[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Engine")
      end if
    else
      %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(%mixer__pan[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
        inc(%n7[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par_str(%mixer__pan[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]], -1, -1))
    end if
    %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %mixer__senddel[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
    if(%core__motion[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
      set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
    else
      set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(%mixer__senddel[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) & " dB")
    end if
    %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, %mixer__sendrev[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
    set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(%mixer__sendrev[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_control_par_str(%mixer__sendrev[%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) & " dB")
    inc(%i17[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__comp_threshold))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_threshold), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_threshold), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " dB")
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__comp_makeup))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_makeup), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_makeup), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " dB")
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__delay_bypass))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], 1 - $mixer__delay_bypass, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  call update_delay_time
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $mixer__delay_feedback, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " %")
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $mixer__delay_hicut, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " Hz")
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $mixer__delay_return, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " dB")
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__rev_bypass))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], 1 - $mixer__rev_bypass, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  %s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%core__control_ids, get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return))
  set_engine_par(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $mixer__rev_return, -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%core__engine_par[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, %core__slot[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %core__generic[%s3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) & " dB")
  $visible_deny := 0
  call update_fx_motion_values
  call motion_fx
end function
function update_pre_lowcut_labels
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    if(get_control_par(%pre_lowcut[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_pre_lowcut[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(%lbl_pre_lowcut[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_nks_labels
end function
function note_selection_backward_check
  if($arp1__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $arp1__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($arp2__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $arp2__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($arp3__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $arp3__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($arp4__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $arp4__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($env1__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $env1__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($env2__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $env2__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($env3__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $env3__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  if($env4__note_selection_hold # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, search(%note_selection_values, get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))
    $env4__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
end function
function update_note_selection
  $arp1__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $arp2__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $arp3__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $arp4__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $env1__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $env2__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $env3__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  $env4__note_selection_hold := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end function
function panstep_setting_pan1
  set_table_steps_shown(%pan1__panstep, $pan1__step_knob)
  set_table_steps_shown(%pan1__step_indicator, $pan1__step_knob)
  $pan1__steps := $pan1__step_knob
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan1__step_knob_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $pan1__step_knob)
end function
function panstep_setting_pan2
  set_table_steps_shown(%pan2__panstep, $pan2__step_knob)
  set_table_steps_shown(%pan2__step_indicator, $pan2__step_knob)
  $pan2__steps := $pan2__step_knob
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan2__step_knob_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $pan2__step_knob)
end function
function reset_modulators
  $last_see_main_subpage00 := 0
  $i110 := 0
  $rr00000 := 0
  while($rr00000 <= 3) 
    $last_see_main_subpage00 := 0
    while($last_see_main_subpage00 <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$rr00000]] - 1)) 
      $i110 := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$rr00000]] + $last_see_main_subpage00
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $i110, find_mod($i110, "mod_107"), -1)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, $i110, find_mod($i110, "mod_108"), -1)
      inc($last_see_main_subpage00)
    end while
    inc($rr00000)
  end while
end function
function panstep_bypass_pan1
  %i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%bypassslot0) - 1)) 
    %bypassslot0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %bypassslot0[0] := $pan1__slot1_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot0[1] := $pan1__slot2_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot0[2] := $pan1__slot3_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot0[3] := $pan1__slot4_active_button * 1000000
  if($pan1__step_active_button # 0)
    %i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
      %n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        %group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, %bypassslot0[%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_107"), -1)
        inc(%n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  else
    %i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
      %n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        %group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, %group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id_bypass0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_107"), -1)
        inc(%n9[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%i19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  end if
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan0)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value0)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan1)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value1)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan2)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value2)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__pan3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end function
function panstep_bypass_pan2
  %i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%bypassslot1) - 1)) 
    %bypassslot1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %bypassslot1[0] := $pan2__slot1_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot1[1] := $pan2__slot2_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot1[2] := $pan2__slot3_active_button * 1000000
  %bypassslot1[3] := $pan2__slot4_active_button * 1000000
  if($pan2__step_active_button # 0)
    %i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
      %n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        %group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, %bypassslot1[%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_108"), -1)
        inc(%n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  else
    %i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
      %n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        %group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 0, %group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id_bypass1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_108"), -1)
        inc(%n10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%i20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  end if
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan0)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value0)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan1)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value1)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan2)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value2)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__pan3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__pan3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__pan_value3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end function
function update_pan_slot_graphics
  select($pan1__slot1_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot1_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot1_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan1__slot2_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot2_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot2_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan1__slot3_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot3_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot3_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan1__slot4_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot4_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan1__slot4_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan2__slot1_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot1_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot1_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan2__slot2_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot2_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot2_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan2__slot3_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot3_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot3_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
  select($pan2__slot4_active_button)
    case 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot4_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
    case 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($pan2__slot4_active_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_fx_tab_selected")
  end select
end function
function update_pan_step_text
  set_text($pan1__step_knob_label, "Steps: " & $pan1__step_knob)
  set_text($pan2__step_knob_label, "Steps: " & $pan2__step_knob)
end function
function update_pan_head_labels
  if($pan1__step_active_button = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan1__head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan1__head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_blue)
  end if
  if($pan2__step_active_button = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan2__head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pan2__head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_blue)
  end if
end function
function update_global_arp_settings
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($rhythm_swing_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Swing " & $rhythm_swing & " %")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($humanize_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Humanize " & $humanize_amount & " %")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp1__transpose_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Transp: " & $arp1__transpose)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp2__transpose_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Transp: " & $arp2__transpose)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp3__transpose_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Transp: " & $arp3__transpose)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp4__transpose_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Transp: " & $arp4__transpose)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp1__octave_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Oct: " & $arp1__octave)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp2__octave_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Oct: " & $arp2__octave)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp3__octave_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Oct: " & $arp3__octave)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($arp4__octave_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Oct: " & $arp4__octave)
  if($arp1__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
  if($arp2__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
  if($arp3__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
  if($arp4__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
  if($env1__retrigger = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
  if($env2__retrigger = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
  if($env3__retrigger = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
  if($env4__retrigger = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
end function
function update_preview_engine_text
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($preview_engine_labels0), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !assign_slot_list[get_control_par(get_ui_id($assign_slot_menu0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($preview_engine_labels1), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !assign_slot_list[get_control_par(get_ui_id($assign_slot_menu1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($preview_engine_labels2), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !assign_slot_list[get_control_par(get_ui_id($assign_slot_menu2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($preview_engine_labels3), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !assign_slot_list[get_control_par(get_ui_id($assign_slot_menu3), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
end function
function update_vol_handles
  $midi_104_value0 := 0
  while($midi_104_value0 <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%mixer__vol_handle[$midi_104_value0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%mixer__vol[$midi_104_value0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + (82 - real_to_int(0.000130200063512 * int_to_real(get_control_par(%mixer__vol[$midi_104_value0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)))))
    inc($midi_104_value0)
  end while
end function
function reset_env_last_mode
  $env1__last_mode := -1
  $env2__last_mode := -1
  $env3__last_mode := -1
  $env4__last_mode := -1
end function
function _set_env_mode
  select($env1__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env1__last_mode # $env1__mode_menu) and ($env1__last_mode # -1))
        $env1__rate := 96
        if($env1__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env1__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env1__last_mode # $env1__mode_menu) and ($env1__last_mode # -1))
        $env1__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env1__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env1__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $env1__rate := $env1__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env1__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env1__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
  select($env2__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env2__last_mode # $env2__mode_menu) and ($env2__last_mode # -1))
        $env2__rate := 96
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env2__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env2__last_mode # $env2__mode_menu) and ($env2__last_mode # -1))
        $env2__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env2__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $env2__rate := $env2__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env2__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env2__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
  select($env3__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env3__last_mode # $env3__mode_menu) and ($env3__last_mode # -1))
        $env3__rate := 96
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env3__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env3__last_mode # $env3__mode_menu) and ($env3__last_mode # -1))
        $env3__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env3__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env3__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $env3__rate := $env3__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env3__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env3__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
  select($env4__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env4__last_mode # $env4__mode_menu) and ($env4__last_mode # -1))
        $env4__rate := 96
        if($env4__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env4__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env4__last_mode # $env4__mode_menu) and ($env4__last_mode # -1))
        $env4__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env4__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env4__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env4__rate > 4)
          $env4__rate := $env4__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env4__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env4__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env4__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
end function
function set_mirror_tables
  $SIZE1 := 0
  $n1 := 0
  $i5 := 0
  $rhythm_edit1 := 0
  select($assign_slot_menu0)
    case 0
      set_table_steps_shown(%slot1_rhythm_mirror, 16)
      $SIZE1 := 0
      while($SIZE1 <= 15) 
        %slot1_rhythm_mirror[$SIZE1] := 0
        inc($SIZE1)
      end while
      set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
      set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)
    case 1
      if($arp1__rhythm_steps <= 16)
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot1_rhythm_mirror, 16)
        ~arp1__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 16.) / 16.
        if($arp1__steps < 16)
          $SIZE1 := 0
          $n1 := 0
          while($SIZE1 <= $arp1__steps) 
            if($SIZE1 = 0)
              $rhythm_edit1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3
            else
              $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1
            end if
            if(real_to_int((~arp1__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1))) > $n1)
              $n1 := real_to_int((~arp1__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold) + 1
            else
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold)
            end if
            inc($SIZE1)
          end while
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        end if
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot1_rhythm_mirror, 32)
        ~arp1__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 32.) / 32.
        if($arp1__steps < 32)
          $SIZE1 := 0
          $n1 := 0
          while($SIZE1 <= $arp1__steps) 
            if($SIZE1 = 0)
              $rhythm_edit1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3
            else
              $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1
            end if
            if(real_to_int((~arp1__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1))) > $n1)
              $n1 := real_to_int((~arp1__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold) + 1
            else
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold)
            end if
            inc($SIZE1)
          end while
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        end if
      end if
    case 2
      if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot1_rhythm_mirror, 50)
        ~env1__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 50.) / 50.
        set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      else
        if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
          if($env1__rhythm_steps <= 16)
            set_table_steps_shown(%slot1_rhythm_mirror, 16)
            ~env1__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot1_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 16.) / 16.
            if($env1__steps < 16)

                  $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1

                  $n1 := real_to_int((~env1__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~env1__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env1__real_hold) + 1
                else

                end if

            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if

            else

            end if

        end if
      end if
  end select
  select($assign_slot_menu2)
    case 0
      set_table_steps_shown(%slot3_rhythm_mirror, 16)
      $SIZE1 := 0
      while($SIZE1 <= 15) 
        %slot3_rhythm_mirror[$SIZE1] := 0

              $n1 := real_to_int((~arp3__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp3__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp3__real_hold) + 1
            else
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp3__real_hold)
            end if
            inc($SIZE1)
          end while
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        end if
      end if
    case 2
      if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot3_rhythm_mirror, 50)
        ~env3__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 50.) / 50.
        set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      else
        if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
          if($env3__rhythm_steps <= 16)
            set_table_steps_shown(%slot3_rhythm_mirror, 16)
            ~env3__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 16.) / 16.
            if($env3__steps < 16)
              $SIZE1 := 0
              $n1 := 0
              while($SIZE1 <= $env3__steps) 
                if($SIZE1 = 0)
                  $rhythm_edit1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3
                else
                  $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1
                end if
                if(real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1))) > $n1)
                  $n1 := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env3__real_hold) + 1
                else
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env3__real_hold)
                end if
                inc($SIZE1)
              end while
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            else
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
            end if
          else
            set_table_steps_shown(%slot3_rhythm_mirror, 32)
            ~env3__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 32.) / 32.
            if($env3__steps < 32)
              $SIZE1 := 0
              $n1 := 0
              while($SIZE1 <= $env3__steps) 
                if($SIZE1 = 0)
                  $rhythm_edit1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3
                else
                  $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1
                end if
                if(real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1))) > $n1)
                  $n1 := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env3__real_hold) + 1
                else
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env3__real_hold)
                end if
                inc($SIZE1)
              end while
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot3_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            else
              set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
  end select
  select($assign_slot_menu3)
    case 0
      set_table_steps_shown(%slot4_rhythm_mirror, 16)
      $SIZE1 := 0
      while($SIZE1 <= 15) 
        %slot4_rhythm_mirror[$SIZE1] := 0
        inc($SIZE1)
      end while
      set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
      set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)
    case 1
      if($arp4__rhythm_steps <= 16)
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot4_rhythm_mirror, 16)
        ~arp4__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 16.) / 16.
        if($arp4__steps < 16)
          $SIZE1 := 0
          $n1 := 0
          while($SIZE1 <= $arp4__steps) 
            if($SIZE1 = 0)
              $rhythm_edit1 := get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3
            else
              $rhythm_edit1 := ($rhythm_edit1 + $i5) + 1
            end if
            if(real_to_int((~arp4__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp4__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1))) > $n1)
              $n1 := real_to_int((~arp4__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp4__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold) + 1
            else
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold)
            end if
            inc($SIZE1)
          end while
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $rhythm_edit1)
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3) + (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 6)) - get_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[3], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        end if
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%slot4_rhythm_mirror, 32)
        ~arp4__real_hold := ((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%slot4_rhythm_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 6.) - 32.) / 32.
        if($arp4__steps < 32)
          $SIZE1 := 0

            else

            end if

              $n1 := real_to_int((~arp4__real_hold * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)) - (floor(~arp4__real_hold) * int_to_real($SIZE1 + 1)))
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold) + 1
            else
              $i5 := real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold)
            end if
            inc($SIZE1)
          end while

        else

    case 2

                else
                  $i5 := real_to_int(~env4__real_hold)
                end if

        end if
      end if
  end select
end function
function update_mirror_tables
  $rhythm_edit1 := 0
  $i5 := 0
  select($assign_slot_menu0)
    case 1
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      while($rhythm_edit1 <= 31) 
        %slot1_rhythm_mirror[$rhythm_edit1] := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        inc($rhythm_edit1)
      end while
    case 2
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      $i5 := 0
      while(($rhythm_edit1 <= 99) and ($i5 <= 49)) 
        %slot1_rhythm_mirror[$i5] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
          $rhythm_edit1 := $rhythm_edit1 + 2
        else
          inc($rhythm_edit1)
        end if
        inc($i5)
      end while
  end select
  select($assign_slot_menu1)
    case 1
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      while($rhythm_edit1 <= 31) 
        %slot2_rhythm_mirror[$rhythm_edit1] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        inc($rhythm_edit1)
      end while
    case 2
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      $i5 := 0
      while(($rhythm_edit1 <= 99) and ($i5 <= 49)) 
        %slot2_rhythm_mirror[$i5] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
          $rhythm_edit1 := $rhythm_edit1 + 2
        else
          inc($rhythm_edit1)
        end if
        inc($i5)
      end while
  end select
  select($assign_slot_menu2)
    case 1
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      while($rhythm_edit1 <= 31) 
        %slot3_rhythm_mirror[$rhythm_edit1] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        inc($rhythm_edit1)
      end while
    case 2
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      $i5 := 0
      while(($rhythm_edit1 <= 99) and ($i5 <= 49)) 
        %slot3_rhythm_mirror[$i5] := %env3__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
          $rhythm_edit1 := $rhythm_edit1 + 2
        else
          inc($rhythm_edit1)
        end if
        inc($i5)
      end while
  end select
  select($assign_slot_menu3)
    case 1
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      while($rhythm_edit1 <= 31) 
        %slot4_rhythm_mirror[$rhythm_edit1] := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        inc($rhythm_edit1)
      end while
    case 2
      $rhythm_edit1 := 0
      $i5 := 0
      while(($rhythm_edit1 <= 99) and ($i5 <= 49)) 
        %slot4_rhythm_mirror[$i5] := %env4__rhythm_playback[$rhythm_edit1]
        if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
          $rhythm_edit1 := $rhythm_edit1 + 2
        else
          inc($rhythm_edit1)
        end if
        inc($i5)
      end while
  end select
end function
function _on_controller
  $hold2 := 0
  $idx2 := 0
  while($idx2 <= 3) 
    select($idx2)
      case 0
        select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[$idx2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 1
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 31) 
              if((%arp1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %arp1__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%arp1__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %arp1__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp1__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%arp1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
          case 2
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 99) 
              if((%env1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env1__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %env1__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env1__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %env1__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env1__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env1__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
        end select
      case 1
        select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[$idx2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 1
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 31) 
              if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %arp2__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%arp2__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %arp2__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp2__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%arp2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
          case 2
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 99) 
              if((%env2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env2__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %env2__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env2__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %env2__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env2__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env2__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
        end select
      case 2
        select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[$idx2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 1
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 31) 
              if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %arp3__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp3__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%arp3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
          case 2
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 99) 
              if((%env3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env3__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %env3__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env3__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %env3__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env3__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env3__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
        end select
      case 3
        select(get_control_par(%assign_slot_menu[$idx2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 1
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 31) 
              if((%arp4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %arp4__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%arp4__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %arp4__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp4__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%arp4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
          case 2
            $hold2 := 0
            while($hold2 <= 99) 
              if((%env4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env4__rhythm_B[$hold2]) < 0)
                %env4__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env4__rhythm_A[$hold2] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$hold2] - %env4__rhythm_A[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env4__rhythm_playback[$hold2] := %env4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$hold2] - %env4__rhythm_B[$hold2]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              inc($hold2)
            end while
        end select
    end select
    inc($idx2)
  end while
  call update_mirror_tables
  if($see_page = 4)
    if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  end if
end function
function on_btn_scan_presets
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$btn_scan_presets])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_scan_presets) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$btn_scan_presets])
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($file_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function update__btn_active_status
  if($preset__idx # -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)])
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_preset_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %favorite_presets_array[$preset__idx])
  end if
  if(search(%btn_tags_state, 1) = -1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_clear_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_clear_disabled")
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_clear_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_clear")
  end if
  $rr00000 := 0
  if($preset__idx = -1)
    $rr00000 := 1
  else
    if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 0)
      $rr00000 := 1
    end if
  end if
  if($rr00000 = 1)
    $saving_disabled := 1
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_edit_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_tags_disabled")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_delete_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_delete_disabled")
  else
    if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_edit_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_tags")
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_delete_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_delete")
      $saving_disabled := 0
    end if
  end if
  if((search(%final_favorite_presets_array, 1) = -1) and (%btn_tags_state[22] = 0))
    set_control_par_str(%tag_button_array[22], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite_disabled")
  else
    set_control_par_str(%tag_button_array[22], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite")
  end if
end function
function countBits
  $fx_sat_balancer00002 := ($i7000 .and. 1431655765) + (sh_right($i7000, 1) .and. 1431655765)
  $fx_sat_balancer00002 := ($fx_sat_balancer00002 .and. 858993459) + (sh_right($fx_sat_balancer00002, 2) .and. 858993459)
  $fx_sat_balancer00002 := ($fx_sat_balancer00002 .and. 252645135) + (sh_right($fx_sat_balancer00002, 4) .and. 252645135)
  $fx_sat_balancer00002 := ($fx_sat_balancer00002 .and. 16711935) + (sh_right($fx_sat_balancer00002, 8) .and. 16711935)
  $fx_sat_balancer00002 := ($fx_sat_balancer00002 .and. 65535) + (sh_right($fx_sat_balancer00002, 16) .and. 65535)
end function
function tags_wait
  wait(1)
end function
function preset_tags_action
  %game_over0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %decimal1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %bitmask1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%final_favorite_presets_array) - 1)) 
    %final_preset_numbers_array[$i] := -1
    %final_favorite_presets_array[$i] := 0
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 22) 
    %btn_tags_state[$i] := get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $a100000 := 23
  $i60000 := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
    $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
    inc($i)
  end while
  %bitmask1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i60000
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    $i7000 := sh_right(%bitmask1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 23 - %category_accum[$i + 1]) .and. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - %category_elements[$i])
    call countBits
    %activeTagsPerCategory[$i] := $fx_sat_balancer00002
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_PRESETS - 1)) 
    %decimal1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (sh_left(%preset_tags[%preset_numbers_array[$i]], 1) + ((sh_right(%preset_tags[%preset_numbers_array[$i]], 22) .and. 1) * real_to_int(pow(2., 22.)))) + %favorite_presets_array[%preset_numbers_array[$i]]
    %v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while((%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 5) and (%game_over0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 0)) 
      if(%filtermethodPerCategory[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
        $i7000 := sh_right(%decimal1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 23 - %category_accum[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 1]) .and. sh_right(%bitmask1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 23 - %category_accum[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 1])
        call countBits
        %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $fx_sat_balancer00002
        %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (((1 + sh_right(abs(%bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - 1, 31)) .or. abs(sh_right(abs(1 + sh_right(abs(%activeTagsPerCategory[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))) * %category_elements[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
        %game_over0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := abs(sh_right(abs((1 + sh_right(abs(%bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - 1, 31)) .or. abs((1 + sh_right(abs(%activeTagsPerCategory[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) - 1, 31)) - 1)) - 1, 31))
      else
        if((%filtermethodPerCategory[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 0) or (%filtermethodPerCategory[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 2))
          %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := .not. sh_right(%bitmask1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 23 - %category_accum[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 1]) .or. sh_right(%decimal1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 23 - %category_accum[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 1])
          $i7000 := %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .and. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - %category_elements[%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          call countBits
          %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $fx_sat_balancer00002
          %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        end if
      end if
      inc(%v0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      call tags_wait
    end while
    if(%allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 23)
      !final_preset_title_array[%z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := !preset_title_array[$i]
      %final_preset_numbers_array[%z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %preset_numbers_array[$i]
      %final_favorite_presets_array[%z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %favorite_presets_array[%preset_numbers_array[$i]]
      inc(%z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end if
    %game_over0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %allowed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %end_of_presets_array[$i] := $i
    %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    %bitCount0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS # 0)
    $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD := $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS
  end if
  $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS := %z0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
end function
function tag_state_handling
  %u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter1 := 0
  while($_iter1 <= 22) 
    inc($_iter1)
  end while
  %allowed1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %bitCount1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %bitmask20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $ii := 0
  while($ii <= 22) 
    $i := 0
    while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
      %decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (sh_left(%preset_tags[%final_preset_numbers_array[$i]], 1) + ((sh_right(%preset_tags[%final_preset_numbers_array[$i]], 22) .and. 1) * real_to_int(pow(2., 22.)))) + %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[$i]]
      $i := (($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1) * - sh_right(abs((sh_right(%decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - $ii) .and. 1) - 1) - 1, 31)) + (- sh_right(abs(sh_right(%decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - $ii) .and. 1) - 1, 31) * $i)
      %tag_mask_array[$ii] := (-1 * - sh_right(abs((sh_right(%decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - $ii) .and. 1) - 1) - 1, 31)) + (- sh_right(abs(sh_right(%decimal2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - $ii) .and. 1) - 1, 31) * $ii)
      inc($i)
    end while
    inc($ii)
  end while
  $ii := 0
  while($ii <= 3) 
    if((%filtermethodPerCategory[$ii] = 2) or (%filtermethodPerCategory[$ii] = 1))
      $a100000 := 22
      $i60000 := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
        $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
        inc($i)
      end while
      %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i60000
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1)) 
        inc($i)
      end while
      %z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        if((%filtermethodPerCategory[%z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1) and (%activeTagsPerCategory[%z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] > 1))
          %bitmask20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := sh_left(2147483647, 22 - %category_accum[$ii]) .or. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - (22 - %category_accum[$ii + 1]))
          %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .and. %bitmask20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        end if
        inc(%z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
    end if
    %z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    $iii := %category_accum[$ii]
    while($iii <= (%category_accum[$ii + 1] - 1)) 
      if((%filtermethodPerCategory[$ii] = 2) or (%filtermethodPerCategory[$ii] = 1))
        %bitmask20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := sh_left(2147483647, 22 - %category_accum[$ii]) .or. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - (22 - %category_accum[$ii + 1]))
        %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .and. %bitmask20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .or. sh_left(1, 22 - ($iii + 1))
        $i := 0
        while($i <= ($NUM_PRESETS - 1)) 
          $i7000 := sh_right(%bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - %category_accum[$ii + 1])
          call countBits
          %bitCount1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $fx_sat_balancer00002
          $i7000 := sh_right(%preset_tags[$i], 22 - %category_accum[$ii + 1]) .and. sh_right(%bitmask3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 22 - %category_accum[$ii + 1])
          call countBits
          %allowed1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $fx_sat_balancer00002
          if((%allowed1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= %bitCount1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%bitCount1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0))
            $i := $NUM_PRESETS - 1
            %tag_mask_array[$iii] := -1
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      if(%tag_mask_array[$iii] # -1)
        inc(%z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end if
      %category_active[$ii] := %z1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] / %category_elements[$ii]
      call tags_wait
      inc($iii)
    end while
    inc($ii)
  end while
  $ii := 0
  while($ii <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_categories[$ii], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__category_font[(num_elements(%fonts__category_font) * $gui_idx) + %category_active[$ii]])
    $i := %category_accum[$ii]
    while($i <= (%category_accum[$ii + 1] - 1)) 
      if(%tag_mask_array[$i] = -1)
        %u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], %font_types[%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + %u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          set_control_par_str(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_presetbrowser_selector_tags")
          inc(%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      else
        %u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], %font_types[%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 5])
          set_control_par_str(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "empty_picture")
          inc(%u0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    inc($ii)
  end while
end function
function update__preset_button_focus
  if((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) # -1) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 1
    if(($scroll__up > search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)) and ($scroll__up <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)))
      $scroll__up := search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) + ((sh_right($scroll__up - 3, 31) + 1) * -3)
      if($scroll__up > ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14))
        $scroll__up := search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)
      end if
    else
      if(((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) > 14) and ($scroll__up <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)))
        $scroll__up := ((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - 14) + 1) + ((1 + sh_right($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - ($scroll__up + 3), 31)) * 3)
      end if
    end if
    if((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) > ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)) and ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS > 14))
      $scroll__up := $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14
    end if
    $scroll__up := (sh_right($scroll__up, 31) + 1) * $scroll__up
  else
    if($preset__idx = -1)
      $scroll__up := 0
    end if
  end if
  if($scroll__up > ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14))
    $scroll__up := $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14
  end if
  if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS < 14)
    $scroll__up := 0
  end if
end function
function on_button_tag
  ?form10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0.
  ?form20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0.
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1)) 
    %FS_btn_tags_state[$i] := get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(($saving_preset = 0) and ($tag_button_pressed = 0))
    $tag_button_pressed := 1
    call preset_tags_action
    if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS = 0)
      $p := num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1
      while(($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS = 0) and ($p >= 0)) 
        if(%btn_tags_state[$p] = 1)
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$p], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          %btn_tags_state[$p] := 0
          call preset_tags_action
          wait(10)
        end if
        dec($p)
      end while
    end if
    call tag_state_handling
    if($preset_scan = 0)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS & "/" & $NUM_PRESETS)
    end if
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%end_of_presets_array) - 1)) 
      if($i < $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS)
        %end_of_presets_array[$i] := 1
      else
        %end_of_presets_array[$i] := -1
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    ?form10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := int_to_real($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)
    ?form20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := int_to_real($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD - 14)
    if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD <= 14)
      ?form20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1.
    end if
    if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS <= 14)
      ?form10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1.
    end if
    ~scroll__realup := (~scroll__realup * ?form10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) / ?form20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    $scroll__up := real_to_int(round(~scroll__realup))
    call update__preset_button_focus
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_clear_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      if($preset__idx # -1)
        if(search(%btn_tags_state, 1) = -1)
          $scroll__up := $scroll__up
        else
          ~scroll__realup := int_to_real(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx))
          $scroll__up := real_to_int(floor(~scroll__realup))
        end if
      else
        $scroll__up := $scroll__up_origin
      end if
      $btn_clear_tags := 0
    end if
    if($see_page # 4)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 13) 
        set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "      " & !final_preset_title_array[$i + $scroll__up])
        set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %btn_preset_onoff[$i + $scroll__up])
        set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %final_favorite_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up])
        if(%end_of_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up] = -1)
          set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
