          set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS > 14)
        $sli_scrollbar := 1000000 - ((1000000 / ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)) * $scroll__up)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR, - (3500 + (2 * ($NUM_PRESETS - $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS))))
        $handle_size := real_to_int(round(290. / (int_to_real($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS) / 14.)))
        if($handle_size < 30)
          $handle_size := 30
        end if
      else
        $sli_scrollbar := 1000000
        $handle_size := 290
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $handle_size)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((290 - $handle_size) - (($sli_scrollbar * (290 - $handle_size)) / 1000000)))
    end if
    $tag_button_pressed := 0
  end if
end function
function update__preset_browser
  if(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) = -1)
    $preset__idx := 0
  end if
  $btn_scan_presets := 0
  call on_btn_scan_presets
  call update__btn_active_status
  call on_button_tag
end function
function update_content_highlight_label_font
  if($content_highlight_bypass = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($content_highlight_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($content_highlight_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
end function
function get_content_highlight_state
  while($settings_load_id > 0) 
    wait(2000)
  end while
  if($settings_load_id = 0)
    %content_highlight_setup_elytwo[0] := 1
  end if
  $content_highlight_bypass := %content_highlight_setup_elytwo[0]
  call update_content_highlight_label_font
end function
function _allow_groups
  $s4 := 0
  $n14 := 0
  $v1 := 0
  $idx2 := 0
  $hold2 := 0
  $i25 := 0
  while($i25 <= ($NUM_GROUPS - 1)) 
    set_event_par_arr($eventID0, $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 0, $i25)
    inc($i25)
  end while
  $v1 := $slot_count0
  if($engine0 = 0)
    if(%art_length[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] = 0)
      set_event_par_arr($eventID0, $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] + %slots_rrCount[$v1])
      if(%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] = 1)
        %slots_rrCount[$v1] := 0
      else
        $hold2 := %slots_rrCount[$v1]
        while(%slots_rrCount[$v1] = $hold2) 
          %slots_rrCount[$v1] := random(0, %rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] - 1)
        end while
      end if
    else
      $s4 := %loaded_instruments[$v1]
      $n14 := 0
      while($n14 <= (%rr_nums[$s4] - 1)) 
        set_event_par_arr($eventID0, $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 1, %first_groupID[$s4] + $n14)
        inc($n14)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if(($engine0 = 1) and (%art_length[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] = 0))
      $s4 := %_assigned_instruments[($engine0 * 4) + $slot_count0]
      if($s4 > 0)
        set_event_par_arr($eventID0, $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 1, %first_groupID[$s4] + %slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
        if($slot_count0 = 0)
          inc(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0])
          if(($arp1__note_order = 14) or ($arp1__note_repeat = 0))
            if(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] >= $arp1__selected_cursor)
              inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
              %_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] := 0
            end if
          end if
          if(($arp1__note_order # 14) and ($arp1__note_repeat > 0))
            inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
          end if
        else
          if($slot_count0 = 1)
            inc(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0])
            if(($arp2__note_order = 14) or ($arp2__note_repeat = 0))
              if(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] >= $arp2__selected_cursor)
                inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
                %_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] := 0
              end if
            end if
            if(($arp2__note_order # 14) and ($arp2__note_repeat > 0))
              inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
            end if
          else
            if($slot_count0 = 2)
              inc(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0])
              if(($arp3__note_order = 14) or ($arp3__note_repeat = 0))
                if(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] >= $arp3__selected_cursor)
                  inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
                  %_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] := 0
                end if
              end if
              if(($arp3__note_order # 14) and ($arp3__note_repeat > 0))
                inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
              end if
            else
              if($slot_count0 = 3)
                inc(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0])
                if(($arp4__note_order = 14) or ($arp4__note_repeat = 0))
                  if(%_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] >= $arp4__selected_cursor)
                    inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
                    %_slots_chord_subCount[4 + $slot_count0] := 0
                  end if
                end if
                if(($arp4__note_order # 14) and ($arp4__note_repeat > 0))
                  inc(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0])
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
        if(%slots_rrCount[$slot_count0] >= %rr_nums[$s4])
          %slots_rrCount[$slot_count0] := 0
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(($engine0 >= 1) and (%art_length[%loaded_instruments[$v1]] = 1))
        $s4 := %_assigned_instruments[($engine0 * 4) + $slot_count0]
        if($s4 > 0)
          $n14 := 0
          while($n14 <= (%rr_nums[$s4] - 1)) 
            set_event_par_arr($eventID0, $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 1, %first_groupID[$s4] + $n14)
            inc($n14)
          end while
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function check_cursor_amount
  if($arp1__cursor = 0)
    if($arp1__note_order = 14)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__chord_buffer) - 1)) 
        if(%arp1__chord_buffer[$i] # 0)
          note_off(%arp1__chord_buffer[$i])
          %arp1__chord_buffer[$i] := 0
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      note_off($arp1__note_id)
    end if
    stop_wait($arp1__callback_id, 0)
    $arp1__bar_count := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      %arp1__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__selected_notes_buffer) - 1)) 
      %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($arp2__cursor = 0)
    if($arp2__note_order = 14)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__chord_buffer) - 1)) 
        if(%arp2__chord_buffer[$i] # 0)
          note_off(%arp2__chord_buffer[$i])
          %arp2__chord_buffer[$i] := 0
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      note_off($arp2__note_id)
    end if
    stop_wait($arp2__callback_id, 0)
    $arp2__bar_count := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      %arp2__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__selected_notes_buffer) - 1)) 
      %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($arp3__cursor = 0)
    if($arp3__note_order = 14)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__chord_buffer) - 1)) 
        if(%arp3__chord_buffer[$i] # 0)
          note_off(%arp3__chord_buffer[$i])
          %arp3__chord_buffer[$i] := 0
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      note_off($arp3__note_id)
    end if
    stop_wait($arp3__callback_id, 0)
    $arp3__bar_count := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      %arp3__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__selected_notes_buffer) - 1)) 
      %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($arp4__cursor = 0)
    if($arp4__note_order = 14)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__chord_buffer) - 1)) 
        if(%arp4__chord_buffer[$i] # 0)
          note_off(%arp4__chord_buffer[$i])
          %arp4__chord_buffer[$i] := 0
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      note_off($arp4__note_id)
    end if
    stop_wait($arp4__callback_id, 0)
    $arp4__bar_count := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      %arp4__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      %arp3__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__selected_notes_buffer) - 1)) 
      %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($env1__cursor = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      $s := 0
      while($s <= 127) 
        if(%_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] # 0)
          mf_set_event_par(%_env1__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env1__note_entry_time[$s])
          note_off(%_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s])
          %_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] := 0
        end if
        inc($s)
      end while
      inc($i)
    end while
    stop_wait($env1__callback_id, 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__note_buffer) - 1)) 
      %env1__note_buffer[$i] := 0
      %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      if($i < num_elements(%_env1__current_engine_notes))
        %_env1__current_engine_notes[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_env1__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
      %_env1__last_note_ids[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_env1__active_notes) - 1)) 
      %_env1__active_notes[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env1__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($env2__cursor = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      $s := 0
      while($s <= 127) 
        if(%_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] # 0)
          mf_set_event_par(%_env2__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env2__note_entry_time[$s])
          note_off(%_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s])
          %_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] := 0
        end if
        inc($s)
      end while
      inc($i)
    end while
    stop_wait($env2__callback_id, 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__note_buffer) - 1)) 
      %env2__note_buffer[$i] := 0
      %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      if($i < num_elements(%_env2__current_engine_notes))
        %_env2__current_engine_notes[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_env2__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
      %_env2__last_note_ids[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env2__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($env3__cursor = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      $s := 0
      while($s <= 127) 
        if(%_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] # 0)
          mf_set_event_par(%_env3__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env3__note_entry_time[$s])
          note_off(%_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s])
          %_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] := 0
        end if
        inc($s)
      end while
      inc($i)
    end while
    stop_wait($env3__callback_id, 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env3__note_buffer) - 1)) 
      %env3__note_buffer[$i] := 0
      %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      if($i < num_elements(%_env3__current_engine_notes))
        %_env3__current_engine_notes[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_env3__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
      %_env3__last_note_ids[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env3__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if($env4__cursor = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      $s := 0
      while($s <= 127) 
        if(%_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] # 0)
          mf_set_event_par(%_env4__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env4__note_entry_time[$s])
          note_off(%_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s])
          %_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] := 0
        end if
        inc($s)
      end while
      inc($i)
    end while
    stop_wait($env4__callback_id, 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env4__note_buffer) - 1)) 
      %env4__note_buffer[$i] := 0
      %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$i] := 0
      if($i < num_elements(%_env4__current_engine_notes))
        %_env4__current_engine_notes[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_env4__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
      %_env4__last_note_ids[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env4__rhythm_indicator[$i] := 0
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  if(((((((($arp1__cursor = 0) and ($arp2__cursor = 0)) and ($arp3__cursor = 0)) and ($arp4__cursor = 0)) and ($env1__cursor = 0)) and ($env2__cursor = 0)) and ($env3__cursor = 0)) and ($env4__cursor = 0))
    $cursor := 0
  end if
  if($cursor = 0)
    $arp1__check_id := 0
    $arp2__check_id := 0
    $arp3__check_id := 0
    $arp4__check_id := 0
    $env1__check_id := 0
    $env2__check_id := 0
    $env3__check_id := 0
    $env4__check_id := 0
  end if
end function
function stop_pan_engine
  if($pan1__state = 1)
    $pan1__state := 0
  end if
  if($pan2__state = 1)
    $pan2__state := 0
  end if
end function
function set_arp1_note_selection
  $hold_value0 := 0
  $i26 := 0
  while($i26 <= ($arp1__cursor - 1)) 
    %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$i26] := %arp1__note_buffer[$i26]
    inc($i26)
  end while
  if(($arp1__note_selection # 0) and ($arp1__cursor # 0))
    sort(%arp1__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($arp1__note_selection_hold)
      case 1
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__cursor - 1]
        $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $hold_value0 := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__cursor - 1]
        if($arp1__cursor > 1)
          if($arp1__cursor = 2)
            %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $hold_value0
          else
            %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $arp1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__cursor / 2]
        $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp1__cursor > 1)
          %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp1__cursor = 2)
          %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($arp1__cursor > 2)
            %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $arp1__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($arp1__cursor = 1)
              $arp1__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($arp1__note_selection = 0) and ($arp1__cursor # 0))
      $arp1__selected_cursor := $arp1__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function arp1_sort_fill_buffer
  call set_arp1_note_selection
  while($arp1__a < 128) 
    if($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor)
      %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a] := %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__a]
    else
      %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a] := 0
      %arp1__selected_notes_buffer[$arp1__a] := 0
    end if
    inc($arp1__a)
  end while
  sort(%arp1__ordered, 1)
  $arp1__min_note := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__selected_cursor - 1]
  $arp1__max_note := %arp1__ordered[0]
  select($arp1__note_order)
    case 2
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
    case 3
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
    case 4
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp1__loop_cursor := ($arp1__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a + $arp1__selected_cursor] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a + 1]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 5
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp1__loop_cursor := ($arp1__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a + $arp1__selected_cursor] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp1__a]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 6
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := $arp1__max_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := %arp1__ordered[2]
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := %arp1__ordered[0]
        %arp1__loop_buffer[2] := %arp1__ordered[1]
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp1__a := 0
        while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a * 2] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 1]
          %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 3]
          inc($arp1__a)
        end while
        $arp1__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp1__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 7
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__max_note
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := %arp1__ordered[0]
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := %arp1__ordered[2]
        %arp1__loop_buffer[2] := %arp1__ordered[1]
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp1__a := 0
        while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a * 2] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
          %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a + 2]
          inc($arp1__a)
        end while
        $arp1__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp1__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 8
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := $arp1__max_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := %arp1__ordered[2]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := %arp1__ordered[0]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[2] := %arp1__ordered[1]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[3] := %arp1__ordered[0]
            $arp1__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a * 2] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 1]
              %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 3]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + (($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a + 2]
              %arp1__loop_buffer[(($arp1__a * 2) + (($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a + 1]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
            $arp1__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp1__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 9
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := $arp1__max_note
        %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := $arp1__min_note
        $arp1__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp1__loop_buffer[0] := %arp1__ordered[0]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[1] := %arp1__ordered[2]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[2] := %arp1__ordered[1]
            %arp1__loop_buffer[3] := %arp1__ordered[2]
            $arp1__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp1__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a * 2] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
              %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a + 2]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + (($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 3]
              %arp1__loop_buffer[(($arp1__a * 2) + (($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - $arp1__a) - 2]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
            $arp1__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp1__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 10 to 13
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while(($arp1__a * 2) < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a * 2] := %arp1__ordered[($arp1__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp1__a]
        %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__a * 2) + 1] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      if(($arp1__note_order = 11) or ($arp1__note_order = 13))
        $arp1__a := 0
        while($arp1__a < $arp1__loop_cursor) 
          %arp1__help_buffer[($arp1__loop_cursor - $arp1__a) - 1] := %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a]
          inc($arp1__a)
        end while
        $arp1__a := 0
        while($arp1__a < $arp1__loop_cursor) 
          %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__help_buffer[$arp1__a]
          inc($arp1__a)
        end while
      end if
      if((($arp1__note_order = 12) or ($arp1__note_order = 13)) and ($arp1__selected_cursor > 2))
        select($arp1__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp1__a := 0
            while($arp1__a < ($arp1__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a + $arp1__selected_cursor] := %arp1__loop_buffer[($arp1__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp1__a]
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
            $arp1__loop_cursor := ($arp1__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
        end select
      end if
    case 14
      $arp1__loop_cursor := $arp1__selected_cursor
      $arp1__a := 0
      while($arp1__a < $arp1__selected_cursor) 
        %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__a] := %arp1__ordered[$arp1__a]
        inc($arp1__a)
      end while
  end select
end function
function run_arp1
  $arp1__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($arp1__latch_mode # 0)) 
    $arp1__a := 0
    if($arp1__cursor # 0)
      call arp1_sort_fill_buffer
    end if
    if($arp1__bar_reset_active # 0)
      if($arp1__bar_count >= $arp1__bar_limit)
        $arp1__aa := 0
        $arp1__bar_count := 0
        $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
        $arp1__n := 0
        $arp1__s := 0
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 8) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $arp1__i := 0
      while($arp1__i <= 31) 
        %arp1__rhythm_indicator[$arp1__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp1__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($arp1__i)
      end while
      %arp1__rhythm_indicator[$arp1__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp1__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if(%arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step] # 0)
      if($arp1__loop_cursor # 0)
        if($arp1__note_order = 14)
          $s := 0
          while($s <= $arp1__i) 
            note_off(%arp1__chord_buffer[$s])
            %arp1__chord_last_notes[$s] := -1
            inc($s)
          end while
          $arp1__i := 0
          while($arp1__i < $arp1__loop_cursor) 
            if(%arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step] # 0)
              $arp1__velo := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step]
            end if
            if($arp1__velo > 127)
              $arp1__velo := 127
            end if
            if($arp1__velo < 1)
              $arp1__velo := 1
            end if
            $arp1__note := %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__i]
            $arp1__note := $arp1__note + ($arp1__oct_cursor * 12)
            $arp1__note := $arp1__note + $arp1__transpose
            if($arp1__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
              $arp1__a := 0
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i] := $arp1__note_to_engine
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp1__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
                $arp1__a := 1
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                  $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                  if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i] := $arp1__note_to_engine
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp1__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                  $arp1__a := 2
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                    if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i] := $arp1__note_to_engine
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                else
                  if($arp1__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                    $arp1__a := 3
                    if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                      $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                      if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                        $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                      else
                        if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                          $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                        end if
                      end if
                      $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                      %arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i] := $arp1__note_to_engine
                      $engine0 := 1
                      $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                      $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                      call _allow_groups
                    end if
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            if(%arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i] # -1)
              if(in_range(%arp1__chord_last_notes[$arp1__i], 24, 60))
                if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
                  %midi_ids[$arp1__a] := mf_insert_event($arp1__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo)
                  mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp1__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp1__mf_length)
                  %midi_pos[$arp1__a] := %midi_pos[$arp1__a] + 1
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %arp1__chord_buffer[$arp1__i] := $arp1__note_id
            inc($arp1__i)
          end while
          if($arp1__note_repeat = 0)
            $arp1__aa := $arp1__loop_cursor
          else
            inc($arp1__aa)
            if($arp1__aa > $arp1__note_repeat)
              $arp1__aa := 0
              if($arp1__octave > 0)
                inc($arp1__oct_cursor)
                if($arp1__oct_cursor > $arp1__octave)
                  $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
              if($arp1__octave < 0)
                dec($arp1__oct_cursor)
                if($arp1__oct_cursor < $arp1__octave)
                  $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        else
          if(%arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step] # 0)
            $arp1__velo := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step]
          end if
          if($arp1__velo > 127)
            $arp1__velo := 127
          end if
          if($arp1__velo < 1)
            $arp1__velo := 1
          end if
          if($arp1__note_repeat # 0)
            $arp1__note := %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__s]
            inc($arp1__n)
            if($arp1__n > $arp1__repeat_max)
              $arp1__n := 0
              inc($arp1__s)
              $arp1__aa := $arp1__s
            end if
          else
            $arp1__note := %arp1__loop_buffer[$arp1__aa]
            inc($arp1__aa)
          end if
          $arp1__note := $arp1__note + ($arp1__oct_cursor * 12)
          $arp1__note := $arp1__note + $arp1__transpose
          $arp1__a := 0
          while($arp1__a <= (num_elements(%arp1__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
            if(%arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] # -1)
              note_off(%arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a])
              %arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] := -1
            end if
            inc($arp1__a)
          end while
          if($arp1__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
            $arp1__a := 0
            if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
              $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
              if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
              else
                if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                  $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                end if
              end if
              $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
              %arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] := $arp1__note_id
              $engine0 := 1
              $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
              $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
              call _allow_groups
            end if
          else
            if($arp1__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
              $arp1__a := 1
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] := $arp1__note_id
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp1__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                $arp1__a := 2
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                  $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                  if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] := $arp1__note_id
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp1__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                  $arp1__a := 3
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp1__a] > 0)
                    $arp1__note_to_engine := $arp1__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp1__a] * 12)
                    if($arp1__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp1__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp1__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp1__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp1__note_id := play_note($arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp1__last_note_ids[$arp1__a] := $arp1__note_id
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp1__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          if(in_range($arp1__note_to_engine, 24, 60))
            if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
              %midi_ids[$arp1__a] := mf_insert_event($arp1__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp1__note_to_engine, $arp1__velo)
              mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp1__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp1__mf_length)
              %midi_pos[$arp1__a] := %midi_pos[$arp1__a] + 1
            end if
          end if
          if($arp1__s >= $arp1__loop_cursor)
            $arp1__s := 0
            $arp1__aa := 0
            if($arp1__octave > 0)
              inc($arp1__oct_cursor)
              if($arp1__oct_cursor > $arp1__octave)
                $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
            if($arp1__octave < 0)
              dec($arp1__oct_cursor)
              if($arp1__oct_cursor < $arp1__octave)
                $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(%arp1__rhythm_playback[$arp1__act_step] = 0)
        if($arp1__rhythm_skip = 1)
          if($arp1__note_repeat # 0)
            if($arp1__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp1__n)
              if($arp1__n < 0)
                $arp1__n := 0
              end if
            end if
          else
            if($arp1__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp1__aa)
            end if
            if($arp1__aa < 0)
              $arp1__aa := 0
            end if
          end if
        else
          if($arp1__note_repeat # 0)
            inc($arp1__n)
            if($arp1__note_order = 14)
              inc($arp1__aa)
            end if
          else
            inc($arp1__aa)
          end if
        end if
        if($arp1__note_order # 14)
          if($arp1__n > $arp1__repeat_max)
            $arp1__n := 0
            $arp1__aa := $arp1__s
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($arp1__bar_reset_active # 0)
      inc($arp1__bar_count)
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $arp1__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~arp1__real_hold * int_to_real($arp1__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__real_hold) * int_to_real($arp1__act_step + 1)))
    if($arp1__act_step = 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    end if
    if($arp1__indicator_hold > $arp1__t)
      $arp1__t := $arp1__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__real_hold))
    end if
    if($arp1__note_repeat = 0)
      if($arp1__aa >= $arp1__loop_cursor)
        $arp1__aa := 0
        if($arp1__octave > 0)
          inc($arp1__oct_cursor)
          if($arp1__oct_cursor > $arp1__octave)
            $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
        if($arp1__octave < 0)
          dec($arp1__oct_cursor)
          if($arp1__oct_cursor < $arp1__octave)
            $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($arp1__act_step)
    if($arp1__act_step >= $arp1__steps)
      $arp1__act_step := 0
      $arp1__t := 0
    end if
    select($arp1__rate)
      case 0
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $arp1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if(($arp1__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
      $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length + (($arp1__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    else
      $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length + (($arp1__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    end if
    inc($arp1__swing_cursor)
    if($arp1__humanize_hold > 0)
      $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length - $arp1__humanize_hold
    else
      if($arp1__humanize_hold < 0)
        $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length + $arp1__humanize_hold
      end if
    end if
    $arp1__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
    $arp1__step_length := $arp1__step_length + $arp1__humanize_hold
    if($arp1__cursor # 0)
      wait($arp1__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_arp2_note_selection
  $idx20 := 0
  $hold20 := 0
  while($hold20 <= ($arp2__cursor - 1)) 
    %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$hold20] := %arp2__note_buffer[$hold20]
    inc($hold20)
  end while
  if(($arp2__note_selection # 0) and ($arp2__cursor # 0))
    sort(%arp2__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($arp2__note_selection_hold)
      case 1
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__cursor - 1]
        $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $idx20 := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__cursor - 1]
        if($arp2__cursor > 1)
          if($arp2__cursor = 2)
            %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $idx20
          else
            %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $arp2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__cursor / 2]
        $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp2__cursor > 1)
          %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp2__cursor = 2)
          %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($arp2__cursor > 2)
            %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $arp2__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($arp2__cursor = 1)
              $arp2__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($arp2__note_selection = 0) and ($arp2__cursor # 0))
      $arp2__selected_cursor := $arp2__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function arp2_sort_fill_buffer
  call set_arp2_note_selection
  while($arp2__a < 128) 
    if($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor)
      %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a] := %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__a]
    else
      %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a] := 0
      %arp2__selected_notes_buffer[$arp2__a] := 0
    end if
    inc($arp2__a)
  end while
  sort(%arp2__ordered, 1)
  $arp2__min_note := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__selected_cursor - 1]
  $arp2__max_note := %arp2__ordered[0]
  select($arp2__note_order)
    case 2
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
    case 3
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
    case 4
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp2__loop_cursor := ($arp2__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a + $arp2__selected_cursor] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a + 1]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 5
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp2__loop_cursor := ($arp2__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a + $arp2__selected_cursor] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp2__a]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 6
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := $arp2__max_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := %arp2__ordered[2]
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := %arp2__ordered[0]
        %arp2__loop_buffer[2] := %arp2__ordered[1]
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp2__a := 0
        while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a * 2] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 1]
          %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 3]
          inc($arp2__a)
        end while
        $arp2__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp2__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 7
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__max_note
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := %arp2__ordered[0]
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := %arp2__ordered[2]
        %arp2__loop_buffer[2] := %arp2__ordered[1]
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp2__a := 0
        while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a * 2] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
          %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a + 2]
          inc($arp2__a)
        end while
        $arp2__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp2__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 8
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := $arp2__max_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := %arp2__ordered[2]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := %arp2__ordered[0]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[2] := %arp2__ordered[1]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[3] := %arp2__ordered[0]
            $arp2__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a * 2] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 1]
              %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 3]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + (($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a + 2]
              %arp2__loop_buffer[(($arp2__a * 2) + (($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a + 1]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
            $arp2__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp2__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 9
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := $arp2__max_note
        %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := $arp2__min_note
        $arp2__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp2__loop_buffer[0] := %arp2__ordered[0]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[1] := %arp2__ordered[2]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[2] := %arp2__ordered[1]
            %arp2__loop_buffer[3] := %arp2__ordered[2]
            $arp2__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp2__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a * 2] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
              %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a + 2]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + (($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 3]
              %arp2__loop_buffer[(($arp2__a * 2) + (($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - $arp2__a) - 2]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
            $arp2__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp2__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 10 to 13
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while(($arp2__a * 2) < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a * 2] := %arp2__ordered[($arp2__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp2__a]
        %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__a * 2) + 1] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      if(($arp2__note_order = 11) or ($arp2__note_order = 13))
        $arp2__a := 0
        while($arp2__a < $arp2__loop_cursor) 
          %arp2__help_buffer[($arp2__loop_cursor - $arp2__a) - 1] := %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a]
          inc($arp2__a)
        end while
        $arp2__a := 0
        while($arp2__a < $arp2__loop_cursor) 
          %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__help_buffer[$arp2__a]
          inc($arp2__a)
        end while
      end if
      if((($arp2__note_order = 12) or ($arp2__note_order = 13)) and ($arp2__selected_cursor > 2))
        select($arp2__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp2__a := 0
            while($arp2__a < ($arp2__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a + $arp2__selected_cursor] := %arp2__loop_buffer[($arp2__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp2__a]
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
            $arp2__loop_cursor := ($arp2__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
        end select
      end if
    case 14
      $arp2__loop_cursor := $arp2__selected_cursor
      $arp2__a := 0
      while($arp2__a < $arp2__selected_cursor) 
        %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__a] := %arp2__ordered[$arp2__a]
        inc($arp2__a)
      end while
  end select
end function
function run_arp2
  $arp2__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($arp2__latch_mode # 0)) 
    $arp2__a := 0
    if($arp2__cursor # 0)
      call arp2_sort_fill_buffer
    end if
    if($arp2__bar_reset_active # 0)
      if($arp2__bar_count >= $arp2__bar_limit)
        $arp2__aa := 0
        $arp2__bar_count := 0
        $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
        $arp2__n := 0
        $arp2__s := 0
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 9) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $arp2__i := 0
      while($arp2__i <= 31) 
        %arp2__rhythm_indicator[$arp2__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp2__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($arp2__i)
      end while
      %arp2__rhythm_indicator[$arp2__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp2__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if(%arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step] # 0)
      if($arp2__loop_cursor # 0)
        if($arp2__note_order = 14)
          $s := 0
          while($s <= $arp2__i) 
            note_off(%arp2__chord_buffer[$s])
            %arp2__chord_last_notes[$s] := -1
            inc($s)
          end while
          $arp2__i := 0
          while($arp2__i < $arp2__loop_cursor) 
            if(%arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step] # 0)
              $arp2__velo := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step]
            end if
            if($arp2__velo > 127)
              $arp2__velo := 127
            end if
            if($arp2__velo < 1)
              $arp2__velo := 1
            end if
            $arp2__note := %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__i]
            $arp2__note := $arp2__note + ($arp2__oct_cursor * 12)
            $arp2__note := $arp2__note + $arp2__transpose
            if($arp2__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
              $arp2__a := 0
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i] := $arp2__note_to_engine
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp2__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
                $arp2__a := 1
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                  $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                  if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i] := $arp2__note_to_engine
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp2__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                  $arp2__a := 2
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                    if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i] := $arp2__note_to_engine
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                else
                  if($arp2__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                    $arp2__a := 3
                    if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                      $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                      if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                        $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                      else
                        if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                          $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                        end if
                      end if
                      $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                      %arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i] := $arp2__note_to_engine
                      $engine0 := 1
                      $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                      $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                      call _allow_groups
                    end if
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            if(%arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i] # -1)
              if(in_range(%arp2__chord_last_notes[$arp2__i], 24, 60))
                if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
                  %midi_ids[$arp2__a] := mf_insert_event($arp2__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo)
                  mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp2__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp2__mf_length)
                  %midi_pos[$arp2__a] := %midi_pos[$arp2__a] + 1
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %arp2__chord_buffer[$arp2__i] := $arp2__note_id
            inc($arp2__i)
          end while
          if($arp2__note_repeat = 0)
            $arp2__aa := $arp2__loop_cursor
          else
            inc($arp2__aa)
            if($arp2__aa > $arp2__note_repeat)
              $arp2__aa := 0
              if($arp2__octave > 0)
                inc($arp2__oct_cursor)
                if($arp2__oct_cursor > $arp2__octave)
                  $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
              if($arp2__octave < 0)
                dec($arp2__oct_cursor)
                if($arp2__oct_cursor < $arp2__octave)
                  $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        else
          if(%arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step] # 0)
            $arp2__velo := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step]
          end if
          if($arp2__velo > 127)
            $arp2__velo := 127
          end if
          if($arp2__velo < 1)
            $arp2__velo := 1
          end if
          if($arp2__note_repeat # 0)
            $arp2__note := %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__s]
            inc($arp2__n)
            if($arp2__n > $arp2__repeat_max)
              $arp2__n := 0
              inc($arp2__s)
              $arp2__aa := $arp2__s
            end if
          else
            $arp2__note := %arp2__loop_buffer[$arp2__aa]
            inc($arp2__aa)
          end if
          $arp2__note := $arp2__note + ($arp2__oct_cursor * 12)
          $arp2__note := $arp2__note + $arp2__transpose
          $arp2__a := 0
          while($arp2__a <= (num_elements(%arp2__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
            if(%arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] # -1)
              note_off(%arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a])
              %arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] := -1
            end if
            inc($arp2__a)
          end while
          if($arp2__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
            $arp2__a := 0
            if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
              $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
              if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
              else
                if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                  $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                end if
              end if
              $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
              %arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] := $arp2__note_id
              $engine0 := 1
              $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
              $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
              call _allow_groups
            end if
          else
            if($arp2__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
              $arp2__a := 1
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] := $arp2__note_id
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp2__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                $arp2__a := 2
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                  $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                  if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] := $arp2__note_id
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp2__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                  $arp2__a := 3
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp2__a] > 0)
                    $arp2__note_to_engine := $arp2__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp2__a] * 12)
                    if($arp2__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp2__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp2__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp2__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp2__note_id := play_note($arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp2__last_note_ids[$arp2__a] := $arp2__note_id
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp2__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          if(in_range($arp2__note_to_engine, 24, 60))
            if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
              %midi_ids[$arp2__a] := mf_insert_event($arp2__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp2__note_to_engine, $arp2__velo)
              mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp2__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp2__mf_length)
              %midi_pos[$arp2__a] := %midi_pos[$arp2__a] + 1
            end if
          end if
          if($arp2__s >= $arp2__loop_cursor)
            $arp2__s := 0
            $arp2__aa := 0
            if($arp2__octave > 0)
              inc($arp2__oct_cursor)
              if($arp2__oct_cursor > $arp2__octave)
                $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
            if($arp2__octave < 0)
              dec($arp2__oct_cursor)
              if($arp2__oct_cursor < $arp2__octave)
                $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(%arp2__rhythm_playback[$arp2__act_step] = 0)
        if($arp2__rhythm_skip = 1)
          if($arp2__note_repeat # 0)
            if($arp2__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp2__n)
              if($arp2__n < 0)
                $arp2__n := 0
              end if
            end if
          else
            if($arp2__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp2__aa)
            end if
            if($arp2__aa < 0)
              $arp2__aa := 0
            end if
          end if
        else
          if($arp2__note_repeat # 0)
            inc($arp2__n)
            if($arp2__note_order = 14)
              inc($arp2__aa)
            end if
          else
            inc($arp2__aa)
          end if
        end if
        if($arp2__note_order # 14)
          if($arp2__n > $arp2__repeat_max)
            $arp2__n := 0
            $arp2__aa := $arp2__s
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($arp2__bar_reset_active # 0)
      inc($arp2__bar_count)
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $arp2__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~arp2__real_hold * int_to_real($arp2__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~arp2__real_hold) * int_to_real($arp2__act_step + 1)))
    if($arp2__act_step = 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    end if
    if($arp2__indicator_hold > $arp2__t)
      $arp2__t := $arp2__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__real_hold))
    end if
    if($arp2__note_repeat = 0)
      if($arp2__aa >= $arp2__loop_cursor)
        $arp2__aa := 0
        if($arp2__octave > 0)
          inc($arp2__oct_cursor)
          if($arp2__oct_cursor > $arp2__octave)
            $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
        if($arp2__octave < 0)
          dec($arp2__oct_cursor)
          if($arp2__oct_cursor < $arp2__octave)
            $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($arp2__act_step)
    if($arp2__act_step >= $arp2__steps)
      $arp2__act_step := 0
      $arp2__t := 0
    end if
    select($arp2__rate)
      case 0
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $arp2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if(($arp2__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
      $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length + (($arp2__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    else
      $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length + (($arp2__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    end if
    inc($arp2__swing_cursor)
    if($arp2__humanize_hold > 0)
      $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length - $arp2__humanize_hold
    else
      if($arp2__humanize_hold < 0)
        $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length + $arp2__humanize_hold
      end if
    end if
    $arp2__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
    $arp2__step_length := $arp2__step_length + $arp2__humanize_hold
    if($arp2__cursor # 0)
      wait($arp2__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_arp3_note_selection
  $v10 := 0
  $n140 := 0
  while($n140 <= ($arp3__cursor - 1)) 
    %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$n140] := %arp3__note_buffer[$n140]
    inc($n140)
  end while
  if(($arp3__note_selection # 0) and ($arp3__cursor # 0))
    sort(%arp3__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($arp3__note_selection_hold)
      case 1
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__cursor - 1]
        $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $v10 := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__cursor - 1]
        if($arp3__cursor > 1)
          if($arp3__cursor = 2)
            %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $v10
          else
            %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $arp3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__cursor / 2]
        $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp3__cursor > 1)
          %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp3__cursor = 2)
          %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($arp3__cursor > 2)
            %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $arp3__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($arp3__cursor = 1)
              $arp3__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($arp3__note_selection = 0) and ($arp3__cursor # 0))
      $arp3__selected_cursor := $arp3__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function arp3_sort_fill_buffer
  call set_arp3_note_selection
  while($arp3__a < 128) 
    if($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor)
      %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a] := %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__a]
    else
      %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a] := 0
      %arp3__selected_notes_buffer[$arp3__a] := 0
    end if
    inc($arp3__a)
  end while
  sort(%arp3__ordered, 1)
  $arp3__min_note := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__selected_cursor - 1]
  $arp3__max_note := %arp3__ordered[0]
  select($arp3__note_order)
    case 2
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
    case 3
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
    case 4
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp3__loop_cursor := ($arp3__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a + $arp3__selected_cursor] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a + 1]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 5
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp3__loop_cursor := ($arp3__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a + $arp3__selected_cursor] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp3__a]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 6
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := $arp3__max_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := %arp3__ordered[2]
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := %arp3__ordered[0]
        %arp3__loop_buffer[2] := %arp3__ordered[1]
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp3__a := 0
        while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a * 2] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 1]
          %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 3]
          inc($arp3__a)
        end while
        $arp3__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp3__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 7
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__max_note
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := %arp3__ordered[0]
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := %arp3__ordered[2]
        %arp3__loop_buffer[2] := %arp3__ordered[1]
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp3__a := 0
        while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a * 2] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
          %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a + 2]
          inc($arp3__a)
        end while
        $arp3__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp3__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 8
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := $arp3__max_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := %arp3__ordered[2]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := %arp3__ordered[0]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[2] := %arp3__ordered[1]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[3] := %arp3__ordered[0]
            $arp3__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a * 2] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 1]
              %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 3]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + (($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a + 2]
              %arp3__loop_buffer[(($arp3__a * 2) + (($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a + 1]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
            $arp3__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp3__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 9
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := $arp3__max_note
        %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := $arp3__min_note
        $arp3__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp3__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp3__loop_buffer[0] := %arp3__ordered[0]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[1] := %arp3__ordered[2]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[2] := %arp3__ordered[1]
            %arp3__loop_buffer[3] := %arp3__ordered[2]
            $arp3__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
