      if($arp3__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a * 2] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
              %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a + 2]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + (($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 3]
              %arp3__loop_buffer[(($arp3__a * 2) + (($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - $arp3__a) - 2]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
            $arp3__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp3__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 10 to 13
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while(($arp3__a * 2) < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a * 2] := %arp3__ordered[($arp3__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp3__a]
        %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__a * 2) + 1] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      if(($arp3__note_order = 11) or ($arp3__note_order = 13))
        $arp3__a := 0
        while($arp3__a < $arp3__loop_cursor) 
          %arp3__help_buffer[($arp3__loop_cursor - $arp3__a) - 1] := %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a]
          inc($arp3__a)
        end while
        $arp3__a := 0
        while($arp3__a < $arp3__loop_cursor) 
          %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__help_buffer[$arp3__a]
          inc($arp3__a)
        end while
      end if
      if((($arp3__note_order = 12) or ($arp3__note_order = 13)) and ($arp3__selected_cursor > 2))
        select($arp3__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp3__a := 0
            while($arp3__a < ($arp3__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a + $arp3__selected_cursor] := %arp3__loop_buffer[($arp3__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp3__a]
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
            $arp3__loop_cursor := ($arp3__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
        end select
      end if
    case 14
      $arp3__loop_cursor := $arp3__selected_cursor
      $arp3__a := 0
      while($arp3__a < $arp3__selected_cursor) 
        %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__a] := %arp3__ordered[$arp3__a]
        inc($arp3__a)
      end while
  end select
end function
function run_arp3
  $arp3__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($arp3__latch_mode # 0)) 
    $arp3__a := 0
    if($arp3__cursor # 0)
      call arp3_sort_fill_buffer
    end if
    if($arp3__bar_reset_active # 0)
      if($arp3__bar_count >= $arp3__bar_limit)
        $arp3__aa := 0
        $arp3__bar_count := 0
        $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
        $arp3__n := 0
        $arp3__s := 0
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 10) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $arp3__i := 0
      while($arp3__i <= 31) 
        %arp3__rhythm_indicator[$arp3__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp3__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($arp3__i)
      end while
      %arp3__rhythm_indicator[$arp3__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp3__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if(%arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step] # 0)
      if($arp3__loop_cursor # 0)
        if($arp3__note_order = 14)
          $s := 0
          while($s <= $arp3__i) 
            note_off(%arp3__chord_buffer[$s])
            %arp3__chord_last_notes[$s] := -1
            inc($s)
          end while
          $arp3__i := 0
          while($arp3__i < $arp3__loop_cursor) 
            if(%arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step] # 0)
              $arp3__velo := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step]
            end if
            if($arp3__velo > 127)
              $arp3__velo := 127
            end if
            if($arp3__velo < 1)
              $arp3__velo := 1
            end if
            $arp3__note := %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__i]
            $arp3__note := $arp3__note + ($arp3__oct_cursor * 12)
            $arp3__note := $arp3__note + $arp3__transpose
            if($arp3__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
              $arp3__a := 0
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i] := $arp3__note_to_engine
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp3__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
                $arp3__a := 1
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                  $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                  if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i] := $arp3__note_to_engine
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp3__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                  $arp3__a := 2
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                    if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i] := $arp3__note_to_engine
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                else
                  if($arp3__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                    $arp3__a := 3
                    if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                      $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                      if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                        $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                      else
                        if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                          $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                        end if
                      end if
                      $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                      %arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i] := $arp3__note_to_engine
                      $engine0 := 1
                      $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                      $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                      call _allow_groups
                    end if
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            if(%arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i] # -1)
              if(in_range(%arp3__chord_last_notes[$arp3__i], 24, 60))
                if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
                  %midi_ids[$arp3__a] := mf_insert_event($arp3__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo)
                  mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp3__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp3__mf_length)
                  %midi_pos[$arp3__a] := %midi_pos[$arp3__a] + 1
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %arp3__chord_buffer[$arp3__i] := $arp3__note_id
            inc($arp3__i)
          end while
          if($arp3__note_repeat = 0)
            $arp3__aa := $arp3__loop_cursor
          else
            inc($arp3__aa)
            if($arp3__aa > $arp3__note_repeat)
              $arp3__aa := 0
              if($arp3__octave > 0)
                inc($arp3__oct_cursor)
                if($arp3__oct_cursor > $arp3__octave)
                  $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
              if($arp3__octave < 0)
                dec($arp3__oct_cursor)
                if($arp3__oct_cursor < $arp3__octave)
                  $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        else
          if(%arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step] # 0)
            $arp3__velo := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step]
          end if
          if($arp3__velo > 127)
            $arp3__velo := 127
          end if
          if($arp3__velo < 1)
            $arp3__velo := 1
          end if
          if($arp3__note_repeat # 0)
            $arp3__note := %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__s]
            inc($arp3__n)
            if($arp3__n > $arp3__repeat_max)
              $arp3__n := 0
              inc($arp3__s)
              $arp3__aa := $arp3__s
            end if
          else
            $arp3__note := %arp3__loop_buffer[$arp3__aa]
            inc($arp3__aa)
          end if
          $arp3__note := $arp3__note + ($arp3__oct_cursor * 12)
          $arp3__note := $arp3__note + $arp3__transpose
          $arp3__a := 0
          while($arp3__a <= (num_elements(%arp3__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
            if(%arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] # -1)
              note_off(%arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a])
              %arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] := -1
            end if
            inc($arp3__a)
          end while
          if($arp3__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
            $arp3__a := 0
            if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
              $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
              if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
              else
                if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                  $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                end if
              end if
              $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
              %arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] := $arp3__note_id
              $engine0 := 1
              $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
              $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
              call _allow_groups
            end if
          else
            if($arp3__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
              $arp3__a := 1
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] := $arp3__note_id
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp3__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                $arp3__a := 2
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                  $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                  if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] := $arp3__note_id
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp3__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                  $arp3__a := 3
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp3__a] > 0)
                    $arp3__note_to_engine := $arp3__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp3__a] * 12)
                    if($arp3__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp3__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp3__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp3__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp3__note_id := play_note($arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp3__last_note_ids[$arp3__a] := $arp3__note_id
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp3__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          if(in_range($arp3__note_to_engine, 24, 60))
            if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
              %midi_ids[$arp3__a] := mf_insert_event($arp3__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp3__note_to_engine, $arp3__velo)
              mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp3__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp3__mf_length)
              %midi_pos[$arp3__a] := %midi_pos[$arp3__a] + 1
            end if
          end if
          if($arp3__s >= $arp3__loop_cursor)
            $arp3__s := 0
            $arp3__aa := 0
            if($arp3__octave > 0)
              inc($arp3__oct_cursor)
              if($arp3__oct_cursor > $arp3__octave)
                $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
            if($arp3__octave < 0)
              dec($arp3__oct_cursor)
              if($arp3__oct_cursor < $arp3__octave)
                $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(%arp3__rhythm_playback[$arp3__act_step] = 0)
        if($arp3__rhythm_skip = 1)
          if($arp3__note_repeat # 0)
            if($arp3__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp3__n)
              if($arp3__n < 0)
                $arp3__n := 0
              end if
            end if
          else
            if($arp3__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp3__aa)
            end if
            if($arp3__aa < 0)
              $arp3__aa := 0
            end if
          end if
        else
          if($arp3__note_repeat # 0)
            inc($arp3__n)
            if($arp3__note_order = 14)
              inc($arp3__aa)
            end if
          else
            inc($arp3__aa)
          end if
        end if
        if($arp3__note_order # 14)
          if($arp3__n > $arp3__repeat_max)
            $arp3__n := 0
            $arp3__aa := $arp3__s
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($arp3__bar_reset_active # 0)
      inc($arp3__bar_count)
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $arp3__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~arp3__real_hold * int_to_real($arp3__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~arp3__real_hold) * int_to_real($arp3__act_step + 1)))
    if($arp3__act_step = 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    end if
    if($arp3__indicator_hold > $arp3__t)
      $arp3__t := $arp3__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__real_hold))
    end if
    if($arp3__note_repeat = 0)
      if($arp3__aa >= $arp3__loop_cursor)
        $arp3__aa := 0
        if($arp3__octave > 0)
          inc($arp3__oct_cursor)
          if($arp3__oct_cursor > $arp3__octave)
            $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
        if($arp3__octave < 0)
          dec($arp3__oct_cursor)
          if($arp3__oct_cursor < $arp3__octave)
            $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($arp3__act_step)
    if($arp3__act_step >= $arp3__steps)
      $arp3__act_step := 0
      $arp3__t := 0
    end if
    select($arp3__rate)
      case 0
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $arp3__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if(($arp3__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
      $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length + (($arp3__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    else
      $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length + (($arp3__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    end if
    inc($arp3__swing_cursor)
    if($arp3__humanize_hold > 0)
      $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length - $arp3__humanize_hold
    else
      if($arp3__humanize_hold < 0)
        $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length + $arp3__humanize_hold
      end if
    end if
    $arp3__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
    $arp3__step_length := $arp3__step_length + $arp3__humanize_hold
    if($arp3__cursor # 0)
      wait($arp3__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_arp4_note_selection
  $idx20 := 0
  $hold20 := 0
  while($hold20 <= ($arp4__cursor - 1)) 
    %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$hold20] := %arp4__note_buffer[$hold20]
    inc($hold20)
  end while
  if(($arp4__note_selection # 0) and ($arp4__cursor # 0))
    sort(%arp4__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($arp4__note_selection_hold)
      case 1
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__cursor - 1]
        $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $idx20 := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__cursor - 1]
        if($arp4__cursor > 1)
          if($arp4__cursor = 2)
            %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $idx20
          else
            %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $arp4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__cursor / 2]
        $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp4__cursor > 1)
          %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($arp4__cursor = 2)
          %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $arp4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($arp4__cursor > 2)
            %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $arp4__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($arp4__cursor = 1)
              $arp4__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($arp4__note_selection = 0) and ($arp4__cursor # 0))
      $arp4__selected_cursor := $arp4__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function arp4_sort_fill_buffer
  call set_arp4_note_selection
  while($arp4__a < 128) 
    if($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor)
      %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a] := %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__a]
    else
      %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a] := 0
      %arp4__selected_notes_buffer[$arp4__a] := 0
    end if
    inc($arp4__a)
  end while
  sort(%arp4__ordered, 1)
  $arp4__min_note := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__selected_cursor - 1]
  $arp4__max_note := %arp4__ordered[0]
  select($arp4__note_order)
    case 2
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
    case 3
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
    case 4
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp4__loop_cursor := ($arp4__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a + $arp4__selected_cursor] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a + 1]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 5
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 2)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp4__loop_cursor := ($arp4__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a + $arp4__selected_cursor] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp4__a]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
        end select
      end if
    case 6
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := $arp4__max_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := %arp4__ordered[2]
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := %arp4__ordered[0]
        %arp4__loop_buffer[2] := %arp4__ordered[1]
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp4__a := 0
        while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a * 2] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 1]
          %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 3]
          inc($arp4__a)
        end while
        $arp4__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp4__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 7
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__max_note
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 3)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := %arp4__ordered[0]
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := %arp4__ordered[2]
        %arp4__loop_buffer[2] := %arp4__ordered[1]
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 3
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 3)
        $arp4__a := 0
        while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
          %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a * 2] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
          %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a + 2]
          inc($arp4__a)
        end while
        $arp4__loop_cursor := (2 * $arp4__selected_cursor) - 4
      end if
    case 8
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := $arp4__max_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := %arp4__ordered[2]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := %arp4__ordered[0]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[2] := %arp4__ordered[1]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[3] := %arp4__ordered[0]
            $arp4__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a * 2] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 1]
              %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 3]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + (($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a + 2]
              %arp4__loop_buffer[(($arp4__a * 2) + (($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a + 1]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
            $arp4__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp4__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 9
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 1)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 1
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 2)
        %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := $arp4__max_note
        %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := $arp4__min_note
        $arp4__loop_cursor := 2
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor = 3)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            %arp4__loop_buffer[0] := %arp4__ordered[0]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[1] := %arp4__ordered[2]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[2] := %arp4__ordered[1]
            %arp4__loop_buffer[3] := %arp4__ordered[2]
            $arp4__loop_cursor := 4
        end select
      end if
      if($arp4__selected_cursor > 3)
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a * 2] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
              %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a + 2]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 3)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + (($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 3]
              %arp4__loop_buffer[(($arp4__a * 2) + (($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) * 2)) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - $arp4__a) - 2]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
            $arp4__loop_cursor := (4 * $arp4__selected_cursor) - 10
        end select
      end if
    case 10 to 13
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while(($arp4__a * 2) < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a * 2] := %arp4__ordered[($arp4__selected_cursor - 1) - $arp4__a]
        %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__a * 2) + 1] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      if(($arp4__note_order = 11) or ($arp4__note_order = 13))
        $arp4__a := 0
        while($arp4__a < $arp4__loop_cursor) 
          %arp4__help_buffer[($arp4__loop_cursor - $arp4__a) - 1] := %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a]
          inc($arp4__a)
        end while
        $arp4__a := 0
        while($arp4__a < $arp4__loop_cursor) 
          %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__help_buffer[$arp4__a]
          inc($arp4__a)
        end while
      end if
      if((($arp4__note_order = 12) or ($arp4__note_order = 13)) and ($arp4__selected_cursor > 2))
        select($arp4__repeat)
          case 1
            $arp4__a := 0
            while($arp4__a < ($arp4__selected_cursor - 2)) 
              %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a + $arp4__selected_cursor] := %arp4__loop_buffer[($arp4__selected_cursor - 2) - $arp4__a]
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
            $arp4__loop_cursor := ($arp4__selected_cursor * 2) - 2
        end select
      end if
    case 14
      $arp4__loop_cursor := $arp4__selected_cursor
      $arp4__a := 0
      while($arp4__a < $arp4__selected_cursor) 
        %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__a] := %arp4__ordered[$arp4__a]
        inc($arp4__a)
      end while
  end select
end function
function run_arp4
  $arp4__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($arp4__latch_mode # 0)) 
    $arp4__a := 0
    if($arp4__cursor # 0)
      call arp4_sort_fill_buffer
    end if
    if($arp4__bar_reset_active # 0)
      if($arp4__bar_count >= $arp4__bar_limit)
        $arp4__aa := 0
        $arp4__bar_count := 0
        $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
        $arp4__n := 0
        $arp4__s := 0
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 11) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $arp4__i := 0
      while($arp4__i <= 31) 
        %arp4__rhythm_indicator[$arp4__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp4__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($arp4__i)
      end while
      %arp4__rhythm_indicator[$arp4__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$arp4__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if(%arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step] # 0)
      if($arp4__loop_cursor # 0)
        if($arp4__note_order = 14)
          $s := 0
          while($s <= $arp4__i) 
            note_off(%arp4__chord_buffer[$s])
            %arp4__chord_last_notes[$s] := -1
            inc($s)
          end while
          $arp4__i := 0
          while($arp4__i < $arp4__loop_cursor) 
            if(%arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step] # 0)
              $arp4__velo := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step]
            end if
            if($arp4__velo > 127)
              $arp4__velo := 127
            end if
            if($arp4__velo < 1)
              $arp4__velo := 1
            end if
            $arp4__note := %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__i]
            $arp4__note := $arp4__note + ($arp4__oct_cursor * 12)
            $arp4__note := $arp4__note + $arp4__transpose
            if($arp4__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
              $arp4__a := 0
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i] := $arp4__note_to_engine
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp4__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
                $arp4__a := 1
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                  $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                  if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i] := $arp4__note_to_engine
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp4__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                  $arp4__a := 2
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                    if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i] := $arp4__note_to_engine
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                else
                  if($arp4__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                    $arp4__a := 3
                    if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                      $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                      if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                        $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                      else
                        if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                          $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                        end if
                      end if
                      $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                      %arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i] := $arp4__note_to_engine
                      $engine0 := 1
                      $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                      $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                      call _allow_groups
                    end if
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
            if(%arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i] # -1)
              if(in_range(%arp4__chord_last_notes[$arp4__i], 24, 60))
                if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
                  %midi_ids[$arp4__a] := mf_insert_event($arp4__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo)
                  mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp4__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp4__mf_length)
                  %midi_pos[$arp4__a] := %midi_pos[$arp4__a] + 1
                end if
              end if
            end if
            %arp4__chord_buffer[$arp4__i] := $arp4__note_id
            inc($arp4__i)
          end while
          if($arp4__note_repeat = 0)
            $arp4__aa := $arp4__loop_cursor
          else
            inc($arp4__aa)
            if($arp4__aa > $arp4__note_repeat)
              $arp4__aa := 0
              if($arp4__octave > 0)
                inc($arp4__oct_cursor)
                if($arp4__oct_cursor > $arp4__octave)
                  $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
              if($arp4__octave < 0)
                dec($arp4__oct_cursor)
                if($arp4__oct_cursor < $arp4__octave)
                  $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        else
          if(%arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step] # 0)
            $arp4__velo := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step]
          end if
          if($arp4__velo > 127)
            $arp4__velo := 127
          end if
          if($arp4__velo < 1)
            $arp4__velo := 1
          end if
          if($arp4__note_repeat # 0)
            $arp4__note := %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__s]
            inc($arp4__n)
            if($arp4__n > $arp4__repeat_max)
              $arp4__n := 0
              inc($arp4__s)
              $arp4__aa := $arp4__s
            end if
          else
            $arp4__note := %arp4__loop_buffer[$arp4__aa]
            inc($arp4__aa)
          end if
          $arp4__note := $arp4__note + ($arp4__oct_cursor * 12)
          $arp4__note := $arp4__note + $arp4__transpose
          $arp4__a := 0
          while($arp4__a <= (num_elements(%arp4__last_note_ids) - 1)) 
            if(%arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] # -1)
              note_off(%arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a])
              %arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] := -1
            end if
            inc($arp4__a)
          end while
          if($arp4__callback_id = $arp1__callback_id)
            $arp4__a := 0
            if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
              $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
              if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
              else
                if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                  $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                end if
              end if
              $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
              %arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] := $arp4__note_id
              $engine0 := 1
              $eventID0 := $arp1__note_id
              $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
              call _allow_groups
            end if
          else
            if($arp4__callback_id = $arp2__callback_id)
              $arp4__a := 1
              if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                  $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                else
                  if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                  end if
                end if
                $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                %arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] := $arp4__note_id
                $engine0 := 1
                $eventID0 := $arp2__note_id
                $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                call _allow_groups
              end if
            else
              if($arp4__callback_id = $arp3__callback_id)
                $arp4__a := 2
                if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                  $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                  if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                  else
                    if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                      $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                    end if
                  end if
                  $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                  %arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] := $arp4__note_id
                  $engine0 := 1
                  $eventID0 := $arp3__note_id
                  $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                  call _allow_groups
                end if
              else
                if($arp4__callback_id = $arp4__callback_id)
                  $arp4__a := 3
                  if(%_assigned_instruments[4 + $arp4__a] > 0)
                    $arp4__note_to_engine := $arp4__note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$arp4__a] * 12)
                    if($arp4__note_to_engine < 0)
                      $arp4__note_to_engine := 0
                    else
                      if($arp4__note_to_engine > 127)
                        $arp4__note_to_engine := 127
                      end if
                    end if
                    $arp4__note_id := play_note($arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo, 0, -1)
                    %arp4__last_note_ids[$arp4__a] := $arp4__note_id
                    $engine0 := 1
                    $eventID0 := $arp4__note_id
                    $slot_count0 := $arp4__a
                    call _allow_groups
                  end if
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          if(in_range($arp4__note_to_engine, 24, 60))
            if($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1)
              %midi_ids[$arp4__a] := mf_insert_event($arp4__a, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $arp4__note_to_engine, $arp4__velo)
              mf_set_event_par(%midi_ids[$arp4__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $arp4__mf_length)
              %midi_pos[$arp4__a] := %midi_pos[$arp4__a] + 1
            end if
          end if
          if($arp4__s >= $arp4__loop_cursor)
            $arp4__s := 0
            $arp4__aa := 0
            if($arp4__octave > 0)
              inc($arp4__oct_cursor)
              if($arp4__oct_cursor > $arp4__octave)
                $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
            if($arp4__octave < 0)
              dec($arp4__oct_cursor)
              if($arp4__oct_cursor < $arp4__octave)
                $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(%arp4__rhythm_playback[$arp4__act_step] = 0)
        if($arp4__rhythm_skip = 1)
          if($arp4__note_repeat # 0)
            if($arp4__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp4__n)
              if($arp4__n < 0)
                $arp4__n := 0
              end if
            end if
          else
            if($arp4__act_step = 0)
              dec($arp4__aa)
            end if
            if($arp4__aa < 0)
              $arp4__aa := 0
            end if
          end if
        else
          if($arp4__note_repeat # 0)
            inc($arp4__n)
            if($arp4__note_order = 14)
              inc($arp4__aa)
            end if
          else
            inc($arp4__aa)
          end if
        end if
        if($arp4__note_order # 14)
          if($arp4__n > $arp4__repeat_max)
            $arp4__n := 0
            $arp4__aa := $arp4__s
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($arp4__bar_reset_active # 0)
      inc($arp4__bar_count)
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $arp4__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~arp4__real_hold * int_to_real($arp4__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~arp4__real_hold) * int_to_real($arp4__act_step + 1)))
    if($arp4__act_step = 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    end if
    if($arp4__indicator_hold > $arp4__t)
      $arp4__t := $arp4__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp4__real_hold))
    end if
    if($arp4__note_repeat = 0)
      if($arp4__aa >= $arp4__loop_cursor)
        $arp4__aa := 0
        if($arp4__octave > 0)
          inc($arp4__oct_cursor)
          if($arp4__oct_cursor > $arp4__octave)
            $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
        if($arp4__octave < 0)
          dec($arp4__oct_cursor)
          if($arp4__oct_cursor < $arp4__octave)
            $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($arp4__act_step)
    if($arp4__act_step >= $arp4__steps)
      $arp4__act_step := 0
      $arp4__t := 0
    end if
    select($arp4__rate)
      case 0
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $arp4__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if(($arp4__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
      $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length + (($arp4__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    else
      $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length + (($arp4__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
    end if
    inc($arp4__swing_cursor)
    if($arp4__humanize_hold > 0)
      $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length - $arp4__humanize_hold
    else
      if($arp4__humanize_hold < 0)
        $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length + $arp4__humanize_hold
      end if
    end if
    $arp4__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
    $arp4__step_length := $arp4__step_length + $arp4__humanize_hold
    if($arp4__cursor # 0)
      wait($arp4__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_env1_note_selection
  $v10 := 0
  $n140 := 0
  while($n140 <= ($env1__cursor - 1)) 
    %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$n140] := %env1__note_buffer[$n140]
    inc($n140)
  end while
  if(($env1__note_selection # 0) and ($env1__cursor # 0))
    sort(%env1__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($env1__note_selection)
      case 1
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__cursor - 1]
        $env1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $v10 := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__cursor - 1]
        if($env1__cursor > 1)
          if($env1__cursor = 2)
            %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $v10
          else
            %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $env1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env1__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__cursor / 2]
        $env1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env1__cursor > 1)
          %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env1__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $env1__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env1__cursor = 2)
          %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env1__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($env1__cursor > 2)
            %env1__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $env1__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($env1__cursor = 1)
              $env1__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($env1__note_selection = 0) and ($env1__cursor # 0))
      $env1__selected_cursor := $env1__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function run_env1
  $env1__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($env1__latch_mode # 0)) 
    call set_env1_note_selection
    if($env1__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      $env1__i := 0
    else
      if($env1__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        $env1__i := 1
      else
        if($env1__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          $env1__i := 2
        else
          if($env1__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            $env1__i := 3
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if(%_assigned_instruments[8 + $env1__i] # 0)
      mf_insert_event($env1__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_CC, $dyn_cc_num, %env1__rhythm_playback[$env1__act_step])
      $env1__a := 0
      while($env1__a <= ($env1__selected_cursor - 1)) 
        $env1__engine_note_hold := %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__a]
        if((%_env1__active_notes[$env1__engine_note_hold] = 1) and (%_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__engine_note_hold] = 0))
          $env1__octaved_note := $env1__engine_note_hold + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$env1__i] * 12)
          if($env1__octaved_note < 0)
            $env1__octaved_note := 0
          else
            if($env1__octaved_note > 127)
              $env1__octaved_note := 127
            end if
          end if
          $env1__note_id := play_note($env1__octaved_note, 50, 0, -1)
          %_env1__current_engine_notes[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__engine_note_hold] := $env1__octaved_note
          %_env1__active_notes[128 + $env1__engine_note_hold] := 1
          %_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__engine_note_hold] := $env1__note_id
          $engine0 := 2
          $eventID0 := $env1__note_id
          $slot_count0 := $env1__i
          call _allow_groups
          %midi_ids[$env1__i] := mf_insert_event($env1__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $env1__octaved_note, 100)
          %_env1__mf_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__engine_note_hold] := %midi_ids[$env1__i]
          %env1__note_entry_time[$env1__engine_note_hold] := $NI_SONG_POSITION
          %midi_pos[$env1__i] := %midi_pos[$env1__i] + 1
        end if
        inc($env1__a)
      end while
    end if
    if($env1__note_selection > 0)
      if($env1__cursor > $env1__selected_cursor)
        $env1__a := 0
        while($env1__a <= 127) 
          if(%_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a] # 0)
            $env1__note_check := 1
            $env1__m := 0
            while($env1__m <= ($env1__selected_cursor - 1)) 
              if($env1__a = %env1__selected_notes_buffer[$env1__m])
                $env1__note_check := 0
              end if
              inc($env1__m)
            end while
            if($env1__note_check = 1)
              mf_set_event_par(%_env1__mf_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env1__note_entry_time[$env1__a])
              note_off(%_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a])
              %_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a] := 0
              %_env1__active_notes[128 + $env1__a] := 0
              %_env1__current_engine_notes[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a] := 0
            end if
          end if
          inc($env1__a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 13) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $env1__i := 0
      while($env1__i <= 99) 
        %env1__rhythm_indicator[$env1__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env1__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($env1__i)
      end while
      %env1__rhythm_indicator[$env1__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env1__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
      $env1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH * $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount
      select($env1__rate)
        case 95
          $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length / 2
        case 97
          $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length * 2
        case 98
          $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length * 3
        case 99
          $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length * 4
      end select
      $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length / 100
    else
      if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
        select($env1__rate)
          case 0
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
          case 1
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
          case 2
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
          case 3
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
          case 4
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
          case 5
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
          case 6
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
          case 7
            $env1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
        end select
      end if
    end if
    if($env1__step_length < 5000)
      $env1__step_length := 5000
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $env1__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env1__real_hold * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env1__real_hold) * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)))
    if($env1__act_step = 0)
      $env1__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env1__real_hold * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env1__real_hold) * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
        if(($env1__act_step mod 2) = 0)
          $env1__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env1__real_hold * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env1__real_hold) * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        end if
      else
        $env1__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env1__real_hold * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env1__real_hold) * int_to_real($env1__act_step + 1)))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      end if
    end if
    if($env1__indicator_hold > $env1__t)
      $env1__t := $env1__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__real_hold))
    end if
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
      if(($env1__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
        $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length + (($env1__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      else
        $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length + (($env1__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      end if
      inc($env1__swing_cursor)
      if($env1__humanize_hold > 0)
        $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length - $env1__humanize_hold
      else
        if($env1__humanize_hold < 0)
          $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length + $env1__humanize_hold
        end if
      end if
      $env1__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
      $env1__step_length := $env1__step_length + $env1__humanize_hold
    end if
    if($env1__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      set_controller(102, %env1__rhythm_playback[$env1__act_step])
    else
      if($env1__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        set_controller(103, %env1__rhythm_playback[$env1__act_step])
      else
        if($env1__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          set_controller(104, %env1__rhythm_playback[$env1__act_step])
        else
          if($env1__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            set_controller(105, %env1__rhythm_playback[$env1__act_step])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($env1__act_step)
    if($env1__act_step >= $env1__steps)
      $env1__act_step := 0
      $env1__t := 0
      if($env1__retrigger = 1)
        $env1__i := 0
        while($env1__i <= 3) 
          $env1__a := 0
          while($env1__a <= 127) 
            if(%_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a] # 0)
              note_off(%_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a])
              %_env1__last_note_ids[($env1__i * 128) + $env1__a] := 0
            end if
            inc($env1__a)
          end while
          inc($env1__i)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if($env1__cursor # 0)
      wait($env1__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_env2_note_selection
  $n140 := 0
  $v10 := 0
  while($v10 <= ($env2__cursor - 1)) 
    %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$v10] := %env2__note_buffer[$v10]
    inc($v10)
  end while
  if(($env2__note_selection # 0) and ($env2__cursor # 0))
    sort(%env2__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($env2__note_selection)
      case 1
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__cursor - 1]
        $env2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $n140 := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__cursor - 1]
        if($env2__cursor > 1)
          if($env2__cursor = 2)
            %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $n140
          else
            %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $env2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env2__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__cursor / 2]
        $env2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env2__cursor > 1)
          %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env2__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $env2__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env2__cursor = 2)
          %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env2__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($env2__cursor > 2)
            %env2__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $env2__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($env2__cursor = 1)
              $env2__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($env2__note_selection = 0) and ($env2__cursor # 0))
      $env2__selected_cursor := $env2__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function run_env2
  $env2__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($env2__latch_mode # 0)) 
    call set_env2_note_selection
    if($env2__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      $env2__i := 0
    else
      if($env2__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        $env2__i := 1
      else
        if($env2__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          $env2__i := 2
        else
          if($env2__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            $env2__i := 3
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if(%_assigned_instruments[8 + $env2__i] # 0)
      mf_insert_event($env2__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_CC, $dyn_cc_num, %env2__rhythm_playback[$env2__act_step])
      $env2__a := 0
      while($env2__a <= ($env2__selected_cursor - 1)) 
        $env2__engine_note_hold := %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__a]
        if((%_env2__active_notes[$env2__engine_note_hold] = 1) and (%_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__engine_note_hold] = 0))
          $env2__octaved_note := $env2__engine_note_hold + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$env2__i] * 12)
          if($env2__octaved_note < 0)
            $env2__octaved_note := 0
          else
            if($env2__octaved_note > 127)
              $env2__octaved_note := 127
            end if
          end if
          $env2__note_id := play_note($env2__octaved_note, 50, 0, -1)
          %_env2__current_engine_notes[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__engine_note_hold] := $env2__octaved_note
          %_env2__active_notes[128 + $env2__engine_note_hold] := 1
          %_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__engine_note_hold] := $env2__note_id
          $engine0 := 2
          $eventID0 := $env2__note_id
          $slot_count0 := $env2__i
          call _allow_groups
          %midi_ids[$env2__i] := mf_insert_event($env2__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $env2__octaved_note, 100)
          %_env2__mf_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__engine_note_hold] := %midi_ids[$env2__i]
          %env2__note_entry_time[$env2__engine_note_hold] := $NI_SONG_POSITION
          %midi_pos[$env2__i] := %midi_pos[$env2__i] + 1
        end if
        inc($env2__a)
      end while
    end if
    if($env2__note_selection > 0)
      if($env2__cursor > $env2__selected_cursor)
        $env2__a := 0
        while($env2__a <= 127) 
          if(%_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a] # 0)
            $env2__note_check := 1
            $env2__m := 0
            while($env2__m <= ($env2__selected_cursor - 1)) 
              if($env2__a = %env2__selected_notes_buffer[$env2__m])
                $env2__note_check := 0
              end if
              inc($env2__m)
            end while
            if($env2__note_check = 1)
              mf_set_event_par(%_env2__mf_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env2__note_entry_time[$env2__a])
              note_off(%_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a])
              %_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a] := 0
              %_env2__active_notes[128 + $env2__a] := 0
              %_env2__current_engine_notes[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a] := 0
            end if
          end if
          inc($env2__a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 14) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $env2__i := 0
      while($env2__i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm_indicator[$env2__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env2__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($env2__i)
      end while
      %env2__rhythm_indicator[$env2__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env2__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
      $env2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH * $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount
      select($env2__rate)
        case 95
          $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length / 2
        case 97
          $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length * 2
        case 98
          $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length * 3
        case 99
          $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length * 4
      end select
      $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length / 100
    else
      if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
        select($env2__rate)
          case 0
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
          case 1
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
          case 2
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
          case 3
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
          case 4
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
          case 5
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
          case 6
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
          case 7
            $env2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
        end select
      end if
    end if
    if($env2__step_length < 5000)
      $env2__step_length := 5000
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $env2__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env2__real_hold * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env2__real_hold) * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)))
    if($env2__act_step = 0)
      $env2__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env2__real_hold * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env2__real_hold) * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
        if(($env2__act_step mod 2) = 0)
          $env2__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env2__real_hold * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env2__real_hold) * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        end if
      else
        $env2__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env2__real_hold * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env2__real_hold) * int_to_real($env2__act_step + 1)))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      end if
    end if
    if($env2__indicator_hold > $env2__t)
      $env2__t := $env2__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__real_hold))
    end if
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
      if(($env2__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
        $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length + (($env2__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      else
        $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length + (($env2__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      end if
      inc($env2__swing_cursor)
      if($env2__humanize_hold > 0)
        $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length - $env2__humanize_hold
      else
        if($env2__humanize_hold < 0)
          $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length + $env2__humanize_hold
        end if
      end if
      $env2__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
      $env2__step_length := $env2__step_length + $env2__humanize_hold
    end if
    if($env2__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      set_controller(102, %env2__rhythm_playback[$env2__act_step])
    else
      if($env2__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        set_controller(103, %env2__rhythm_playback[$env2__act_step])
      else
        if($env2__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          set_controller(104, %env2__rhythm_playback[$env2__act_step])
        else
          if($env2__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            set_controller(105, %env2__rhythm_playback[$env2__act_step])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($env2__act_step)
    if($env2__act_step >= $env2__steps)
      $env2__act_step := 0
      $env2__t := 0
      if($env2__retrigger = 1)
        $env2__i := 0
        while($env2__i <= 3) 
          $env2__a := 0
          while($env2__a <= 127) 
            if(%_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a] # 0)
              note_off(%_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a])
              %_env2__last_note_ids[($env2__i * 128) + $env2__a] := 0
            end if
            inc($env2__a)
          end while
          inc($env2__i)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if($env2__cursor # 0)
      wait($env2__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_env3_note_selection
  $v10 := 0
  $n140 := 0
  while($n140 <= ($env3__cursor - 1)) 
    %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$n140] := %env3__note_buffer[$n140]
    inc($n140)
  end while
  if(($env3__note_selection # 0) and ($env3__cursor # 0))
    sort(%env3__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($env3__note_selection)
      case 1
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__cursor - 1]
        $env3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $v10 := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__cursor - 1]
        if($env3__cursor > 1)
          if($env3__cursor = 2)
            %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $v10
          else
            %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $env3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env3__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__cursor / 2]
        $env3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env3__cursor > 1)
          %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env3__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $env3__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env3__cursor = 2)
          %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env3__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($env3__cursor > 2)
            %env3__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $env3__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($env3__cursor = 1)
              $env3__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($env3__note_selection = 0) and ($env3__cursor # 0))
      $env3__selected_cursor := $env3__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function run_env3
  $env3__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($env3__latch_mode # 0)) 
    call set_env3_note_selection
    if($env3__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      $env3__i := 0
    else
      if($env3__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        $env3__i := 1
      else
        if($env3__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          $env3__i := 2
        else
          if($env3__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            $env3__i := 3
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if(%_assigned_instruments[8 + $env3__i] # 0)
      mf_insert_event($env3__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_CC, $dyn_cc_num, %env3__rhythm_playback[$env3__act_step])
      $env3__a := 0
      while($env3__a <= ($env3__selected_cursor - 1)) 
        $env3__engine_note_hold := %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__a]
        if((%_env3__active_notes[$env3__engine_note_hold] = 1) and (%_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__engine_note_hold] = 0))
          $env3__octaved_note := $env3__engine_note_hold + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$env3__i] * 12)
          if($env3__octaved_note < 0)
            $env3__octaved_note := 0
          else
            if($env3__octaved_note > 127)
              $env3__octaved_note := 127
            end if
          end if
          $env3__note_id := play_note($env3__octaved_note, 50, 0, -1)
          %_env3__current_engine_notes[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__engine_note_hold] := $env3__octaved_note
          %_env3__active_notes[128 + $env3__engine_note_hold] := 1
          %_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__engine_note_hold] := $env3__note_id
          $engine0 := 2
          $eventID0 := $env3__note_id
          $slot_count0 := $env3__i
          call _allow_groups
          %midi_ids[$env3__i] := mf_insert_event($env3__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $env3__octaved_note, 100)
          %_env3__mf_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__engine_note_hold] := %midi_ids[$env3__i]
          %env3__note_entry_time[$env3__engine_note_hold] := $NI_SONG_POSITION
          %midi_pos[$env3__i] := %midi_pos[$env3__i] + 1
        end if
        inc($env3__a)
      end while
    end if
    if($env3__note_selection > 0)
      if($env3__cursor > $env3__selected_cursor)
        $env3__a := 0
        while($env3__a <= 127) 
          if(%_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a] # 0)
            $env3__note_check := 1
            $env3__m := 0
            while($env3__m <= ($env3__selected_cursor - 1)) 
              if($env3__a = %env3__selected_notes_buffer[$env3__m])
                $env3__note_check := 0
              end if
              inc($env3__m)
            end while
            if($env3__note_check = 1)
              mf_set_event_par(%_env3__mf_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env3__note_entry_time[$env3__a])
              note_off(%_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a])
              %_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a] := 0
              %_env3__active_notes[128 + $env3__a] := 0
              %_env3__current_engine_notes[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a] := 0
            end if
          end if
          inc($env3__a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 15) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $env3__i := 0
      while($env3__i <= 99) 
        %env3__rhythm_indicator[$env3__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env3__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($env3__i)
      end while
      %env3__rhythm_indicator[$env3__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env3__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
      $env3__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH * $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount
      select($env3__rate)
        case 95
          $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length / 2
        case 97
          $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length * 2
        case 98
          $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length * 3
        case 99
          $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length * 4
      end select
      $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length / 100
    else
      if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
        select($env3__rate)
          case 0
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
          case 1
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
          case 2
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
          case 3
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
          case 4
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
          case 5
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
          case 6
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
          case 7
            $env3__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
        end select
      end if
    end if
    if($env3__step_length < 5000)
      $env3__step_length := 5000
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $env3__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)))
    if($env3__act_step = 0)
      $env3__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
        if(($env3__act_step mod 2) = 0)
          $env3__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        end if
      else
        $env3__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env3__real_hold * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env3__real_hold) * int_to_real($env3__act_step + 1)))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      end if
    end if
    if($env3__indicator_hold > $env3__t)
      $env3__t := $env3__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__real_hold))
    end if
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
      if(($env3__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
        $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length + (($env3__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      else
        $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length + (($env3__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      end if
      inc($env3__swing_cursor)
      if($env3__humanize_hold > 0)
        $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length - $env3__humanize_hold
      else
