        if($env3__humanize_hold < 0)
          $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length + $env3__humanize_hold
        end if
      end if
      $env3__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
      $env3__step_length := $env3__step_length + $env3__humanize_hold
    end if
    if($env3__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      set_controller(102, %env3__rhythm_playback[$env3__act_step])
    else
      if($env3__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        set_controller(103, %env3__rhythm_playback[$env3__act_step])
      else
        if($env3__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          set_controller(104, %env3__rhythm_playback[$env3__act_step])
        else
          if($env3__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            set_controller(105, %env3__rhythm_playback[$env3__act_step])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($env3__act_step)
    if($env3__act_step >= $env3__steps)
      $env3__act_step := 0
      $env3__t := 0
      if($env3__retrigger = 1)
        $env3__i := 0
        while($env3__i <= 3) 
          $env3__a := 0
          while($env3__a <= 127) 
            if(%_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a] # 0)
              note_off(%_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a])
              %_env3__last_note_ids[($env3__i * 128) + $env3__a] := 0
            end if
            inc($env3__a)
          end while
          inc($env3__i)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if($env3__cursor # 0)
      wait($env3__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_env4_note_selection
  $n140 := 0
  $v10 := 0
  while($v10 <= ($env4__cursor - 1)) 
    %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$v10] := %env4__note_buffer[$v10]
    inc($v10)
  end while
  if(($env4__note_selection # 0) and ($env4__cursor # 0))
    sort(%env4__selected_notes_buffer, 1)
    select($env4__note_selection)
      case 1
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__cursor - 1]
        $env4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 2
        $n140 := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__cursor - 1]
        if($env4__cursor > 1)
          if($env4__cursor = 2)
            %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := $n140
          else
            %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__cursor - 2]
          end if
          $env4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env4__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 3
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__cursor / 2]
        $env4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 4
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env4__cursor > 1)
          %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          $env4__selected_cursor := 1
        end if
      case 5
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        $env4__selected_cursor := 1
      case 6
        %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[0]
        if($env4__cursor = 2)
          %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[1]
          $env4__selected_cursor := 2
        else
          if($env4__cursor > 2)
            %env4__selected_notes_buffer[2] := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[2]
            $env4__selected_cursor := 3
          else
            if($env4__cursor = 1)
              $env4__selected_cursor := 1
            end if
          end if
        end if
    end select
  else
    if(($env4__note_selection = 0) and ($env4__cursor # 0))
      $env4__selected_cursor := $env4__cursor
    end if
  end if
end function
function run_env4
  $env4__callback_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  while(($cursor > 0) and ($env4__latch_mode # 0)) 
    call set_env4_note_selection
    if($env4__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      $env4__i := 0
    else
      if($env4__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        $env4__i := 1
      else
        if($env4__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          $env4__i := 2
        else
          if($env4__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            $env4__i := 3
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if(%_assigned_instruments[8 + $env4__i] # 0)
      mf_insert_event($env4__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_CC, $dyn_cc_num, %env4__rhythm_playback[$env4__act_step])
      $env4__a := 0
      while($env4__a <= ($env4__selected_cursor - 1)) 
        $env4__engine_note_hold := %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__a]
        if((%_env4__active_notes[$env4__engine_note_hold] = 1) and (%_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__engine_note_hold] = 0))
          $env4__octaved_note := $env4__engine_note_hold + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$env4__i] * 12)
          if($env4__octaved_note < 0)
            $env4__octaved_note := 0
          else
            if($env4__octaved_note > 127)
              $env4__octaved_note := 127
            end if
          end if
          $env4__note_id := play_note($env4__octaved_note, 50, 0, -1)
          %_env4__current_engine_notes[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__engine_note_hold] := $env4__octaved_note
          %_env4__active_notes[128 + $env4__engine_note_hold] := 1
          %_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__engine_note_hold] := $env4__note_id
          $engine0 := 2
          $eventID0 := $env4__note_id
          $slot_count0 := $env4__i
          call _allow_groups
          %midi_ids[$env4__i] := mf_insert_event($env4__i, ($NI_SONG_POSITION - $transport_stamp) - ms_to_ticks(12000), $MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON, $env4__octaved_note, 100)
          %_env4__mf_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__engine_note_hold] := %midi_ids[$env4__i]
          %env4__note_entry_time[$env4__engine_note_hold] := $NI_SONG_POSITION
          %midi_pos[$env4__i] := %midi_pos[$env4__i] + 1
        end if
        inc($env4__a)
      end while
    end if
    if($env4__note_selection > 0)
      if($env4__cursor > $env4__selected_cursor)
        $env4__a := 0
        while($env4__a <= 127) 
          if(%_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a] # 0)
            $env4__note_check := 1
            $env4__m := 0
            while($env4__m <= ($env4__selected_cursor - 1)) 
              if($env4__a = %env4__selected_notes_buffer[$env4__m])
                $env4__note_check := 0
              end if
              inc($env4__m)
            end while
            if($env4__note_check = 1)
              mf_set_event_par(%_env4__mf_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env4__note_entry_time[$env4__a])
              note_off(%_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a])
              %_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a] := 0
              %_env4__active_notes[128 + $env4__a] := 0
              %_env4__current_engine_notes[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a] := 0
            end if
          end if
          inc($env4__a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if(($see_main_subpage = 16) and ($see_page = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm_indicator), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      $env4__i := 0
      while($env4__i <= 99) 
        %env4__rhythm_indicator[$env4__i] := 0
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env4__i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
        inc($env4__i)
      end while
      %env4__rhythm_indicator[$env4__act_step] := 1
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$env4__act_step], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 1)
    end if
    if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
      $env4__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH * $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount
      select($env4__rate)
        case 95
          $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length / 2
        case 97
          $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length * 2
        case 98
          $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length * 3
        case 99
          $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length * 4
      end select
      $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length / 100
    else
      if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
        select($env4__rate)
          case 0
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
          case 1
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
          case 2
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
          case 3
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
          case 4
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
          case 5
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
          case 6
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
          case 7
            $env4__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
        end select
      end if
    end if
    if($env4__step_length < 5000)
      $env4__step_length := 5000
    end if
    if(($see_page = 4) and ($see_main_subpage = 7))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    $env4__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env4__real_hold * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env4__real_hold) * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)))
    if($env4__act_step = 0)
      $env4__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env4__real_hold * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env4__real_hold) * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 198)
    else
      if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
        if(($env4__act_step mod 2) = 0)
          $env4__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env4__real_hold * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env4__real_hold) * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        end if
      else
        $env4__indicator_hold := real_to_int((~env4__real_hold * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)) - (floor(~env4__real_hold) * int_to_real($env4__act_step + 1)))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      end if
    end if
    if($env4__indicator_hold > $env4__t)
      $env4__t := $env4__indicator_hold
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__real_hold) + 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__indicator_mirror), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__real_hold))
    end if
    if($engine_half_time = 1)
      $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length * 2
    else
      if($engine_double_time = 1)
        $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length / 2
      end if
    end if
    if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
      if(($env4__swing_cursor mod 2) = 0)
        $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length + (($env4__step_length * $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      else
        $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length + (($env4__step_length * - $rhythm_swing) / 100)
      end if
      inc($env4__swing_cursor)
      if($env4__humanize_hold > 0)
        $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length - $env4__humanize_hold
      else
        if($env4__humanize_hold < 0)
          $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length + $env4__humanize_hold
        end if
      end if
      $env4__humanize_hold := random(- $humanize_max, $humanize_max)
      $env4__step_length := $env4__step_length + $env4__humanize_hold
    end if
    if($env4__callback_id = $env1__callback_id)
      set_controller(102, %env4__rhythm_playback[$env4__act_step])
    else
      if($env4__callback_id = $env2__callback_id)
        set_controller(103, %env4__rhythm_playback[$env4__act_step])
      else
        if($env4__callback_id = $env3__callback_id)
          set_controller(104, %env4__rhythm_playback[$env4__act_step])
        else
          if($env4__callback_id = $env4__callback_id)
            set_controller(105, %env4__rhythm_playback[$env4__act_step])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($env4__act_step)
    if($env4__act_step >= $env4__steps)
      $env4__act_step := 0
      $env4__t := 0
      if($env4__retrigger = 1)
        $env4__i := 0
        while($env4__i <= 3) 
          $env4__a := 0
          while($env4__a <= 127) 
            if(%_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a] # 0)
              note_off(%_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a])
              %_env4__last_note_ids[($env4__i * 128) + $env4__a] := 0
            end if
            inc($env4__a)
          end while
          inc($env4__i)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    if($env4__cursor # 0)
      wait($env4__step_length)
    else
      wait(1)
    end if
  end while
end function
function run_pan1
  %group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $pan1__is_running := 1
  $pan1__act_step := 0
  while(($pan1__state = 1) and ($pan1__step_active_button # 0)) 
    $pan1__i := 0
    while($pan1__i <= ($pan1__steps - 1)) 
      %pan1__step_indicator[$pan1__i] := 0
      inc($pan1__i)
    end while
    %pan1__step_indicator[$pan1__act_step] := 1
    if(%pan1__panstep[$pan1__act_step] < 0)
      %p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          %group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          set_engine_par($MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE, 1, %group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_107"), -1)
          inc(%n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        inc(%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      message("")
      set_controller(107, %pan1__panstep[$pan1__act_step] * -1)
    else
      %p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          %group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          set_engine_par($MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE, 0, %group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_107"), -1)
          inc(%n15[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        inc(%p0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      message("")
      set_controller(107, %pan1__panstep[$pan1__act_step])
    end if
    select($pan1__rate_menu)
      case 0
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $pan1__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    wait($pan1__step_length)
    inc($pan1__act_step)
    if($pan1__act_step >= $pan1__steps)
      $pan1__act_step := 0
    end if
  end while
  $pan1__i := 0
  while($pan1__i <= ($pan1__steps - 1)) 
    %pan1__step_indicator[$pan1__i] := 0
    inc($pan1__i)
  end while
  $pan1__is_running := 0
end function
function run_pan2
  %group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $pan2__is_running := 1
  $pan2__act_step := 0
  while(($pan2__state = 1) and ($pan2__step_active_button # 0)) 
    $pan2__i := 0
    while($pan2__i <= ($pan2__steps - 1)) 
      %pan2__step_indicator[$pan2__i] := 0
      inc($pan2__i)
    end while
    %pan2__step_indicator[$pan2__act_step] := 1
    if(%pan2__panstep[$pan2__act_step] < 0)
      %p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          %group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          set_engine_par($MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE, 1, %group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_108"), -1)
          inc(%n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        inc(%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      message("")
      set_controller(108, %pan2__panstep[$pan2__act_step] * -1)
    else
      %p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          %group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          set_engine_par($MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE, 0, %group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], find_mod(%group_id2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], "mod_108"), -1)
          inc(%n16[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        inc(%p1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      message("")
      set_controller(108, %pan2__panstep[$pan2__act_step])
    end if
    select($pan2__rate_menu)
      case 0
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 4
      case 1
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH / 2
      case 2
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH
      case 3
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH
      case 4
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER
      case 5
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
      case 6
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
      case 7
        $pan2__step_length := $DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
    end select
    wait($pan2__step_length)
    inc($pan2__act_step)
    if($pan2__act_step >= $pan2__steps)
      $pan2__act_step := 0
    end if
  end while
  $pan2__i := 0
  while($pan2__i <= ($pan2__steps - 1)) 
    %pan2__step_indicator[$pan2__i] := 0
    inc($pan2__i)
  end while
  $pan2__is_running := 0
end function
function scanning_automation
  if(($preset_scan_info = 0) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1))
    if($preset_scan = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $frame_count)
    end if
    if(($preset_scan = 0) and in_range($frame_count, 1, 30))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scan_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $frame_count)
      if($frame_count >= 30)
        $preset_scan_info := 1
        $frame_count := 0
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        call on_btn_scan_presets
      end if
    end if
    $frame_rate := ($frame_rate + 1) mod 1
    $frame_count := ($frame_count + (sh_right(- $frame_rate, 31) + 1)) mod 31
  else
    if(($preset_scan_info = 1) and ($preset_scan = 0))
      $frame_rate := ($frame_rate + 1) mod 1
      $frame_count := ($frame_count + (sh_right(- $frame_rate, 31) + 1)) mod 100
      if($frame_count >= 99)
        $preset_scan_info := 0
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS & "/" & $NUM_PRESETS)
      else
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 0)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "User Presets found: " & $preset__usr_display_num)
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Files recovered: " & $preset__usr_display_num)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function set_background_animation
  if($bg_picturestate > 59)
    $bg_picturestate := 59
  end if
  if($bg_picturestate < 20)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - $bg_picturestate)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  else
    if($bg_picturestate > 39)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - ($bg_picturestate - 40))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 19 - ($bg_picturestate - 20))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
  end if
end function
function remote_fx_tab_buttons
  $fx_env_view := 0
  $fx_sat_view := 0
  $fx_amp_view := 0
  $fx_filter_view := 0
end function
function update_instr_number_buttons
  call remote_instr_number_buttons
  if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 12) or in_range($see_main_subpage, 13, 17))
    select($engine_active_slot)
      case 1
        $instr_number_button0 := 1
      case 2
        $instr_number_button1 := 1
      case 3
        $instr_number_button2 := 1
      case 4
        $instr_number_button3 := 1
    end select
  else
    if($see_main_subpage = 2)
      select($instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
        case 0
          $instr_number_button0 := 1
        case 1
          $instr_number_button1 := 1
        case 2
          $instr_number_button2 := 1
        case 3
          $instr_number_button3 := 1
      end select
    else
      if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 47))
        select($fx_slot)
          case 0
            $instr_number_button0 := 1
          case 1
            $instr_number_button1 := 1
          case 2
            $instr_number_button2 := 1
          case 3
            $instr_number_button3 := 1
        end select
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function main_subpage_manager
  if($see_page # 4)
    exit
  end if
  call remote_fx_page_buttons
  call remote_fx_tab_buttons
  if($fx_tab = 0)
    if(%loaded_instruments[$fx_slot] > 0)
      $fx_env_view := 1
      select($fx_slot)
        case 0
          $see_main_subpage := 18
        case 1
          $see_main_subpage := 19
        case 2
          $see_main_subpage := 20
        case 3
          $see_main_subpage := 21
        case 4
          $see_main_subpage := 22
      end select
    else
      $fx_tab := 3
    end if
  end if
  if($fx_tab = 1)
    select($fx_slot)
      case 0
        $see_main_subpage := 23
      case 1
        $see_main_subpage := 24
      case 2
        $see_main_subpage := 25
      case 3
        $see_main_subpage := 26
      case 4
        $see_main_subpage := 27
    end select
  end if
  if($fx_tab = 2)
    $fx_amp_view := 1
    select($fx_slot)
      case 0
        $see_main_subpage := 43
      case 1
        $see_main_subpage := 44
      case 2
        $see_main_subpage := 45
      case 3
        $see_main_subpage := 46
      case 4
        $see_main_subpage := 47
    end select
  end if
  if($fx_tab = 3)
    $fx_sat_view := 1
    select($fx_slot)
      case 0
        $see_main_subpage := 33
      case 1
        $see_main_subpage := 34
      case 2
        $see_main_subpage := 35
      case 3
        $see_main_subpage := 36
      case 4
        $see_main_subpage := 37
    end select
  end if
  if($fx_tab = 4)
    $fx_filter_view := 1
    select($fx_slot)
      case 0
        $see_main_subpage := 38
      case 1
        $see_main_subpage := 39
      case 2
        $see_main_subpage := 40
      case 3
        $see_main_subpage := 41
      case 4
        $see_main_subpage := 42
    end select
  end if
  call update_instr_number_buttons
  call update_visibility
end function

  $i := 0

    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function visibility__preset__save__dialog
  !favorite_button_pics0[0] := @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite"
  !favorite_button_pics0[1] := @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite_blurr"
  !preset_button_pics0[0] := @lib_prefix & "btn_presetbrowser_selector"
  !preset_button_pics0[1] := @lib_prefix & "btn_presetbrowser_selector_disabled"
  if($see_page = 4)
    $see_page := 3
    call update_visibility
  end if
  $btn_scan_presets := 0
  call on_btn_scan_presets
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$rr00001])
  $btn_save := $rr00001
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_warning), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[$rr00001])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($rr00001) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_previous), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($rr00001) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_next), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($rr00001) - 1, 31))])
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_preset_button) - 1)) 
    set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !favorite_button_pics0[$rr00001])
    set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !preset_button_pics0[$rr00001])
    if($rr00001 = 1)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font_blurred[num_elements(%fonts__base_font_blurred) * $gui_idx])
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %fonts__base_font_blurred[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font_blurred) * $gui_idx) + 1])
    else
      $ii := 0
      while($ii <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], %font_types[$ii], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + $ii])
        inc($ii)
      end while
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function off_saving_preset_dialog
  $saving_disabled := 1
  $saving_preset := 0
  $btn_save := 0
  $btn_edit_tags := 0
  $preset__overwrite := 0
  set_control_par(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_overwrite), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  $rr00001 := 0
  call visibility__preset__save__dialog
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_save_dialog), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[0])
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1)) 
    %btn_tags_state[$i] := %FS_btn_tags_state[$i]
    set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %btn_tags_state[$i])
    inc($i)
  end while
  $btn_scan_presets := 0
  call on_btn_scan_presets
  call on_button_tag
  call update__btn_active_status
end function

  $main_page_button := 0

function change_engine_page
  select($engine_active_slot)
    case 1
      if($assign_slot_menu0 <= 1)
        $see_main_subpage := 8
        $arp1__rhythm_A_edit := 0
        $arp1__rhythm_B_edit := 1
        $arp1__edit_active := 1
        call update_visibility
        call _update_shown_table
      else
        if($assign_slot_menu0 = 2)
          $see_main_subpage := 13
          $env1__envelope_A_edit := 0
          $env1__envelope_B_edit := 1
          $env1__edit_active := 1
          call update_visibility
          call _update_shown_envelope
        end if
      end if
      call _on_controller
    case 2
      if($assign_slot_menu1 <= 1)
        $see_main_subpage := 9
        $arp2__rhythm_A_edit := 0
        $arp2__rhythm_B_edit := 1
        $arp2__edit_active := 1
        call update_visibility
        call _update_shown_table
      else
        if($assign_slot_menu1 = 2)
          $see_main_subpage := 14
          $env2__envelope_A_edit := 0
          $env2__envelope_B_edit := 1
          $env2__edit_active := 1
          call update_visibility
          call _update_shown_envelope
        end if
      end if
      call _on_controller
    case 3
      if($assign_slot_menu2 <= 1)
        $see_main_subpage := 10
        $arp3__rhythm_A_edit := 0
        $arp3__rhythm_B_edit := 1
        $arp3__edit_active := 1
        call update_visibility
        call _update_shown_table
      else
        if($assign_slot_menu2 = 2)
          $see_main_subpage := 15
          $env3__envelope_A_edit := 0
          $env3__envelope_B_edit := 1
          $env3__edit_active := 1
          call update_visibility
          call _update_shown_envelope
        end if
      end if
      call _on_controller
    case 4
      if($assign_slot_menu3 <= 1)
        $see_main_subpage := 11
        $arp4__rhythm_A_edit := 0
        $arp4__rhythm_B_edit := 1
        $arp4__edit_active := 1
        call update_visibility
        call _update_shown_table
      else
        if($assign_slot_menu3 = 2)
          $see_main_subpage := 16
          $env4__envelope_A_edit := 0
          $env4__envelope_B_edit := 1
          $env4__edit_active := 1
          call update_visibility
          call _update_shown_envelope
        end if
      end if
      call _on_controller
  end select
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_current_slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $engine_active_slot - 1)
  call update_instr_number_buttons
end function
function remote_character_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__btn_cat) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__btn_cat[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $instr_browser__current_character_selection := -1
end function
function remote_instr_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function hide_instr_buttons
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  while($label_pos_y0 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($label_pos_y0)
  end while
end function
function build_instrument_scroll_menu
  $SIZE1 := 0
  $n1 := 0
  $instr_browser__menu_idx := $instr_browser__current_art_selection + $instr_browser__current_character_selection
  if($instr_browser__menu_idx # $instr_browser__last_menu_idx)
    $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := 0
  end if
  $instr_browser__last_menu_idx := $instr_browser__menu_idx
  $n1 := 0
  $SIZE1 := 0
  while($SIZE1 <= 249) 
    if(%_instr_browser__instr_id_on_button[($instr_browser__menu_idx * 250) + $SIZE1] # -1)
      inc($n1)
    end if
    inc($SIZE1)
  end while
  $instr_browser__scrollitems := $n1
end function
function update_scroll
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  $i1004 := 0
  $s004 := 0
  $n004 := 0
  $i114 := $instr_browser__row_height * $instr_browser__scrollitems
  if($i114 < $instr_browser__page_height)
    $i114 := $instr_browser__page_height
  end if
  $i1004 := ($instr_browser__page_height * $instr_browser__page_height) / $i114
  $s004 := $instr_browser__page_height - $i1004
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $i1004)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 20)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 20)
  end if
  if($instr_browser__scrollitems > 7)
    if($instr_browser__scrollstep_is_set = 0)
      $label_pos_y0 := 1000 - $instr_browser__scroll_handle
      $n004 := $instr_browser__scroll_top_ypos + (($s004 * $label_pos_y0) / 1000)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $n004)
      $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := real_to_int(round(int_to_real($n004 - $instr_browser__scroll_top_ypos) / (int_to_real($s004) / int_to_real($instr_browser__scrollitems - 7))))
    else
      $n004 := $instr_browser__scroll_top_ypos + real_to_int((int_to_real($s004) / int_to_real($instr_browser__scrollitems - 7)) * int_to_real($instr_browser__current_scrollstep))
      $label_pos_y0 := real_to_int((int_to_real($n004 - $instr_browser__scroll_top_ypos) * 1000.) / int_to_real($s004))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $n004)
      $instr_browser__scroll_handle := 1000 - $label_pos_y0
    end if
  else
    $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := 0
    $instr_browser__scroll_handle := 1000
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__scroll_handle_label), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $instr_browser__scroll_top_ypos)
  end if
end function
function show_instr_button
  $i5 := 0
  $rhythm_edit1 := 0
  $n1 := 0
  $label_pos_y0 := 0
  while($label_pos_y0 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$label_pos_y0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($label_pos_y0)
  end while
  if(($instr_browser__current_art_selection # -1) and ($instr_browser__current_character_selection # -1))
    $i5 := 0
    while($i5 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr_button_ids[$i5], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      inc($i5)
    end while
  end if
end function
function update_instrument_buttons
  $i5 := 0
  $rhythm_edit1 := 0
  while($rhythm_edit1 <= (num_elements(%instr_browser__instr) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    %_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[7 + $rhythm_edit1] := 0
    %_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[$rhythm_edit1] := %_instr_browser__instr_id_on_button[($instr_browser__menu_idx * 250) + ($rhythm_edit1 + $instr_browser__current_scrollstep)]
    if(($content_highlight_bypass = 1) and (search(%instr_browser__new_instr_ids, %_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[$rhythm_edit1]) # -1))
      set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_orange)
      set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, $font_main_big_orange)
    else
      set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
      set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, $font_main_big_white)
    end if
    if(%_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[$rhythm_edit1] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !instr_names[%_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[$rhythm_edit1]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
    end if
    $i5 := 0
    while($i5 <= 3) 
      if(%_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[$rhythm_edit1] = %loaded_instruments[$i5])
        set_control_par(%instr_browser__instr[$rhythm_edit1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        %_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[7 + $rhythm_edit1] := 1
      end if
      inc($i5)
    end while
    inc($rhythm_edit1)
  end while
end function
function go_to_active_art
  $rhythm_table_height0 := 0
  $rhythm_table_pos_y0 := $instr_browser__active_instr_slot
  call remote_character_buttons
  call remote_instr_buttons
  $rhythm_edit0 := 0
  $SIZE0 := -1
  $i4 := -1
  while(($SIZE0 = -1) and ($rhythm_edit0 < 4)) 
    $rhythm_table_height0 := 0
    while($rhythm_table_height0 <= 249) 
      if(%_instr_browser__instr_id_on_button[($rhythm_edit0 * 250) + $rhythm_table_height0] = %loaded_instruments[$rhythm_table_pos_y0])
        $SIZE0 := $rhythm_edit0
        $i4 := $rhythm_table_height0
      end if
      inc($rhythm_table_height0)
    end while
    inc($rhythm_edit0)
  end while
  select($SIZE0)
    case -1
      $instr_browser__current_art_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 0
      call remote_character_buttons
      call hide_instr_buttons
    case 0
      $instr_browser__current_art_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__btn_cat0 := 1
    case 1
      $instr_browser__current_art_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 1
      $instr_browser__btn_cat1 := 1
    case 2
      $instr_browser__current_art_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 2
      $instr_browser__btn_cat2 := 1
    case 3
      $instr_browser__current_art_selection := 0
      $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 3
      $instr_browser__btn_cat3 := 1
  end select
  if(in_range($SIZE0, 0, 3))
    call build_instrument_scroll_menu
    if($i4 > ($instr_browser__scrollitems - 7))
      $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := $instr_browser__scrollitems - 7
    else
      $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := $i4
    end if
    call update_scroll
    $instr_browser__scrollstep_is_set := 0
  else
    $instr_browser__current_scrollstep := 0
    call update_scroll
    $instr_browser__scrollstep_is_set := 0
  end if
  call show_instr_button
  call update_instrument_buttons
end function
function clip
  if($i2800 < $hold_value200)
    $i2800 := $hold_value200
  else
    if($i2800 > $n142)
      $i2800 := $n142
    end if
  end if
end function
function double_click
  $click_interval := $ENGINE_UPTIME - $new_click_time
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if($click_interval < 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $see_page := 4
    $see_main_subpage := 7
    call update_visibility
  end if
end function
function update_fx_active_labels
  if($see_page = 6)
    if($mixer__comp_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__comp_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
    end if
    if($mixer__delay_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_head_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
    end if
    if($mixer__rev_bypass = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_type), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
  end if
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 47))
    if(%loaded_instruments[$fx_slot] > 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_grey_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_grey_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_env_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_grey_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%sat_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_sat_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%filter_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_filter_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
    if(get_control_par(%amp_bypass[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($fx_amp_view), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
    end if
  end if
end function
function mirror_comp_settings
  $midi_104_value0 := 0
  while($midi_104_value0 <= 3) 
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, 1 - $mixer__comp_bypass, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $midi_104_value0)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, $mixer__comp_threshold, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $midi_104_value0)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, $mixer__comp_makeup, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $midi_104_value0)
    inc($midi_104_value0)
  end while
end function
function remote_solo_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%mixer__solo) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%mixer__solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function change_gui
  select($mnu_gui)
    case 0
      @lib_prefix := "dh1_"
      $bg_offset := 0
      $font_main_big_white := $e1_font_main_big_white
      $font_main_big_grey := $e1_font_main_big_grey
      $font_main_big_blue := $e1_font_main_big_blue
      $font_main_big_orange := $e1_font_main_big_orange
      $font_main_small_blue := $e1_font_main_small_blue
      $font_main_small_grey := $e1_font_main_small_grey
      $font_motion_white := $e1_font_motion_white
      $font_motion_orange := $e1_font_motion_orange
      $font_value_label := $e1_font_value_label
      $font_secondary_blue := $e1_font_secondary_blue
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        %font_main_big_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_big_array[$i]
        %font_deactivated_array[$i] := %e1_font_deactivated_array[$i]
        %font_deactivated_big_array[$i] := %e1_font_deactivated_big_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_labels_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_instr_labels_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_browser_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_instr_browser_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_sel_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_instr_sel_array[$i]
        %font_assign_slot_menu_array[$i] := %e1_font_assign_slot_menu_array[$i]
        %font_main_big_grey_array[$i] := %e1_font_main_big_grey_array[$i]
        %font_pan_slot_array[$i] := %e1_font_pan_slot_array[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
      $table_base_color := 5930625
      $table_zero_line_color := 4213325
      $table_indicator_base_color := 44474
      $mixer__level_meter_on_color := 5930625
    case 1
      @lib_prefix := "e2_"
      $bg_offset := 5
      $font_main_big_white := $e2_font_main_big_white
      $font_main_big_grey := $e2_font_main_big_grey
      $font_main_big_blue := $e2_font_main_big_blue
      $font_main_big_orange := $e2_font_main_big_orange

      $font_main_small_grey := $e2_font_main_small_grey
      $font_motion_white := $e2_font_motion_white
      $font_motion_orange := $e1_font_motion_orange
      $font_value_label := $e2_font_value_label
      $font_secondary_blue := $e2_font_secondary_blue
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        %font_main_big_array[$i] := %e2_font_main_big_array[$i]
        %font_deactivated_array[$i] := %e2_font_deactivated_array[$i]
        %font_deactivated_big_array[$i] := %e2_font_deactivated_big_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_labels_array[$i] := %e2_font_main_instr_labels_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_browser_array[$i] := %e2_font_main_instr_browser_array[$i]
        %font_main_instr_sel_array[$i] := %e2_font_main_instr_sel_array[$i]
        %font_assign_slot_menu_array[$i] := %e2_font_assign_slot_menu_array[$i]
        %font_main_big_grey_array[$i] := %e2_font_main_big_grey_array[$i]
        %font_pan_slot_array[$i] := %e2_font_pan_slot_array[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
      $table_base_color := 5930625
      $table_zero_line_color := 4213325
      $table_indicator_base_color := 44474
      $mixer__level_meter_on_color := 5930625
  end select
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_background_animation_p3")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_background_animation_p2")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($bg_animation_p1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_background_animation_p1")

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3)

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__ir_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol3_meter_l), $CONTROL_PAR_PEAK_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol3_meter_r), $CONTROL_PAR_ON_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol3_meter_r), $CONTROL_PAR_PEAK_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol4_meter_l), $CONTROL_PAR_ON_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol4_meter_l), $CONTROL_PAR_PEAK_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol4_meter_r), $CONTROL_PAR_ON_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__vol4_meter_r), $CONTROL_PAR_PEAK_COLOR, $mixer__level_meter_on_color)
  call update_fx_active_labels
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%motion_min_value[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_motion_orange)
    set_control_par(%motion_max_value[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_motion_white)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function clear_tags
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%tag_button_array) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update__scrollarea
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "      " & !final_preset_title_array[$i + $scroll__up])
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %btn_preset_onoff[$i + $scroll__up])
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %final_favorite_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up])
    if(%end_of_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up] = -1)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(search(%btn_tags_state, 1) = -1)
    $scroll__up_origin := $scroll__up
  end if
  $sli_scrollbar := 1000000 - ((1000000 / ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14)) * $scroll__up)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((290 - $handle_size) - (($sli_scrollbar * (290 - $handle_size)) / 1000000)))
end function
function remote_mute_buttons
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%mixer__mute) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%mixer__mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function load_preset
  fade_out($ALL_EVENTS, 50000, 1)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_NONE, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_NONE, -1, 1, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  $preset__load_cb := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $preset__is_loading := 1
  $preset__usr_offset := (sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) * 4
  $preset__n := 1 + $preset__usr_offset
  message("PRESET N: " & $preset__n)
  $cursor := 0
  $arp1__cursor := 0
  $arp2__cursor := 0
  $arp3__cursor := 0
  $arp4__cursor := 0
  $env1__cursor := 0
  $env2__cursor := 0
  $env3__cursor := 0
  $env4__cursor := 0
  call check_cursor_amount
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%loaded_instruments) - 1)) 
    %loaded_instruments[$i] := %preset__array[$preset__n]
    inc($preset__n)
    inc($i)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__transpose), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__octave), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 31) 
    %arp1__rhythm_A[$i] := %preset__array[$preset__n]
    inc($preset__n)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 31) 
    %arp1__rhythm_B[$i] := %preset__array[$preset__n]
    inc($preset__n)
    inc($i)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %preset__array[$preset__n])
  inc($preset__n)

  inc($preset__n)

      $arp1__rate := $arp1__rate - 3

  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
    ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
    $env2__steps := 100
    set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
    set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
    if($env2__edit_active = 0)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
      if($env2__rate > 4)
        $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env2__time_signature]
      else
        $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env2__time_signature]
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
      if($env2__steps <= $env2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__h)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env2__steps))
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__h)) / int_to_real($env2__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__steps)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env2__steps
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__steps)) / int_to_real($env2__steps)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $env2__z := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    $env2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    if(($i < $env2__steps) or ((($env2__steps < $env2__h) and ($i < $env2__h)) and ($env2__mode_menu = 1)))
      if($env2__steps > 32)
        if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
          $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
          $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if

    call update_arp_label_pos

  end if

    select($env3__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2

        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7

  else

      $i := 0

        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env3__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $env3__rate := $env3__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5

          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else

          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4)

        if($n # -1)

          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)

          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)

              dec($a)
            end while
          end if
        else

              end while

        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
          $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($env4__steps < $env4__h)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if
  ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  end if
  $arp1__repeat_max := $arp1__note_repeat
  $arp2__repeat_max := $arp2__note_repeat
  $arp3__repeat_max := $arp3__note_repeat
  $arp4__repeat_max := $arp4__note_repeat
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    %slots_rrCount[$i] := 0
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_slots_chord_subCount) - 1)) 
    %_slots_chord_subCount[$i] := 0
    inc($i)
  end while
  $arp1__steps := $arp1__rhythm_steps
  $arp2__steps := $arp2__rhythm_steps
  $arp3__steps := $arp3__rhythm_steps
  $arp4__steps := $arp4__rhythm_steps
  $i := $arp1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp1__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp1__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp2__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp2__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp3__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp3__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp3__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp3__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp4__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp4__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp4__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp4__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i mod $env1__steps]
    %env1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %env1__rhythm_B[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i mod $env1__steps]
    %env1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %env2__rhythm_A[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i mod $env2__steps]
    %env2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env2__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %env2__rhythm_B[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i mod $env2__steps]
    %env2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env2__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env3__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env3__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %env3__rhythm_A[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i mod $env3__steps]
    %env3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env3__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while

  while($i <= (num_elements(%env3__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %env3__rhythm_B[$i] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i mod $env3__steps]

    inc($i)

    inc($i)
  end while
  set_controller(1, 30)
  call set_mirror_tables
  call _on_controller
  $preset__is_loading := 0
end function
function filter__toggle_tag_buttons
  $rr00000 := 0
  if($tag_active # 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 4) 
      if((%filtermethodPerCategory[$i] = 2) or (get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$tag_active - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1))
        $rr00000 := %category_accum[$i]
        while($rr00000 <= (%category_accum[$i + 1] - 1)) 
          if(($rr00000 # ($tag_active - 1)) and in_range($tag_active - 1, %category_accum[$i], %category_accum[$i + 1] - 1))
            set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$rr00000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          inc($rr00000)
        end while
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end function
function validate__user__preset__idx
  $i2600 := 0
  if(search(%user_preset_numbers, $SIZE01) # -1)
    $preset__count := 0
    $i2600 := 1
    while($i2600 = 1) 
      if(search(%user_preset_numbers, $preset__count + 999) # -1)
        inc($preset__count)
      else
        $i2600 := 0
      end if
    end while
    $i41 := $preset__count + 999
  else
    $i41 := $SIZE01
  end if
end function
function update__preset_situation
  $ii := 0
  $NUM_USER_PRESETS := search(%user_preset_tags, 0)
  $i := $NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS
  while($i <= 1498) 
    %preset_numbers_array[$i] := 0
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($NUM_USER_PRESETS > 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= ($NUM_USER_PRESETS - 1)) 
      if(%user_deleted_presets[$i] = 1)
        !user_preset_titles[$ii] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
        %user_preset_tags[$ii] := %user_preset_tags[$i]
        %user_preset_numbers[$ii] := %user_preset_numbers[$i]
        inc($ii)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $NUM_USER_PRESETS := $ii
    $i := 0
    while($i <= ($NUM_USER_PRESETS - 1)) 
      !preset_title_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
      !final_preset_title_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
      !file_name_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := !user_preset_titles[$i]
      %preset_tags[%user_preset_numbers[$i]] := %user_preset_tags[$i]
      %preset_numbers_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS + $i] := %user_preset_numbers[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%user_deleted_presets) - 1)) 
    if($i < $NUM_USER_PRESETS)
      %user_deleted_presets[$i] := 1
    else
      %user_deleted_presets[$i] := 0
      !user_preset_titles[$i] := 0
      %user_preset_tags[$i] := 0
      %user_preset_numbers[$i] := 0
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $NUM_PRESETS := $NUM_USER_PRESETS + $NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($file_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_BASEPATH, @basepath)
end function
function on_saving_preset_dialog
  $rr00001 := 1
  call visibility__preset__save__dialog
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($UI_preset_save_dialog), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %hide_state[1])
  if($preset__idx # -1)
    select($saving_preset)
      case 2
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)])
      case 1
        if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 0)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & " (User)")
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)])
        end if
    end select
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_warning), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Choose a selection of tags")
    add_text_line($lbl_warning, "that apply to your preset")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_warning), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_warning), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, %preset_matrix_coord[1] + 50)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 21) 
      %FS_btn_tags_state[$i] := %btn_tags_state[$i]
      $i7000 := %preset_tags[$preset__idx]
      $fx_sat_balancer00002 := 0
      while($fx_sat_balancer00002 <= (num_elements(%binary_array) - 2)) 
        %binary_array[(num_elements(%binary_array) - 2) - $fx_sat_balancer00002] := abs(sh_right(- ($i7000 .and. sh_left(1, $fx_sat_balancer00002)), 31))
        inc($fx_sat_balancer00002)
      end while
      %binary_array[22] := %favorite_presets_array[$preset__idx]
      $ii := 0
      while($ii <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], %font_types[$ii], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + $ii])
        inc($ii)
      end while
      set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %binary_array[$i])
      %btn_tags_state[$i] := %binary_array[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := %category_accum[0]
    while($i <= (%category_accum[1] - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %favorite_presets_array[$preset__idx])
    set_control_par(%tag_button_array[5], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  end if
end function
function update_amp_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob0_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob1_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob2_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 2])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob3_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 3])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob4_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 4])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob5_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 5])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($amp_knob6_value_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_amp_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 6])
  if(get_control_par(%amp_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
end function
on persistence_changed
  if($is_on_init = 1)
    $is_on_init := 0
  else
    set_controller(1, 30)
  end if
  call update_assigned_instruments
  call update_octave_shifts
  call remote_instr_number_buttons
  call remote_fx_page_buttons
  call update_instr_labels
  call update_order_label
  call update_btn_monophonic_text
  call update_engine_visibility
  call update_sat_type
  call update_amp_type
  call update_rev_type
  call update_rev_preset_menu
  call update_solo

  call update_pre_lowcut_labels
  call update_nks_labels
  call note_selection_backward_check
  call update_note_selection

  call panstep_setting_pan2
