  call panstep_bypass_pan1
  call panstep_bypass_pan2
  call update_pan_slot_graphics
  call update_pan_step_text
  call update_pan_head_labels
  call update_global_arp_settings
  call update_preview_engine_text
  call update_vol_handles
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  $arp1__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp1__rate)
    case 0
      $arp1__mf_length := 60
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp1__mf_length := 120
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp1__mf_length := 240
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp1__mf_length := 480
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp1__mf_length := 960
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp1__mf_length := 160
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp1__mf_length := 320
      $arp1__bar_limit := ($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp1__mf_length := 640
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp1__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__bar_limit * 2
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $arp1__rate := $arp1__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp1__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $s := $arp2__time_signature
  $arp2__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp2__rate)
    case 0
      $arp2__mf_length := 60
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp2__mf_length := 120
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp2__mf_length := 240
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp2__mf_length := 480
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp2__mf_length := 960
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp2__mf_length := 160
      $arp2__bar_limit := (($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp2__mf_length := 320
      $arp2__bar_limit := ($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp2__mf_length := 640
      $arp2__bar_limit := (($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp2__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__bar_limit * 2
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp2__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp2__rate > 4)
      $arp2__rate := $arp2__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp2__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp2__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $s := $arp3__time_signature
  $arp3__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp3__rate)
    case 0
      $arp3__mf_length := 60
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp3__mf_length := 120
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp3__mf_length := 240
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp3__mf_length := 480
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp3__mf_length := 960
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp3__mf_length := 160
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp3__mf_length := 320
      $arp3__bar_limit := ($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp3__mf_length := 640
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp3__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__bar_limit * 2
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp3__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp3__rate > 4)
      $arp3__rate := $arp3__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp3__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp3__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $s := $arp4__time_signature
  $arp4__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp4__rate)
    case 0
      $arp4__mf_length := 60
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp4__mf_length := 120
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp4__mf_length := 240
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp4__mf_length := 480
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp4__mf_length := 960
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp4__mf_length := 160
      $arp4__bar_limit := (($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp4__mf_length := 320
      $arp4__bar_limit := ($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp4__mf_length := 640
      $arp4__bar_limit := (($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp4__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__bar_limit * 2
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp4__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp4__rate > 4)
      $arp4__rate := $arp4__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp4__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp4__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  call reset_env_last_mode
  call _set_env_mode
  call set_mirror_tables
  call _on_controller
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    $n := 0
    while($n <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[$i]] - 1)) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$i]] + $n, -1, -1)
      inc($n)
    end while
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__preset_browser
  call get_content_highlight_state
  call update_visibility
end on
on note
  if($preset__is_loading = 1)
    ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
    exit
  end if
  %inputevents[$EVENT_NOTE] := 1
  $inputcheck := search(%inputevents, 1)
  ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
  if(($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1) and ($transport_stamp = -1))
    $transport_stamp := $NI_SONG_POSITION
    mf_remove_event($ALL_EVENTS)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_button), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  $event_velo := $EVENT_VELOCITY
  $event_note := $EVENT_NOTE
  select($arp1__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %arp1__note_buffer[$arp1__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($arp1__cursor)
  end select
  select($arp2__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %arp2__note_buffer[$arp2__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($arp2__cursor)
  end select
  select($arp3__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %arp3__note_buffer[$arp3__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($arp3__cursor)
  end select
  select($arp4__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %arp4__note_buffer[$arp4__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($arp4__cursor)
  end select
  select($env1__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %_env1__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 1
      %env1__note_buffer[$env1__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($env1__cursor)
  end select
  select($env2__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %_env2__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 1
      %env2__note_buffer[$env2__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($env2__cursor)
  end select
  select($env3__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %_env3__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 1
      %env3__note_buffer[$env3__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($env3__cursor)
  end select
  select($env4__latch_mode)
    case 1
      %_env4__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 1
      %env4__note_buffer[$env4__cursor] := $EVENT_NOTE
      inc($env4__cursor)
  end select
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%loaded_instruments) - 1)) 
    if((%loaded_instruments[$i] # 0) and (get_control_par(%assign_slots_ids[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 0))
      $octaved_note := $event_note + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$i] * 12)
      if($octaved_note < 0)
        $octaved_note := 0
      else
        if($octaved_note > 127)
          $octaved_note := 127
        end if
      end if
      $event_id := play_note($octaved_note, $event_velo, 0, -1)
      set_event_par($event_id, $EVENT_PAR_0, 0)
      if($btn_monophonic = 1)
        $n := 0
        while($n <= 127) 
          if(%_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $n] > 0)
            fade_out(%_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $n], 1000, 1)
            %_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $n] := 0
          end if
          inc($n)
        end while
      end if
      %_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $octaved_note] := $event_id
      $engine0 := 0
      $eventID0 := $event_id
      $slot_count0 := $i
      call _allow_groups
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(((((((($arp1__latch_mode # 0) or ($arp2__latch_mode # 0)) or ($arp3__latch_mode # 0)) or ($arp4__latch_mode # 0)) or ($env1__latch_mode # 0)) or ($env2__latch_mode # 0)) or ($env3__latch_mode # 0)) or ($env4__latch_mode # 0))
    set_event_par($EVENT_ID, 0, 2)
    if((($arp1__latch_mode # 0) and ($arp1__cursor < 2)) and ($arp1__check_id = 0))
      $arp1__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $arp1__aa := 0
      $arp1__s := 0
      $arp1__n := 0
      $arp1__t := 0
      $arp1__act_step := 0
      $arp1__oct_cursor := 0
      $arp1__swing_cursor := 0
      $arp1__bar_count := 0
      $arp1__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($arp2__latch_mode # 0) and ($arp2__cursor < 2)) and ($arp2__check_id = 0))
      $arp2__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $arp2__aa := 0
      $arp2__s := 0
      $arp2__n := 0
      $arp2__t := 0
      $arp2__act_step := 0
      $arp2__oct_cursor := 0
      $arp2__swing_cursor := 0
      $arp2__bar_count := 0
      $arp2__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($arp3__latch_mode # 0) and ($arp3__cursor < 2)) and ($arp3__check_id = 0))
      $arp3__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $arp3__aa := 0
      $arp3__s := 0
      $arp3__n := 0
      $arp3__t := 0
      $arp3__act_step := 0
      $arp3__oct_cursor := 0
      $arp3__swing_cursor := 0
      $arp3__bar_count := 0
      $arp3__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($arp4__latch_mode # 0) and ($arp4__cursor < 2)) and ($arp4__check_id = 0))
      $arp4__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $arp4__aa := 0
      $arp4__s := 0
      $arp4__n := 0
      $arp4__t := 0
      $arp4__act_step := 0
      $arp4__oct_cursor := 0
      $arp4__swing_cursor := 0
      $arp4__bar_count := 0
      $arp4__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($env1__latch_mode # 0) and ($env1__cursor < 2)) and ($env1__check_id = 0))
      $env1__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $env1__act_step := 0
      $env1__swing_cursor := 0
      $env1__t := 0
      $env1__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($env2__latch_mode # 0) and ($env2__cursor < 2)) and ($env2__check_id = 0))
      $env2__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $env2__act_step := 0
      $env2__swing_cursor := 0
      $env2__t := 0
      $env2__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($env3__latch_mode # 0) and ($env3__cursor < 2)) and ($env3__check_id = 0))
      $env3__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $env3__act_step := 0
      $env3__swing_cursor := 0
      $env3__t := 0
      $env3__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
    if((($env4__latch_mode # 0) and ($env4__cursor < 2)) and ($env4__check_id = 0))
      $env4__check_id := $EVENT_ID
      $env4__act_step := 0
      $env4__swing_cursor := 0
      $env4__t := 0
      $env4__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
    end if
  end if
  if($pan1__state # 1)
    $pan1__state := 1
    $pan1__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
  end if
  if($pan2__state # 1)
    $pan2__state := 1
    $pan2__blip_note := play_note(0, 1, 0, 1)
  end if
end on
on release
  if(((((((((($EVENT_ID # $arp1__blip_note) and ($EVENT_ID # $arp2__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $arp3__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $arp4__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $env1__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $env2__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $env3__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $env4__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $pan1__blip_note)) and ($EVENT_ID # $pan2__blip_note))
    if(%CC[64] < 10)
      if(get_event_par($EVENT_ID, $EVENT_PAR_0) # 0)
        select($arp1__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $arp1__a := 0
            $arp1__b := $arp1__cursor
            $arp1__cursor := 0
            while($arp1__a < $arp1__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %arp1__note_buffer[$arp1__a])
                %arp1__note_buffer[$arp1__cursor] := %arp1__note_buffer[$arp1__a]
                inc($arp1__cursor)
              end if
              inc($arp1__a)
            end while
        end select
        select($arp2__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $arp2__a := 0
            $arp2__b := $arp2__cursor
            $arp2__cursor := 0
            while($arp2__a < $arp2__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %arp2__note_buffer[$arp2__a])
                %arp2__note_buffer[$arp2__cursor] := %arp2__note_buffer[$arp2__a]
                inc($arp2__cursor)
              end if
              inc($arp2__a)
            end while
        end select
        select($arp3__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $arp3__a := 0
            $arp3__b := $arp3__cursor
            $arp3__cursor := 0
            while($arp3__a < $arp3__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %arp3__note_buffer[$arp3__a])
                %arp3__note_buffer[$arp3__cursor] := %arp3__note_buffer[$arp3__a]
                inc($arp3__cursor)
              end if
              inc($arp3__a)
            end while
        end select
        select($arp4__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $arp4__a := 0
            $arp4__b := $arp4__cursor
            $arp4__cursor := 0
            while($arp4__a < $arp4__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %arp4__note_buffer[$arp4__a])
                %arp4__note_buffer[$arp4__cursor] := %arp4__note_buffer[$arp4__a]
                inc($arp4__cursor)
              end if
              inc($arp4__a)
            end while
        end select
        select($env1__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $env1__a := 0
            $env1__b := $env1__cursor
            $env1__cursor := 0
            while($env1__a < $env1__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %env1__note_buffer[$env1__a])
                %env1__note_buffer[$env1__cursor] := %env1__note_buffer[$env1__a]
                inc($env1__cursor)
              end if
              inc($env1__a)
            end while
            %_env1__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 0
            $i := 0
            while($i <= 3) 
              if(%_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] # 0)
                mf_set_event_par(%_env1__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env1__note_entry_time[$EVENT_NOTE])
                note_off(%_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE])
                %_env1__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env1__active_notes[128 + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env1__current_engine_notes[($i * 128) + ($EVENT_NOTE + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$i] * 12))] := 0
              end if
              inc($i)
            end while
        end select
        select($env2__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $env2__a := 0
            $env2__b := $env2__cursor
            $env2__cursor := 0
            while($env2__a < $env2__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %env2__note_buffer[$env2__a])
                %env2__note_buffer[$env2__cursor] := %env2__note_buffer[$env2__a]
                inc($env2__cursor)
              end if
              inc($env2__a)
            end while
            %_env2__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 0
            $i := 0
            while($i <= 3) 
              if(%_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] # 0)
                mf_set_event_par(%_env2__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env2__note_entry_time[$EVENT_NOTE])
                note_off(%_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE])
                %_env2__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env2__active_notes[128 + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env2__current_engine_notes[($i * 128) + ($EVENT_NOTE + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$i] * 12))] := 0
              end if
              inc($i)
            end while
        end select
        select($env3__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $env3__a := 0
            $env3__b := $env3__cursor
            $env3__cursor := 0
            while($env3__a < $env3__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %env3__note_buffer[$env3__a])
                %env3__note_buffer[$env3__cursor] := %env3__note_buffer[$env3__a]
                inc($env3__cursor)
              end if
              inc($env3__a)
            end while
            %_env3__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 0
            $i := 0
            while($i <= 3) 
              if(%_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] # 0)
                mf_set_event_par(%_env3__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env3__note_entry_time[$EVENT_NOTE])
                note_off(%_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE])
                %_env3__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env3__active_notes[128 + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env3__current_engine_notes[($i * 128) + ($EVENT_NOTE + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$i] * 12))] := 0
              end if
              inc($i)
            end while
        end select
        select($env4__latch_mode)
          case 1
            $env4__a := 0
            $env4__b := $env4__cursor
            $env4__cursor := 0
            while($env4__a < $env4__b) 
              if($EVENT_NOTE # %env4__note_buffer[$env4__a])
                %env4__note_buffer[$env4__cursor] := %env4__note_buffer[$env4__a]
                inc($env4__cursor)
              end if
              inc($env4__a)
            end while
            %_env4__active_notes[$EVENT_NOTE] := 0
            $i := 0
            while($i <= 3) 
              if(%_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] # 0)
                mf_set_event_par(%_env4__mf_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env4__note_entry_time[$EVENT_NOTE])
                note_off(%_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE])
                %_env4__last_note_ids[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env4__active_notes[128 + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
                %_env4__current_engine_notes[($i * 128) + ($EVENT_NOTE + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$i] * 12))] := 0
              end if
              inc($i)
            end while
        end select
        call check_cursor_amount
      end if
    else
      if(get_event_par($EVENT_ID, $EVENT_PAR_0) = 0)
        ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
      end if
    end if
    %inputevents[$EVENT_NOTE] := 0
    $inputcheck := search(%inputevents, 1)
    if(%CC[64] < 10)
      if($inputcheck = -1)
        call stop_pan_engine
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if(((((((((($EVENT_ID = $arp1__blip_note) or ($EVENT_ID = $arp2__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $arp3__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $arp4__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $env1__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $env2__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $env3__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $env4__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $pan1__blip_note)) or ($EVENT_ID = $pan2__blip_note))
    wait(12000)
    $cursor := 0
    if($arp1__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $arp1__cursor
    end if
    if($arp2__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $arp2__cursor
    end if
    if($arp3__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $arp3__cursor
    end if
    if($arp4__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $arp4__cursor
    end if
    if($env1__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $env1__cursor
    end if
    if($env2__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $env2__cursor
    end if
    if($env3__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $env3__cursor
    end if
    if($env4__cursor # 0)
      $cursor := $env4__cursor
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $arp1__blip_note)
      call run_arp1
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $arp2__blip_note)
      call run_arp2
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $arp3__blip_note)
      call run_arp3
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $arp4__blip_note)
      call run_arp4
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $env1__blip_note)
      call run_env1
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $env2__blip_note)
      call run_env2
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $env3__blip_note)
      call run_env3
    end if
    if($EVENT_ID = $env4__blip_note)
      call run_env4
    end if
    if(($EVENT_ID = $pan1__blip_note) and ($pan1__is_running = 0))
      call run_pan1
    end if
    if(($EVENT_ID = $pan2__blip_note) and ($pan2__is_running = 0))
      call run_pan2
    end if
  end if
end on
on listener
  if($NI_SIGNAL_TYPE = $NI_SIGNAL_TRANSP_STOP)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 3) 
      %midi_pos[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    $transport_stamp := -1
    $midi_label_count := 0
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_button), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    if(mf_get_buffer_size() < 1000000)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $midi_export_button := 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($midi_export_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_midiexport_active")
    else
      $midi_export_button := 0
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($midi_export_button), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_midiexport")
    end if
  end if
  if($NI_SIGNAL_TYPE = $NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS)
    if(($NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING = 1) and ($transport_stamp # -1))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($midi_export_animation), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $midi_label_count)
      inc($midi_label_count)
      if($midi_label_count >= 30)
        $midi_label_count := 0
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($NI_SIGNAL_TYPE = $NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS)
    call scanning_automation
  end if
end on
on ui_control($midi_export_button)
  if(mf_get_buffer_size() = 1000000)
    $midi_export_button := 0
  else
    $midi_export_button := 1
  end if
end on
on async_complete
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $save_array_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $save_array_id := -1
    else
      if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 0)
        $save_array_id := 0
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $load_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $load_id := -1
    else
      if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 0)
        $load_id := 0
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $preset_load_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $preset_load_id := -1
    else
      $preset_load_id := 0
    end if
  end if
  if($NI_ASYNC_ID = $settings_load_id)
    if($NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS = 1)
      $settings_load_id := -1
    else
      $settings_load_id := 0
    end if
  end if
end on
on controller
  ignore_controller
  if($CC_NUM = 1)
    set_controller(1, %CC[1])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 7)
    set_controller(7, %CC[7])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 10)
    set_controller(10, %CC[10])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 11)
    set_controller(11, %CC[11])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = $VCC_MONO_AT)
    set_controller($VCC_MONO_AT, %CC[$VCC_MONO_AT])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = $VCC_PITCH_BEND)
    set_controller($VCC_PITCH_BEND, %CC[$VCC_PITCH_BEND])
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = 64)
    if(%CC[64] < 10)
      if($cursor # 0)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__note_buffer) - 1)) 
          %arp1__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %arp2__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %arp3__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %arp4__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %env1__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %env2__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %env3__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          %env4__note_buffer[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        $arp1__cursor := 0
        $arp2__cursor := 0
        $arp3__cursor := 0
        $arp4__cursor := 0
        $env1__cursor := 0
        $env2__cursor := 0
        $env3__cursor := 0
        $env4__cursor := 0
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 127) 
          if(%KEY_DOWN[$i] = 1)
            if($arp1__latch_mode = 1)
              %arp1__note_buffer[$arp1__cursor] := $i
              inc($arp1__cursor)
            end if
            if($arp2__latch_mode = 1)
              %arp2__note_buffer[$arp2__cursor] := $i
              inc($arp2__cursor)
            end if
            if($arp3__latch_mode = 1)
              %arp3__note_buffer[$arp3__cursor] := $i
              inc($arp3__cursor)
            end if
            if($arp4__latch_mode = 1)
              %arp4__note_buffer[$arp4__cursor] := $i
              inc($arp4__cursor)
            end if
            if($env1__latch_mode = 1)
              %env1__note_buffer[$env1__cursor] := $i
              inc($env1__cursor)
            end if
            if($env2__latch_mode = 1)
              %env2__note_buffer[$env2__cursor] := $i
              inc($env2__cursor)
            end if
            if($env3__latch_mode = 1)
              %env3__note_buffer[$env3__cursor] := $i
              inc($env3__cursor)
            end if
            if($env4__latch_mode = 1)
              %env4__note_buffer[$env4__cursor] := $i
              inc($env4__cursor)
            end if
          else
            if(%KEY_DOWN[$i] = 0)
              if($env1__latch_mode = 1)
                if(%_env1__active_notes[$i] = 1)
                  %_env1__active_notes[$i] := 0
                  $s := 0
                  while($s <= 4) 
                    if(%_env1__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] # 0)
                      mf_set_event_par(%_env1__mf_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env1__note_entry_time[$i])
                      note_off(%_env1__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i])
                      %_env1__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] := 0
                      %_env1__active_notes[128 + $i] := 0
                      %_env1__current_engine_notes[($s * 128) + ($i + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$s] * 12))] := 0
                    end if
                    inc($s)
                  end while
                end if
              end if
              if($env2__latch_mode = 1)
                if(%_env2__active_notes[$i] = 1)
                  %_env2__active_notes[$i] := 0
                  $s := 0
                  while($s <= 4) 
                    if(%_env2__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] # 0)
                      mf_set_event_par(%_env2__mf_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env2__note_entry_time[$i])
                      note_off(%_env2__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i])
                      %_env2__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] := 0
                      %_env2__active_notes[128 + $i] := 0
                      %_env2__current_engine_notes[($s * 128) + ($i + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$s] * 12))] := 0
                    end if
                    inc($s)
                  end while
                end if
              end if
              if($env3__latch_mode = 1)
                if(%_env3__active_notes[$i] = 1)
                  %_env3__active_notes[$i] := 0
                  $s := 0
                  while($s <= 4) 
                    if(%_env3__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] # 0)
                      mf_set_event_par(%_env3__mf_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env3__note_entry_time[$i])
                      note_off(%_env3__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i])
                      %_env3__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] := 0
                      %_env3__active_notes[128 + $i] := 0
                      %_env3__current_engine_notes[($s * 128) + ($i + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$s] * 12))] := 0
                    end if
                    inc($s)
                  end while
                end if
              end if
              if($env4__latch_mode = 1)
                if(%_env4__active_notes[$i] = 1)
                  %_env4__active_notes[$i] := 0
                  $s := 0
                  while($s <= 4) 
                    if(%_env4__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] # 0)
                      mf_set_event_par(%_env4__mf_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i], $EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, $NI_SONG_POSITION - %env4__note_entry_time[$i])
                      note_off(%_env4__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i])
                      %_env4__last_note_ids[($s * 128) + $i] := 0
                      %_env4__active_notes[128 + $i] := 0
                      %_env4__current_engine_notes[($s * 128) + ($i + (%assigned_octave_shifts[$s] * 12))] := 0
                    end if
                    inc($s)
                  end while
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
        call check_cursor_amount
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3) 
        $s := 0
        while($s <= 127) 
          if((%_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] # -1) and (%KEY_DOWN[$s] = 0))
            note_off(%_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s])
            %_no_engine_note_ids[($i * 128) + $s] := -1
          end if
          inc($s)
        end while
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($inputcheck = -1)
        call stop_pan_engine
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($rhythm_touched = 1)
    exit
  else
    if($CC_NUM = $dyn_cc_num)
      call _on_controller
      if($see_page = 4)
        $bg_picturestate := %CC[$dyn_cc_num] / 2
        call set_background_animation
        if($see_main_subpage = 7)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= (num_elements(%mirror_grey_out) - 1)) 
            set_control_par(%mirror_grey_out[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $bg_picturestate)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
        if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $bg_picturestate)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($CC_NUM = $motion_cc_num)
    call motion_fx
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_browser)
  $see_page := 3
  call update_visibility
  call update__preset_browser
  $btn_preset_browser := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_monophonic)
  call update_btn_monophonic_text
end on

on ui_control($main_page_button)
  if($saving_preset # 0)
    call off_saving_preset_dialog
  end if
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($main_page_button), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 0)
    call remote_page_buttons
    call remote_fx_page_buttons
    call remote_instr_number_buttons
    call update_preview_engine_text
    $main_page_button := 1
    $see_page := 4
    $see_main_subpage := 7
  end if
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($main_page_button), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
    if($preset_buttons_show_state = 0)
      $preset_buttons_show_state := 16
    else
      $preset_buttons_show_state := 0
    end if
    $main_page_button := 0
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($mixer_page_button)
  if($saving_preset # 0)
    call off_saving_preset_dialog
  end if
  call remote_page_buttons
  $mixer_page_button := 1
  $see_page := 6
  call update_visibility
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer_page_button), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= ($NUM_GROUPS - 1)) 
      purge_group($i, 0)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, $i, -1, -1)
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on

on ui_control($instr_number_button0)
  if($instr_number_button0 = 1)
    if(((($see_main_subpage = 7) or ($see_main_subpage = 1)) or in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 12)) or in_range($see_main_subpage, 13, 17))
      $engine_active_slot := 1
      call change_engine_page
    else
      if($see_main_subpage = 2)
        $see_main_subpage := 2
        $instr_browser__active_instr_slot := 0
        call update_visibility
        call go_to_active_art
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
      else
        if(in_range($see_main_subpage, 18, 42))
          $fx_slot := 0
          call main_subpage_manager
        end if
      end if
    end if
  else
    $see_main_subpage := 7
    call reset_arp_env_buttons
    call remote_fx_page_buttons
    call update_visibility
    call set_mirror_tables
    call update_mirror_tables
  end if
  call update_instr_number_buttons
end on

    if(((($see_main_subpage = 7) or ($see_main_subpage = 1)) or in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 12)) or in_range($see_main_subpage, 13, 17))
      $engine_active_slot := 2
      call change_engine_page
    else
      if($see_main_subpage = 2)

on ui_control($arp1__time_signature)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $arp1__rate := $arp1__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp1__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
  if(($arp1__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
    if($a > 0)
      while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp1__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
        dec($a)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($arp1__rate < 5)
      if($a > 0)
        while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp1__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
          dec($a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
  call _update_shown_table
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  $arp1__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp1__rate)
    case 0
      $arp1__mf_length := 60
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp1__mf_length := 120
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp1__mf_length := 240
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp1__mf_length := 480
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp1__mf_length := 960
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp1__mf_length := 160
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp1__mf_length := 320
      $arp1__bar_limit := ($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp1__mf_length := 640
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp1__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp1__rhythm_steps)
  $arp1__steps := $arp1__rhythm_steps
  $i := $arp1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp1__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp1__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp1__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  call _update_shown_table
end on
on ui_control(%arp1__rhythm)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 32) 
    if(%arp1__rhythm[$i] # 0)
      $tb_idx := $i
      if($arp1__edit_active = 0)
        %arp1__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp1__rhythm[$i]
      else
        if($arp1__edit_active = 1)
          %arp1__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp1__rhythm[$i]
        end if
      end if
      if((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %arp1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %arp1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($arp1__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_arp1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($arp1__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp1__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($arp1__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
      %arp1__rhythm[$i] := 0
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end on
on ui_control($arp1__bar_reset_active)
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  $arp1__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp1__rate)
    case 0
      $arp1__mf_length := 60
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp1__mf_length := 120
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp1__mf_length := 240
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp1__mf_length := 480
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp1__mf_length := 960
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp1__mf_length := 160
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp1__mf_length := 320
      $arp1__bar_limit := ($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp1__mf_length := 640
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp1__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp2__time_signature)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp2__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp2__rate > 4)
      $arp2__rate := $arp2__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp2__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp2__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
  if(($arp2__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
    if($a > 0)
      while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp2__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
        dec($a)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($arp2__rate < 5)
      if($a > 0)
        while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp2__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
          dec($a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
  call _update_shown_table
  $s := $arp2__time_signature
  $arp2__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp2__rate)
    case 0
      $arp2__mf_length := 60
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp2__mf_length := 120
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp2__mf_length := 240
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp2__mf_length := 480
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp2__mf_length := 960
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp2__mf_length := 160
      $arp2__bar_limit := (($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp2__mf_length := 320
      $arp2__bar_limit := ($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp2__mf_length := 640
      $arp2__bar_limit := (($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp2__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp2__rhythm_steps)
  $arp2__steps := $arp2__rhythm_steps
  $i := $arp2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp2__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp2__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp2__steps]
    %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]

        %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3

            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if

        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
      %arp2__rhythm[$i] := 0
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end on

on ui_control($arp3__time_signature)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp3__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp3__rate > 4)
      $arp3__rate := $arp3__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp3__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp3__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
  if(($arp3__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
    if($a > 0)
      while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp3__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
        dec($a)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($arp3__rate < 5)
      if($a > 0)
        while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp3__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
          dec($a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
  call _update_shown_table
  $s := $arp3__time_signature
  $arp3__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp3__rate)
    case 0
      $arp3__mf_length := 60
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp3__mf_length := 120
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp3__mf_length := 240
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp3__mf_length := 480
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp3__mf_length := 960
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp3__mf_length := 160
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp3__mf_length := 320
      $arp3__bar_limit := ($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp3__mf_length := 640
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp3__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp3__rhythm_steps)
  $arp3__steps := $arp3__rhythm_steps
  $i := $arp3__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp3__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp3__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp3__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  call _update_shown_table
end on
on ui_control(%arp3__rhythm)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 32) 
    if(%arp3__rhythm[$i] # 0)
      $tb_idx := $i
      if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
        %arp3__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp3__rhythm[$i]
      else
        if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
          %arp3__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp3__rhythm[$i]
        end if
      end if
      if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
      %arp3__rhythm[$i] := 0
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end on
on ui_control($arp3__bar_reset_active)
  $s := $arp3__time_signature
  $arp3__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp3__rate)
    case 0
      $arp3__mf_length := 60
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp3__mf_length := 120
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp3__mf_length := 240
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp3__mf_length := 480
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp3__mf_length := 960
      $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp3__mf_length := 160
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp3__mf_length := 320
      $arp3__bar_limit := ($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp3__mf_length := 640
      $arp3__bar_limit := (($arp3__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp3__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp3__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp3__bar_limit := $arp3__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp4__time_signature)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp4__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp4__rate > 4)
      $arp4__rate := $arp4__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp4__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp4__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
  if(($arp4__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
    if($a > 0)
      while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp4__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
        dec($a)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($arp4__rate < 5)
      if($a > 0)
        while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $arp4__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
          dec($a)
        end while
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
  call _update_shown_table
  $s := $arp4__time_signature
  $arp4__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp4__rate)
    case 0
      $arp4__mf_length := 60
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp4__mf_length := 120
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp4__mf_length := 240
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp4__mf_length := 480
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp4__mf_length := 960
      $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp4__mf_length := 160
      $arp4__bar_limit := (($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp4__mf_length := 320
      $arp4__bar_limit := ($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp4__mf_length := 640
      $arp4__bar_limit := (($arp4__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp4__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp4__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp4__bar_limit := $arp4__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp4__rhythm_steps)
  $arp4__steps := $arp4__rhythm_steps
  $i := $arp4__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %arp4__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $arp4__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%arp4__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %arp4__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp4__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  call _update_shown_table
end on

  $i := 0
  while($i <= 32) 
    if(%arp4__rhythm[$i] # 0)
      $tb_idx := $i
      if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
        %arp4__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp4__rhythm[$i]
      else
        if($arp4__edit_active = 1)
          %arp4__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp4__rhythm[$i]
        end if
      end if
      if((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %arp4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %arp4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($arp4__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($arp4__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
      %arp4__rhythm[$i] := 0
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end on

  end if

on ui_control($engine_half_time)
  $engine_normal_time := 0
  $engine_double_time := 0
  $engine_half_time := 1
end on
on ui_control($engine_normal_time)
  $engine_half_time := 0
  $engine_double_time := 0
  $engine_normal_time := 1
end on
on ui_control($engine_double_time)
  $engine_half_time := 0
  $engine_normal_time := 0
  $engine_double_time := 1
end on
on ui_control(?arp1__rhythm_xy)
  if($arp1__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp1__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($arp1__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp1__last_touched) > 300))
        $arp1__shift_all_active := 1
        $arp1__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp1__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp1__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp1__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %arp1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %arp1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%arp1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($arp1__edit_active = 0)

                end if

              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
