        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm_indicator, $arp1__h)
        $arp1__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp1__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp1__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp1__steps))
        ~arp1__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp1__h)) / int_to_real($arp1__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm, $arp1__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp1__rhythm_indicator, $arp1__steps)
        $arp1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp1__steps
        ~arp1__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp1__steps)) / int_to_real($arp1__steps)
      end if
      $arp1__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp1__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp1__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp1__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp1__steps) or (($arp1__steps < $arp1__h) and ($i < $arp1__h)))
          if($arp1__label_width_indicator > $arp1__z)
            $arp1__z := $arp1__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp1__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp1__steps < $arp1__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?arp2__rhythm_xy)
  if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($arp2__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp2__last_touched) > 300))
        $arp2__shift_all_active := 1
        $arp2__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp2__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $arp2__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $arp2__shift_all_active := 0
      %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
      if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if
    $i := $arp2__steps
    while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
      %arp2__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp2__steps]
      %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($arp2__rate > 4)
      $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp2__time_signature]
    else
      $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp2__time_signature]
    end if
    $arp2__steps := $arp2__rhythm_steps
    if($arp2__steps <= $arp2__h)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__h)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__h)
      $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps))
      ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__h)) / int_to_real($arp2__h)
    else
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__steps)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__steps)
      $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp2__steps
      ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__steps)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps)
    end if
    $arp2__z := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      $arp2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
      if(($i < $arp2__steps) or (($arp2__steps < $arp2__h) and ($i < $arp2__h)))
        if($arp2__label_width_indicator > $arp2__z)
          $arp2__z := $arp2__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
      %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($arp2__steps < $arp2__h)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    end if
    ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  else
    if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
      $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
          $tb_idx := $i
        else
          if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
            $tb_idx := 31
          end if
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
        if(($arp2__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp2__last_touched) > 300))
          $arp2__shift_all_active := 1
          $arp2__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 31) 
            %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $tb_idx := 0
          while($tb_idx <= 31) 
            if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
              $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp2__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
              $i2800 := $h
              $hold_value200 := 0
              $n142 := 127
              call clip
              %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := $h
              if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
              $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
              if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                else
                  if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                    %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
              else
                if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                else
                  if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                    %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
              end if
              if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
              end if
              if(%_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              else
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($tb_idx)
          end while
        end if
        $arp2__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      else
        $arp2__shift_all_active := 0
        %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?arp2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %arp2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%arp2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($arp2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($arp2__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_arp2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_arp2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
      end if
      $i := $arp2__steps
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp2__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
        %arp2__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp2__steps]
        %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp2__steps]
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp2__rate > 4)
        $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp2__time_signature]
      else
        $arp2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp2__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp2__steps := $arp2__rhythm_steps
      if($arp2__steps <= $arp2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__h)
        $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps))
        ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__h)) / int_to_real($arp2__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm, $arp2__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp2__rhythm_indicator, $arp2__steps)
        $arp2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp2__steps
        ~arp2__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp2__steps)) / int_to_real($arp2__steps)
      end if
      $arp2__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp2__steps) or (($arp2__steps < $arp2__h) and ($i < $arp2__h)))
          if($arp2__label_width_indicator > $arp2__z)
            $arp2__z := $arp2__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp2__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp2__steps < $arp2__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?arp3__rhythm_xy)
  if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($arp3__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp3__last_touched) > 300))
        $arp3__shift_all_active := 1
        $arp3__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp3__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $arp3__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $arp3__shift_all_active := 0
      %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
      if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else

      end if

      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))

          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if

      %arp3__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i mod $arp3__steps]
      %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($arp3__rate > 4)
      $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp3__time_signature]
    else
      $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp3__time_signature]
    end if
    $arp3__steps := $arp3__rhythm_steps
    if($arp3__steps <= $arp3__h)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__h)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__h)
      $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp3__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp3__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps))
      ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__h)) / int_to_real($arp3__h)
    else
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__steps)
      set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__steps)
      $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp3__steps
      ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__steps)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps)
    end if

    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      $arp3__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp3__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
      if(($i < $arp3__steps) or (($arp3__steps < $arp3__h) and ($i < $arp3__h)))
        if($arp3__label_width_indicator > $arp3__z)
          $arp3__z := $arp3__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
      %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($arp3__steps < $arp3__h)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp3__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp3__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    end if
    ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  else
    if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
      $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
          $tb_idx := $i
        else
          if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
            $tb_idx := 31
          end if
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
        if(($arp3__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp3__last_touched) > 300))
          $arp3__shift_all_active := 1
          $arp3__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 31) 
            %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $tb_idx := 0
          while($tb_idx <= 31) 
            if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
              $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp3__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
              $i2800 := $h
              $hold_value200 := 0
              $n142 := 127
              call clip
              %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := $h
              if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
              $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
              if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                else
                  if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                    %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
              else
                if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                else
                  if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                    %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
              end if
              if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
              end if
              if(%_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              else
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($tb_idx)
          end while
        end if
        $arp3__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      else
        $arp3__shift_all_active := 0
        %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?arp3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %arp3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%arp3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($arp3__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($arp3__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_arp3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_arp3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
      end if
      $i := $arp3__steps
      while($i <= (num_elements(%arp3__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
        %arp3__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_B[$i mod $arp3__steps]
        %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $arp3__steps]
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp3__rate > 4)
        $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$arp3__time_signature]
      else
        $arp3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$arp3__time_signature]
      end if
      $arp3__steps := $arp3__rhythm_steps
      if($arp3__steps <= $arp3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__h)
        $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((416. / (int_to_real($arp3__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($arp3__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps))
        ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__h)) / int_to_real($arp3__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm, $arp3__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%arp3__rhythm_indicator, $arp3__steps)
        $arp3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 422 / $arp3__steps
        ~arp3__label_width_dynamic := (416. - int_to_real($arp3__steps)) / int_to_real($arp3__steps)
      end if
      $arp3__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        $arp3__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~arp3__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        if(($i < $arp3__steps) or (($arp3__steps < $arp3__h) and ($i < $arp3__h)))
          if($arp3__label_width_indicator > $arp3__z)
            $arp3__z := $arp3__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~arp3__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($arp3__steps < $arp3__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp3__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp3__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?arp4__rhythm_xy)
  if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?arp4__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?arp4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($arp4__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $arp4__last_touched) > 300))
        $arp4__shift_all_active := 1
        $arp4__shift_start := real_to_int(?arp4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($arp4__shift_start - real_to_int(?arp4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %arp4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %arp4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %arp4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($arp4__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($arp4__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($arp4__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_arp4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_arp4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $arp4__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $arp4__shift_all_active := 0
      %arp4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?arp4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)

      if($arp4__steps < $arp4__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$arp4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$arp4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%arp4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp1__rhythm_A_edit)
  $arp1__rhythm_A_edit := 1
  $arp1__rhythm_B_edit := 0
  $arp1__edit_active := 0
  call update_arp_label_pos
end on

  $arp1__rhythm_B_edit := 1
  $arp1__rhythm_A_edit := 0

on ui_control($arp1__rate)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
    inc($i)
  end while
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  if($s > 2)
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $arp1__rate := $arp1__rate - 3
    end if
    $i := 5
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    if($s < 3)
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  $a := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 4) 
    if($arp1__rate > 4)
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
    else
      $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
    end if
    if($n # -1)
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
      inc($a)
    else
      set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp1__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  call _update_shown_table
  $s := $arp1__time_signature
  $arp1__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp1__rate)
    case 0
      $arp1__mf_length := 60
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 8
    case 1
      $arp1__mf_length := 120
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 4
    case 2
      $arp1__mf_length := 240
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp1__mf_length := 480
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp1__mf_length := 960
      $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp1__mf_length := 160
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) * 2
    case 6
      $arp1__mf_length := 320
      $arp1__bar_limit := ($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes
    case 7
      $arp1__mf_length := 640
      $arp1__bar_limit := (($arp1__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp1__max_eighth_notes) / 2
  end select
  if($arp1__bar_reset_active = 2)
    $arp1__bar_limit := $arp1__bar_limit * 2
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp2__rate)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
    set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)

    else

    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($arp2__rhythm_steps = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
  end if
  call _update_shown_table

  $arp2__max_eighth_notes := %max_eight_notes_list[$s]
  select($arp2__rate)
    case 0

      $arp2__mf_length := 240
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes * 2
    case 3
      $arp2__mf_length := 480
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes
    case 4
      $arp2__mf_length := 960
      $arp2__bar_limit := $arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2
    case 5
      $arp2__mf_length := 160
      $arp2__bar_limit := (($arp2__max_eighth_notes / 2) + $arp2__max_eighth_notes) * 2

    case 7

  end select
  if($arp2__bar_reset_active = 2)

  end if

  end if

on ui_control($arp1__note_repeat)
  $arp1__repeat_max := $arp1__note_repeat
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $arp1__note_repeat
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($arp1__note_repeat)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($arp1__note_repeat)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on

on ui_control($arp1__rhythm_skip)
  if($arp1__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
end on
on ui_control($arp2__rhythm_skip)
  if($arp2__rhythm_skip = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_main_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_main_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_main_big_array[3])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_deactivated_big_array[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, %font_deactivated_big_array[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[2])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, %font_deactivated_big_array[3])
  end if
end on

on ui_control($arp1__rhythm_copy)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 31) 
    %arp_copy_array_A[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_A[$i]
    %arp_copy_array_B[$i] := %arp1__rhythm_B[$i]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $arp_copy_active := 1
  wait(500)
  $arp1__rhythm_copy := 0
end on
on ui_control($arp2__rhythm_copy)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 31) 
    %arp_copy_array_A[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_A[$i]
    %arp_copy_array_B[$i] := %arp2__rhythm_B[$i]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $arp_copy_active := 1
  wait(500)
  $arp2__rhythm_copy := 0
end on
on ui_control($arp3__rhythm_copy)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 31) 
    %arp_copy_array_A[$i] := %arp3__rhythm_A[$i]

end on

on ui_control($arp1__rhythm_paste)
  if($arp_copy_active = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      %arp1__rhythm_A[$i] := %arp_copy_array_A[$i]
      %arp1__rhythm_B[$i] := %arp_copy_array_B[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
    $arp1__rhythm_A_edit := 0
    $arp1__rhythm_B_edit := 1
    $arp1__edit_active := 1
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_table
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call _on_controller
    wait(500)
  end if
  $arp1__rhythm_paste := 0
end on
