on ui_control(%env1__rhythm)
  $tablequery_idx := $NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
  if((($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG))
    $tablequery_min := $tablequery_idx - 10
    $tablequery_max := $tablequery_idx + 10
    if($tablequery_min < 0)
      $tablequery_min := 0
    end if
    if($tablequery_max > 99)
      $tablequery_max := 99
    end if
  else
    $tablequery_min := 0
    $tablequery_max := 99
  end if
  if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env1__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env1__last_touched) > 300))
        $env1__shift_all_active := 1
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if($env1__edit_active = 0)
            %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]
          else
            if($env1__edit_active = 1)
              %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]
            end if
          end if
          if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          else
            %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          end if
          $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
          $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
          if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            if($env1__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            else
              if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
          else
            if($env1__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            else
              if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
          end if
          if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
          end if
          if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      else
        $env1__shift_diff := %shift_buffer[$tablequery_idx] - %env1__rhythm[$tablequery_idx]
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - $env1__shift_diff
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env1__rhythm[$tb_idx] := $h
            if($env1__edit_active = 0)
              %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            else
              if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              end if
            end if
            if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env1__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env1__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env1__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $env1__shift_all_active := 0
      $i := $tablequery_min
      while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
        $tb_idx := $i
        if($env1__edit_active = 0)
          %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm[$i]
        else
          if($env1__edit_active = 1)
            %env1__rhythm_B[$i] := %env1__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env1__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env1__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($env1__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($env1__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    $i := $tablequery_min
    while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
      if(%env1__rhythm[$i] # 0)
        $tb_idx := $i
        if($env1__edit_active = 0)
          %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm[$i]
        else
          if($env1__edit_active = 1)
            %env1__rhythm_B[$i] := %env1__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env1__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env1__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))

            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3

              %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else

        end if
        %env1__rhythm[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control(%env2__rhythm)
  $tablequery_idx := $NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
  if((($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG))
    $tablequery_min := $tablequery_idx - 10
    $tablequery_max := $tablequery_idx + 10
    if($tablequery_min < 0)
      $tablequery_min := 0
    end if
    if($tablequery_max > 99)
      $tablequery_max := 99
    end if
  else
    $tablequery_min := 0
    $tablequery_max := 99
  end if
  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env2__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env2__last_touched) > 300))
        $env2__shift_all_active := 1
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if($env2__edit_active = 0)
            %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]
          else
            if($env2__edit_active = 1)
              %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]
            end if
          end if
          if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          else
            %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          end if
          $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
          $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
          if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            if($env2__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            else
              if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
          else
            if($env2__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            else
              if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
          end if
          if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
          end if
          if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      else
        $env2__shift_diff := %shift_buffer[$tablequery_idx] - %env2__rhythm[$tablequery_idx]
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - $env2__shift_diff
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env2__rhythm[$tb_idx] := $h
            if($env2__edit_active = 0)
              %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            else
              if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              end if
            end if
            if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env2__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $env2__shift_all_active := 0
      $i := $tablequery_min
      while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
        $tb_idx := $i
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          %env2__rhythm_A[$i] := %env2__rhythm[$i]
        else
          if($env2__edit_active = 1)
            %env2__rhythm_B[$i] := %env2__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else

        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env2__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($env2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else

              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else

on ui_control(%env3__rhythm)
  $tablequery_idx := $NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
  if((($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG))
    $tablequery_min := $tablequery_idx - 10
    $tablequery_max := $tablequery_idx + 10
    if($tablequery_min < 0)
      $tablequery_min := 0
    end if
    if($tablequery_max > 99)
      $tablequery_max := 99
    end if
  else
    $tablequery_min := 0
    $tablequery_max := 99
  end if
  if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env3__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env3__last_touched) > 300))
        $env3__shift_all_active := 1
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if($env3__edit_active = 0)
            %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]
          else
            if($env3__edit_active = 1)
              %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]
            end if
          end if
          if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          else
            %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          end if
          $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
          $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
          if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            if($env3__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            else
              if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
          else
            if($env3__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            else
              if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
          end if
          if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
          end if
          if(%_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      else
        $env3__shift_diff := %shift_buffer[$tablequery_idx] - %env3__rhythm[$tablequery_idx]
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - $env3__shift_diff
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env3__rhythm[$tb_idx] := $h
            if($env3__edit_active = 0)
              %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            else
              if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              end if
            end if
            if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env3__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      $env3__shift_all_active := 0
      $i := $tablequery_min
      while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
        $tb_idx := $i
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          %env3__rhythm_A[$i] := %env3__rhythm[$i]
        else
          if($env3__edit_active = 1)
            %env3__rhythm_B[$i] := %env3__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env3__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env3__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($env3__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($env3__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    $i := $tablequery_min
    while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
      if(%env3__rhythm[$i] # 0)
        $tb_idx := $i
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          %env3__rhythm_A[$i] := %env3__rhythm[$i]
        else
          if($env3__edit_active = 1)
            %env3__rhythm_B[$i] := %env3__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env3__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env3__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))

            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3

              %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))

        end if
        %env3__rhythm[$i] := 0
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control(%env4__rhythm)
  $tablequery_idx := $NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
  if((($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)) or ($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG))
    $tablequery_min := $tablequery_idx - 10
    $tablequery_max := $tablequery_idx + 10
    if($tablequery_min < 0)
      $tablequery_min := 0
    end if
    if($tablequery_max > 99)
      $tablequery_max := 99
    end if
  else
    $tablequery_min := 0
    $tablequery_max := 99
  end if
  if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env4__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env4__last_touched) > 300))
        $env4__shift_all_active := 1
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if($env4__edit_active = 0)
            %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]
          else
            if($env4__edit_active = 1)
              %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]
            end if
          end if
          if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          else
            %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
          end if
          $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
          $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
          if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
            if($env4__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            else
              if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
          else
            if($env4__edit_active = 0)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            else
              if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              end if
            end if
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
          end if
          if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
          end if
          if(%_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      else
        $env4__shift_diff := %shift_buffer[$tablequery_idx] - %env4__rhythm[$tablequery_idx]
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 99) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - $env4__shift_diff
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env4__rhythm[$tb_idx] := $h
            if($env4__edit_active = 0)
              %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm[$tb_idx]
            else
              if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm[$tb_idx]
              end if
            end if
            if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env4__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")

              else

                  %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0

            end if

            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if

            %env4__rhythm_B[$i] := %env4__rhythm[$i]
          end if
        end if
        if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)

        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))

          else

              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else

            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")

          %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1

          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if

        else

        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    $i := $tablequery_min
    while($i <= $tablequery_max) 
      if(%env4__rhythm[$i] # 0)

          %env4__rhythm_A[$i] := %env4__rhythm[$i]

        end if

end on
on ui_control(?env1__rhythm_xy)
  if($env1__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env1__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env1__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env1__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env1__last_touched) > 300))
        $env1__shift_all_active := 1
        $env1__shift_start := real_to_int(?env1__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env1__shift_start - real_to_int(?env1__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env1__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env1__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env1__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env1__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env1__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env1__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if

              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else

            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env1__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else

      end if

            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if

        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($env1__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else

            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env1__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_env1__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if
    $i := $env1__steps
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
      %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i mod $env1__steps]
      %env1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env1__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while

          ~env1__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env1__h)) / int_to_real($env1__h)
