      end while
      if($env1__steps < $env1__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
        call update_arp_label_pos
        call update_mod_graphics
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?env2__rhythm_xy)
  if($env2__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env2__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env2__last_touched) > 300))
        $env2__shift_all_active := 1
        $env2__shift_start := real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env2__shift_start - real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env2__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
      if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($env2__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($env2__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if
    $i := $env2__steps
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
      %env2__rhythm_A[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i mod $env2__steps]
      %env2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env2__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
      $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
      ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
      $env2__steps := 100
      set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
      set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
      if($env2__edit_active = 0)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
    else
      if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env2__time_signature]
        else
          $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env2__time_signature]
        end if
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
        if($env2__steps <= $env2__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__h)
          $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env2__steps))
          ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__h)) / int_to_real($env2__h)
        else
          set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__steps)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__steps)
          $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env2__steps
          ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__steps)) / int_to_real($env2__steps)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $env2__z := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      $env2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      if(($i < $env2__steps) or ((($env2__steps < $env2__h) and ($i < $env2__h)) and ($env2__mode_menu = 1)))
        if($env2__steps > 32)
          if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
            $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          end if
        else
          if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
            $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env2__steps < $env2__h)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    end if
    ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
    if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  else
    if($env2__edit_active = 1)
      $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
          $tb_idx := $i
        else
          if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
            $tb_idx := 31
          end if
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env2__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
        if(($env2__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env2__last_touched) > 300))
          $env2__shift_all_active := 1
          $env2__shift_start := real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 31) 
            %shift_buffer[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $tb_idx := 0
          while($tb_idx <= 31) 
            if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
              $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env2__shift_start - real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
              $i2800 := $h
              $hold_value200 := 0
              $n142 := 127
              call clip
              %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := $h
              if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
              $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
              if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                else
                  if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                    %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
              else
                if($env2__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                else
                  if($env2__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                    %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
              end if
              if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
              end if
              if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              else
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($tb_idx)
          end while
        end if
        $env2__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      else
        %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?env2__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env2__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env2__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env2__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env2__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($env2__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($env2__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env2__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_env2__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
      end if
      $i := $env2__steps
      while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
        %env2__rhythm_B[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i mod $env2__steps]
        %env2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env2__steps]
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
        $env2__steps := 100
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      else
        if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
          if($env2__rate > 4)
            $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env2__time_signature]
          else
            $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env2__time_signature]
          end if
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
            inc($i)
          end while
          $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
          if($env2__steps <= $env2__h)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__h)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__h)
            $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env2__steps))
            ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__h)) / int_to_real($env2__h)
          else
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__steps)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__steps)
            $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env2__steps
            ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__steps)) / int_to_real($env2__steps)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $env2__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        $env2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        if(($i < $env2__steps) or ((($env2__steps < $env2__h) and ($i < $env2__h)) and ($env2__mode_menu = 1)))
          if($env2__steps > 32)
            if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
              $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
            end if
            if($i = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            end if
          else
            if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
              $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
            end if
            if($i = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
            end if
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env2__steps < $env2__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
        call update_arp_label_pos
        call update_mod_graphics
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?env3__rhythm_xy)
  if($env3__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env3__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env3__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env3__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env3__last_touched) > 300))
        $env3__shift_all_active := 1
        $env3__shift_start := real_to_int(?env3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env3__shift_start - real_to_int(?env3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env3__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env3__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env3__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?env3__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
      if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %env3__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%env3__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env3__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($env3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($env3__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env3__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_env3__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if
    $i := $env3__steps
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env3__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
      %env3__rhythm_A[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i mod $env3__steps]
      %env3__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env3__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env3__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
      $env3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
      ~env3__label_width_dynamic := 3.
      $env3__steps := 100
      set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm, 100)
      set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm_indicator, 100)
      if($env3__edit_active = 0)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i]

      if($env3__steps < $env3__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env3__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env3__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
        call update_arp_label_pos
        call update_mod_graphics
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?env4__rhythm_xy)
  if($env4__edit_active = 0)
    $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 31) 
      if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
        $tb_idx := $i
      else
        if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
          $tb_idx := 31
        end if
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
      if(($env4__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env4__last_touched) > 300))
        $env4__shift_all_active := 1
        $env4__shift_start := real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 31) 
          %shift_buffer[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $tb_idx := 0
        while($tb_idx <= 31) 
          if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
            $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env4__shift_start - real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
            $i2800 := $h
            $hold_value200 := 0
            $n142 := 127
            call clip
            %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := $h
            if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            else
              %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
            end if
            $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
            $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
            if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
              if($env4__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
              else
                if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
            else
              if($env4__edit_active = 0)
                set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
              else
                if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                end if
              end if
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
            end if
            if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
            end if
            if(%_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($tb_idx)
        end while
      end if
      $env4__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
      if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      else
        %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
      end if
      $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
      $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
      if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
        if($env4__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
          %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
        else
          if($env4__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
      else
        if($env4__edit_active = 0)
          set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
          %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
        else
          if($env4__edit_active = 1)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
        %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
      end if
      if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
      end if
      if(%_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      else
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
      end if
    end if
    $i := $env4__steps
    while($i <= (num_elements(%env4__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
      %env4__rhythm_A[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i mod $env4__steps]
      %env4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env4__steps]
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
      $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
      ~env4__label_width_dynamic := 3.
      $env4__steps := 100
      set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, 100)
      set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, 100)
      if($env4__edit_active = 0)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
    else
      if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
        if($env4__rate > 4)
          $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env4__time_signature]
        else
          $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env4__time_signature]
        end if
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env4__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        $env4__steps := $env4__rhythm_steps
        if($env4__steps <= $env4__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__h)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__h)
          $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env4__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env4__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env4__steps))
          ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__h)) / int_to_real($env4__h)
        else
          set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__steps)
          set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__steps)
          $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env4__steps
          ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__steps)) / int_to_real($env4__steps)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $env4__z := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      $env4__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env4__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env4__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      if(($i < $env4__steps) or ((($env4__steps < $env4__h) and ($i < $env4__h)) and ($env4__mode_menu = 1)))
        if($env4__steps > 32)
          if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
            $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
          end if
        else
          if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
            $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
          end if
          if($i = 0)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          else
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
            set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env4__steps < $env4__h)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    end if
    ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
    if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
      call update_arp_label_pos
      call update_mod_graphics
    end if
  else
    if($env4__edit_active = 1)
      $xy_cursor_pos_x := get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[0] * int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 31) 
        if((%tb_idx_borders[$i] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x) and (%tb_idx_borders[$i + 1] > $xy_cursor_pos_x))
          $tb_idx := $i
        else
          if(%tb_idx_borders[31] <= $xy_cursor_pos_x)
            $tb_idx := 31
          end if
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?env4__rhythm_xy), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1)
        if(($env4__shift_all_active = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - $env4__last_touched) > 300))
          $env4__shift_all_active := 1
          $env4__shift_start := real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 31) 
            %shift_buffer[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $tb_idx := 0
          while($tb_idx <= 31) 
            if(%shift_buffer[$tb_idx] # 0)
              $h := %shift_buffer[$tb_idx] - ($env4__shift_start - real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.))
              $i2800 := $h
              $hold_value200 := 0
              $n142 := 127
              call clip
              %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := $h
              if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              else
                %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
              end if
              $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
              $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
              if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
                if($env4__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                  %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                else
                  if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                    %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
              else
                if($env4__edit_active = 0)
                  set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
                  %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
                else
                  if($env4__edit_active = 1)
                    set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
                    %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
                  end if
                end if
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
                %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
              end if
              if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
              end if
              if(%_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              else
                set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($tb_idx)
          end while
        end if
        $env4__last_touched := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      else
        %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] := real_to_int(?env4__rhythm_xy[1] * 127.)
        if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] + (((%env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        else
          %env4__rhythm_playback[$tb_idx] := %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - (((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) * %CC[$dyn_cc_menu]) / 127)
        end if
        $label_pos_y_A := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx]))
        $label_pos_y_B := (get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int(~height_per_value * int_to_real(127 - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]))
        if((%env4__rhythm_A[$tb_idx] - %env4__rhythm_B[$tb_idx]) < 0)
          if($env4__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
          else
            if($env4__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_B)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_A - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 0
        else
          if($env4__edit_active = 0)
            set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_top")
            %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 3
          else
            if($env4__edit_active = 1)
              set_control_par_str(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
              %_env4__morph_label_shift[$tb_idx * 2] := 0
            end if
          end if
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, $label_pos_y_A)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $label_pos_y_B - get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
          %_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] := 1
        end if
        if(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) < 4)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 4)
        end if
        if(%_env4__morph_label_shift[($tb_idx * 2) + 1] = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(127 - %CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$tb_idx], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.) * int_to_real(%CC[$dyn_cc_num])))
        end if
      end if
      $i := $env4__steps
      while($i <= (num_elements(%env4__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
        %env4__rhythm_B[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i mod $env4__steps]
        %env4__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env4__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env4__steps]
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
        $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
        ~env4__label_width_dynamic := 3.
        $env4__steps := 100
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, 100)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, 100)
        if($env4__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      else
        if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
          if($env4__rate > 4)
            $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env4__time_signature]
          else
            $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env4__time_signature]
          end if
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env4__rhythm[$i] := 0
            inc($i)
          end while
          $env4__steps := $env4__rhythm_steps
          if($env4__steps <= $env4__h)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__h)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__h)
            $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env4__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env4__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env4__steps))
            ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__h)) / int_to_real($env4__h)
          else
            set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__steps)
            set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__steps)
            $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env4__steps
            ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__steps)) / int_to_real($env4__steps)
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $env4__z := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        $env4__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env4__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env4__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
        if(($i < $env4__steps) or ((($env4__steps < $env4__h) and ($i < $env4__h)) and ($env4__mode_menu = 1)))
          if($env4__steps > 32)
            if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
              $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
            end if
            if($i = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
            end if
          else
            if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
              $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
            end if
            if($i = 0)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
            else
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
              set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
            end if
          end if
        end if
        %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env4__steps < $env4__h)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
      end if
      ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
      if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
        call update_arp_label_pos
        call update_mod_graphics
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env1__envelope_A_edit)
  $env1__envelope_A_edit := 1
  $env1__envelope_B_edit := 0
  $env1__edit_active := 0
  if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  call update_arp_label_pos
end on
on ui_control($env1__envelope_B_edit)
  $env1__envelope_B_edit := 1
  $env1__envelope_A_edit := 0
  $env1__edit_active := 1
  if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  call update_arp_label_pos
end on
on ui_control($env2__envelope_A_edit)
  $env2__envelope_A_edit := 1
  $env2__envelope_B_edit := 0
  $env2__edit_active := 0
  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  call update_arp_label_pos
end on

  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    $i := 0

      %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while

end on

on ui_control($env4__envelope_A_edit)
  $env4__envelope_A_edit := 1
  $env4__envelope_B_edit := 0
