on ui_control($env4__envelope_B_edit)
  $env4__envelope_B_edit := 1
  $env4__envelope_A_edit := 0
  $env4__edit_active := 1
  if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  call update_arp_label_pos
end on
on ui_control($env1__time_signature)
  if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
    select($env1__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 3
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 5
      case 4
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7
    end select
  else
    if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env1__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $env1__rate := $env1__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env1__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      if($NI_CALLBACK_ID # $preset__load_cb)
        $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
        if(($env1__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
          if($a > 0)
            while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $env1__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
              dec($a)
            end while
          end if
        else
          if($env1__rate < 5)
            if($a > 0)
              while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $env1__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
                dec($a)
              end while
            end if
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
    $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
    ~env1__label_width_dynamic := 3.
    $env1__steps := 100
    set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, 100)
    set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, 100)
    if($env1__edit_active = 0)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
      if($env1__rate > 4)
        $env1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env1__time_signature]
      else
        $env1__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env1__time_signature]
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env1__rhythm[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $env1__steps := $env1__rhythm_steps
      if($env1__steps <= $env1__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, $env1__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, $env1__h)
        $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env1__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env1__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env1__steps))
        ~env1__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env1__h)) / int_to_real($env1__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm, $env1__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env1__rhythm_indicator, $env1__steps)
        $env1__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env1__steps
        ~env1__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env1__steps)) / int_to_real($env1__steps)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $env1__z := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    $env1__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env1__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env1__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    if(($i < $env1__steps) or ((($env1__steps < $env1__h) and ($i < $env1__h)) and ($env1__mode_menu = 1)))
      if($env1__steps > 32)
        if($env1__label_width_indicator > $env1__z)
          $env1__z := $env1__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env1__label_width_indicator > $env1__z)
          $env1__z := $env1__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env1__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($env1__steps < $env1__h)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env1__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env1__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if
  ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env1__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env2__time_signature)
  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    select($env2__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2
        $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 3
        $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount := 5
      case 4
        $env2__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7
    end select
  else
    if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env2__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $env2__rate := $env2__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env2__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      if($NI_CALLBACK_ID # $preset__load_cb)
        $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
        if(($env2__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
          if($a > 0)
            while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $env2__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
              dec($a)
            end while
          end if
        else
          if($env2__rate < 5)
            if($a > 0)
              while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $env2__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
                dec($a)
              end while
            end if
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($env2__mode_menu = 0)
    $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
    ~env2__label_width_dynamic := 3.
    $env2__steps := 100
    set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, 100)
    set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, 100)
    if($env2__edit_active = 0)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($env2__mode_menu = 1)
      if($env2__rate > 4)
        $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env2__time_signature]
      else
        $env2__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env2__time_signature]
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
      if($env2__steps <= $env2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__h)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env2__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env2__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env2__steps))
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__h)) / int_to_real($env2__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm, $env2__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env2__rhythm_indicator, $env2__steps)
        $env2__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env2__steps
        ~env2__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env2__steps)) / int_to_real($env2__steps)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $env2__z := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    $env2__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env2__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env2__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    if(($i < $env2__steps) or ((($env2__steps < $env2__h) and ($i < $env2__h)) and ($env2__mode_menu = 1)))
      if($env2__steps > 32)
        if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
          $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env2__label_width_indicator > $env2__z)
          $env2__z := $env2__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env2__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($env2__steps < $env2__h)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env2__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env2__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if
  ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env2__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env3__time_signature)
  if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
    select($env3__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 3
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 5
      case 4
        $env3__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7
    end select
  else
    if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env3__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $env3__rate := $env3__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env3__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      if($NI_CALLBACK_ID # $preset__load_cb)
        $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
        if(($env3__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
          if($a > 0)
            while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $env3__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
              dec($a)
            end while
          end if
        else
          if($env3__rate < 5)
            if($a > 0)
              while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $env3__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
                dec($a)
              end while
            end if
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($env3__mode_menu = 0)
    $env3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
    ~env3__label_width_dynamic := 3.
    $env3__steps := 100
    set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm, 100)
    set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm_indicator, 100)
    if($env3__edit_active = 0)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($env3__mode_menu = 1)
      if($env3__rate > 4)
        $env3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env3__time_signature]
      else
        $env3__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env3__time_signature]
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env3__rhythm[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $env3__steps := $env3__rhythm_steps
      if($env3__steps <= $env3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm, $env3__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm_indicator, $env3__h)
        $env3__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env3__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env3__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env3__steps))
        ~env3__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env3__h)) / int_to_real($env3__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm, $env3__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env3__rhythm_indicator, $env3__steps)
        $env3__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env3__steps
        ~env3__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env3__steps)) / int_to_real($env3__steps)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $env3__z := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    $env3__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env3__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env3__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    if(($i < $env3__steps) or ((($env3__steps < $env3__h) and ($i < $env3__h)) and ($env3__mode_menu = 1)))
      if($env3__steps > 32)
        if($env3__label_width_indicator > $env3__z)
          $env3__z := $env3__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env3__label_width_indicator > $env3__z)
          $env3__z := $env3__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env3__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($env3__steps < $env3__h)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env3__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env3__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if
  ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env3__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env4__time_signature)
  if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
    select($env4__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2
        $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 3
        $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount := 5
      case 4
        $env4__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7
    end select
  else
    if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env4__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env4__rate > 4)
          $env4__rate := $env4__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env4__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env4__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      if($NI_CALLBACK_ID # $preset__load_cb)
        $a := get_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX)
        if(($env4__rate > 4) and ($s < 3))
          if($a > 0)
            while((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $a] > $env4__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
              dec($a)
            end while
          end if
        else
          if($env4__rate < 5)
            if($a > 0)
              while((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] = -1) or ((%_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $a] > $env4__steps) and ($a > 0))) 
                dec($a)
              end while
            end if
          end if
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env4__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  if($env4__mode_menu = 0)
    $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 4
    ~env4__label_width_dynamic := 3.
    $env4__steps := 100
    set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, 100)
    set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, 100)
    if($env4__edit_active = 0)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_A[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env4__rhythm[$i] := %env4__rhythm_B[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  else
    if($env4__mode_menu = 1)
      if($env4__rate > 4)
        $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[$env4__time_signature]
      else
        $env4__h := %signature_rhythm_lengths[$env4__time_signature]
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 99) 
        %env4__rhythm[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $env4__steps := $env4__rhythm_steps
      if($env4__steps <= $env4__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__h)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__h)
        $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := real_to_int(((400. / (int_to_real($env4__h) * 2.)) * (int_to_real($env4__steps) * 2.)) / int_to_real($env4__steps))
        ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__h)) / int_to_real($env4__h)
      else
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm, $env4__steps)
        set_table_steps_shown(%env4__rhythm_indicator, $env4__steps)
        $env4__table_bar_width_dynamic := 406 / $env4__steps
        ~env4__label_width_dynamic := (400. - int_to_real($env4__steps)) / int_to_real($env4__steps)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $env4__z := 0
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    $env4__label_width_indicator := real_to_int((~env4__label_width_dynamic * int_to_real($i + 1)) - (floor(~env4__label_width_dynamic) * int_to_real($i + 1)))
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
    if(($i < $env4__steps) or ((($env4__steps < $env4__h) and ($i < $env4__h)) and ($env4__mode_menu = 1)))
      if($env4__steps > 32)
        if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
          $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
        end if
      else
        if($env4__label_width_indicator > $env4__z)
          $env4__z := $env4__label_width_indicator
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, real_to_int(~env4__label_width_dynamic))
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 8)
        end if
        if($i = 0)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 3)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        else
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
          set_control_par(%rhythm_morph_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 4)
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %tb_idx_borders[$i] := get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X)
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($env4__steps < $env4__h)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (%tb_idx_borders[$env4__steps - 1] + get_control_par(%rhythm_morph_range_indicators[$env4__steps - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, ((get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)) - 3) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($engine_grey_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 2000)
  end if
  ~height_per_value := int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(%env4__rhythm), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - 6) / 127.
  if(($see_page = 4) and in_range($see_main_subpage, 8, 17))
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call update_mod_graphics
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env1__note_selection)
  call update_note_selection
end on
on ui_control($env2__note_selection)
  call update_note_selection
end on
on ui_control($env3__note_selection)
  call update_note_selection
end on
on ui_control($env4__note_selection)
  call update_note_selection
end on
on ui_control($env1__rate)
  if($env1__mode_menu = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
      set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    $s := $env1__time_signature
    if($s > 2)
      if($env1__rate > 4)
        $env1__rate := $env1__rate - 3
      end if
      $i := 5
      while($i <= 7) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
    else
      if($s < 3)
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
    end if
    $a := 0
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 4) 
      if($env1__rate > 4)
        $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
      else
        $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
      end if
      if($n # -1)
        set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
        inc($a)
      else
        set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if($env1__rhythm_steps = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
    end if
    call _update_shown_envelope
  else
    select($env1__time_signature)
      case 0
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 8
      case 1
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 2
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 6
      case 3
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 5
      case 4
        $env1__eight_notes_bar_amount := 7
    end select
  end if
end on

on ui_control($env1__mode_menu)
  select($env1__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env1__last_mode # $env1__mode_menu) and ($env1__last_mode # -1))
        $env1__rate := 96
        if($env1__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env1__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env1__last_mode # $env1__mode_menu) and ($env1__last_mode # -1))
        $env1__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env1__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env1__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $env1__rate := $env1__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env1__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env1__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env1__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env2__mode_menu)
  select($env2__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env2__last_mode # $env2__mode_menu) and ($env2__last_mode # -1))
        $env2__rate := 96
        if($env2__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env2__rhythm[$i] := %env2__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env2__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env2__last_mode # $env2__mode_menu) and ($env2__last_mode # -1))
        $env2__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env2__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env2__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $env2__rate := $env2__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env2__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env2__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env2__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
end on
on ui_control($env3__mode_menu)
  select($env3__mode_menu)
    case 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env3__last_mode # $env3__mode_menu) and ($env3__last_mode # -1))
        $env3__rate := 96
        if($env3__edit_active = 0)
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_A[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        else
          $i := 0
          while($i <= 99) 
            %env3__rhythm[$i] := %env3__rhythm_B[$i]
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $env3__last_mode := 0
    case 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := num_elements(!arp_rates_list)
      while($i <= (num_elements(!arp_rates_list) + 4)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(($env3__last_mode # $env3__mode_menu) and ($env3__last_mode # -1))
        $env3__rate := 3
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 99) 
          %env3__rhythm[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
      end if
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%_rhythm_steps_list) - 1)) 
        set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 0)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $s := $env3__time_signature
      if($s > 2)
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $env3__rate := $env3__rate - 3
        end if
        $i := 5
        while($i <= 7) 
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 0)
          inc($i)
        end while
      else
        if($s < 3)
          $i := 5
          while($i <= 7) 
            set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rate), $i, 1)
            inc($i)
          end while
        end if
      end if
      $a := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        if($env3__rate > 4)
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list_triplets[($s * 5) + $i]
        else
          $n := %_rhythm_steps_list[($s * 5) + $i]
        end if
        if($n # -1)
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
          set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, 1)
          inc($a)
        else
          set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $i, $n)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($env3__rhythm_steps = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($env3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $a - 1)
      end if
      $env3__last_mode := 1
  end select
  if((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_INIT) and ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED)) and ($preset__is_loading # 1))
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_envelope_target
  end if
end on

on ui_control($env1__rhythm_steps)
  $env1__steps := $env1__rhythm_steps
  $i := $env1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i mod $env1__steps]
    %env1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := $env1__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env1__rhythm_B) - 1)) 
    %env1__rhythm_B[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i mod $env1__steps]
    %env1__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env1__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env1__steps]
    inc($i)
  end while
  call _update_shown_envelope
end on
on ui_control($env2__rhythm_steps)
  $env2__steps := $env2__rhythm_steps
  $i := $env2__steps
  while($i <= (num_elements(%env2__rhythm_A) - 1)) 
    %env2__rhythm_A[$i] := %env2__rhythm_A[$i mod $env2__steps]
    %env2__rhythm_playback[$i] := %env2__rhythm_playback[$i mod $env2__steps]

  end while
  $i := $env2__steps

  if($env1__retrigger = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_white)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($env1__retrigger_label), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, $font_main_big_grey)
  end if
end on

  end if
end on

on ui_control($env1__table_copy)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 99) 
    %env_copy_array_A[$i] := %env1__rhythm_A[$i]
    %env_copy_array_B[$i] := %env1__rhythm_B[$i]
    inc($i)
  end while
  $env_copy_active := 1
  wait(500)
  $env1__table_copy := 0
end on

  $i := 0

on ui_control($env1__table_paste)
  if($env_copy_active = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 99) 
      if($env1__mode_menu = 0)
        %env1__rhythm[$i] := %env_copy_array_A[$i]
      end if
      %env1__rhythm_A[$i] := %env_copy_array_A[$i]
      %env1__rhythm_B[$i] := %env_copy_array_B[$i]
      inc($i)
    end while
    $env1__envelope_A_edit := 1
    $env1__edit_active := 1
    call update_visibility
    call _update_shown_envelope
    call update_arp_label_pos
    call _on_controller
    wait(500)
  end if
  $env1__table_paste := 0
end on

end on
on ui_control($humanize_amount)
  $humanize_max := 150 * $humanize_amount
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($humanize_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Humanize " & $humanize_amount & " %")
end on
on ui_control($engine_next_slot)
  inc($engine_active_slot)
  if($engine_active_slot > 4)
    $engine_active_slot := 1
  end if
  call change_engine_page
end on
on ui_control($engine_prev_slot)
  dec($engine_active_slot)
  if($engine_active_slot < 1)
    $engine_active_slot := 4
  end if
  call change_engine_page
end on
on ui_control($instr_browser__empty)
  %loaded_instruments[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot] := 0
  set_control_par(%assign_slots_ids[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(%attack[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  set_control_par_str(%decay[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  call remote_character_buttons
  call remote_instr_buttons
  call hide_instr_buttons
  %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
      %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
        inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
    end if
    if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
      %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
        inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
    end if
    %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
      inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  call update_key_colors
  call panstep_setting_pan1
  call panstep_setting_pan2
  call reset_modulators
  call panstep_bypass_pan1
  call panstep_bypass_pan2
  call update_pan_slot_graphics
  call update_pan_step_text
  call update_pan_head_labels
  call update_assigned_instruments
  wait(300000)
  $instr_browser__empty := 0
  call update_instr_labels
  call update_solo
  set_control_par_str(%attack[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  set_control_par_str(%decay[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
end on
on ui_control($instr_browser__prev_slot)
  dec($instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
  if($instr_browser__active_instr_slot < 0)
    $instr_browser__active_instr_slot := 4
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
  call update_instr_number_buttons
  call go_to_active_art
end on
on ui_control($instr_browser__next_slot)
  inc($instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
  if($instr_browser__active_instr_slot > 4)
    $instr_browser__active_instr_slot := 0
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($instr_browser__slot_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instr_browser__active_instr_slot)
  call update_instr_number_buttons
  call go_to_active_art
end on
on ui_control($instr_browser__btn_cat0)
  call remote_character_buttons
  set_control_par(%instr_browser__btn_cat[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  $instr_browser__current_character_selection := 0
  call show_instr_button
  call build_instrument_scroll_menu
  call update_scroll
  $instr_browser__scrollstep_is_set := 0
  call update_instrument_buttons
end on

on ui_control($instr_browser__instr0)
  if(%_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[7] = 0)
    %loaded_instruments[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot] := %_instr_browser__current_instr_button_states[0]
    %slots_rrCount[$instr_browser__active_instr_slot] := 0
    %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
      if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
          inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      end if
      if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
          purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
          inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      end if
      %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
        inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    call update_key_colors
    call panstep_setting_pan1
    call panstep_setting_pan2
    call reset_modulators
    call panstep_bypass_pan1
    call panstep_bypass_pan2
    call update_pan_slot_graphics
    call update_pan_step_text
    call update_pan_head_labels
    call update_instr_labels
    call update_engine_visibility
    call update_assigned_instruments
    call update_solo
    call update_instrument_buttons
  end if
  call double_click
  $instr_browser__instr0 := 1
end on

end on

on ui_control($mixer__vol0)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__vol0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__vol0)
  @ctrl_unit := " dB"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__vol_value0)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
  call update_vol_handles
end on

  call update_vol_handles
end on

  call update_vol_handles
end on

on ui_control($mixer__delay_bypass)
  call update_fx_active_labels
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__delay_bypass
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_bypass)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_bypass)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($mixer__delay_preset_menu)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%mixer__del_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !del_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)] & ".nka")
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(100)
  end while
  if($load_id = -1)
    $preset__n := 0
    $visible_deny := 1
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_sync), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_time), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    call update_delay_time
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback)
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback)
    call handle_control_change
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " Hz"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut)
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_hicut)
    call handle_control_change
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__delay_return
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return)
    @ctrl_unit := " dB"
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_return)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_LOWCUT, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
    inc($preset__n)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_PINGPONG, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
    inc($preset__n)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
    inc($preset__n)
    if(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, -1, 1, 0) = $NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_MODERN)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
    else
      if(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, -1, 1, 0) = $NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_ANALOGUE)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_BBDTYPE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
      else
        if(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, -1, 1, 0) = $NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_TAPE)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_NOISE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
          inc($preset__n)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TAPEAGE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
          inc($preset__n)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_FLUTTER, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
          inc($preset__n)
          set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
          inc($preset__n)
        else
          if(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, -1, 1, 0) = $NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_VINTAGE)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
            inc($preset__n)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
            inc($preset__n)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
            inc($preset__n)
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_QUALITY, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
            inc($preset__n)
          else
            if(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, -1, 1, 0) = $NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_DIFFUSION)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DENSE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
              inc($preset__n)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_AMOUNT, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
              inc($preset__n)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SIZE, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
              inc($preset__n)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RDL_MODULATION, %mixer__del_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, 0)
              inc($preset__n)
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $visible_deny := 0
  end if
  if($load_id = 0)
    message("Delay Preset Array Not Found: " & !del_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__delay_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  end if
end on
on ui_control($mixer__delay_sync)
  call update_delay_time
end on
on ui_control($mixer__delay_time)
  call update_delay_time
end on
on ui_control($mixer__delay_feedback)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__delay_feedback
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback)
  @ctrl_unit := " %"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__delay_feedback_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on

on ui_control($mixer__rev_bypass)
  call update_fx_active_labels
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $mixer__rev_bypass
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_bypass)

on ui_control($mixer__rev_preset_menu)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%mixer__rev_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !rev_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)] & ".nka")
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(100)
  end while
  if($load_id = -1)
    $preset__n := 0
    $mixer__rev_type := %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n]
    call update_rev_type
    $visible_deny := 1
    inc($preset__n)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
    inc($preset__n)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__rev_return
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)
    @ctrl_unit := " dB"
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
    if($mixer__rev_type = 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__ir_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      call update_ir
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
      !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
      $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
      call handle_control_change
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
      !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      $ctrl := $mixer__rev_time
      $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
      @ctrl_unit := " ms"
      $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
      @ctrl_label_text := ""
      call handle_control_change
    end if
    if(($mixer__rev_type = 1) or ($mixer__rev_type = 2))
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
    end if
    if($mixer__rev_type = 3)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
      inc($preset__n)
    end if
    $visible_deny := 0
  end if
  if($load_id = 0)
    message("Reverb Preset Array Not Found: " & !rev_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  end if
end on
on ui_control($mixer__rev_type)
  call update_rev_type
  call update_rev_preset_menu
  if($mixer__rev_type > 0)
    $load_id := load_array_str(%mixer__rev_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !rev_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)] & ".nka")
    while($load_id > 0) 
      wait(100)
    end while
    if($load_id = -1)
      $preset__n := 0
      $mixer__rev_type := %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n]
      call update_rev_type
      $visible_deny := 1
      inc($preset__n)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
      !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      $ctrl := $mixer__rev_return
      $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)
      @ctrl_unit := " dB"
      $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)
      @ctrl_label_text := ""
      call handle_control_change
      if($mixer__rev_type = 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__ir_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        call update_ir
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
        !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
        $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
        $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
        call handle_control_change
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
        !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
        $ctrl := $mixer__rev_time
        $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
        @ctrl_unit := " ms"
        $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
        @ctrl_label_text := ""
        call handle_control_change
      end if
      if(($mixer__rev_type = 1) or ($mixer__rev_type = 2))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
      end if
      if($mixer__rev_type = 3)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO, %mixer__rev_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 0, 0)
        inc($preset__n)
      end if
      $visible_deny := 0
    end if
    if($load_id = 0)
      message("Reverb Preset Array Not Found: " & !rev_preset_names[get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__rev_preset_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($mixer__rev_predelay)
  if($mixer__rev_type # 0)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__rev_predelay
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay)
    @ctrl_unit := " ms"
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_predelay_value_label)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  end if
end on
on ui_control($mixer__rev_time)
  if($mixer__rev_type # 0)
    !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
    !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    $ctrl := $mixer__rev_time
    $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time)
    @ctrl_unit := " ms"
    $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_time_value_label)
    @ctrl_label_text := ""
    call handle_control_change
  end if
end on

  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""

  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return)
  @ctrl_unit := " dB"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($mixer__rev_return_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
