on ui_control($mnu_gui)
  $gui_idx := $mnu_gui
  @lib_prefix := !gui_prefix[$gui_idx]
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite")
    $u := 0
    while($u <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], %font_types[$u], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + $u])
      inc($u)
    end while
    inc($i)
  end while
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_browser_scroll")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_save_dialog), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "lbl_browser_saveoverlay")
  $ii := 0
  while($ii <= 4) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_categories[$ii], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__category_font[(num_elements(%fonts__category_font) * $gui_idx) + %category_active[$ii]])
    $i := %category_accum[$ii]
    while($i <= (%category_accum[$ii + 1] - 1)) 
      if(%tag_mask_array[$i] = -1)
        $u := 0
        while($u <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], %font_types[$u], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + $u])
          inc($u)
        end while
      else
        $u := 0
        while($u <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], %font_types[$u], %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 5])
          inc($u)
        end while
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    inc($ii)
  end while
  set_control_par_str(%tag_button_array[22], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_refresh")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_exit), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_close")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_clear_tags), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_clear")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_current_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__current_preset_font[num_elements(%fonts__current_preset_font) * $gui_idx])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_save), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_save")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_favorite")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_previous), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_arrow_back")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_next), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_arrow_next")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_save_confirm), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_confirm")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_warning), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_save_cancel), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, @lib_prefix & "btn_browser_cancel")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__current_preset_font[num_elements(%fonts__current_preset_font) * $gui_idx])
  call update__btn_active_status
  call change_gui
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($btn_exit)
  $btn_exit := 0
  if($saving_preset = 1)
    call off_saving_preset_dialog
  end if
  $see_page := 4
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($btn_clear_tags)
  call clear_tags
  call on_button_tag
  call update__btn_active_status
end on
on ui_control($btn_previous)
  $btn_previous := 0
  if((($preset_scan = 0) and ($saving_preset = 0)) and ($preset__is_loading = 0))
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 0
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) # -1)
      $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - 1) + $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS) mod $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
    else
      $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, -1) - 1]
    end if
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 1
    if((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) = -1)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) + 1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    if(not in_range(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx), $scroll__up, ($scroll__up + 14) - 1))
      dec($scroll__up)
      call update__preset_button_focus
      call update__scrollarea
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
    if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
      if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
        $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
        message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
        if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
          $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message("loading user_preset")
        else
          $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
        end if
        while($load_id > 0) 
          wait(10)
        end while
        if($load_id = -1)
          call load_preset
          %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
            if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
            end if
            if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
            end if
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
            inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          call update_key_colors
          call panstep_setting_pan1
          call panstep_setting_pan2
          call reset_modulators
          call panstep_bypass_pan1
          call panstep_bypass_pan2
          call update_pan_slot_graphics
          call update_pan_step_text
          call update_pan_head_labels
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($see_page = 4)
      call remote_page_buttons
      call remote_fx_page_buttons
      call remote_instr_number_buttons
      call update_preview_engine_text
      $main_page_button := 1
      $see_page := 4
      $see_main_subpage := 7
      call update_visibility
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_next)
  $btn_next := 0
  if((($preset_scan = 0) and ($saving_preset = 0)) and ($preset__is_loading = 0))
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 0
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) # -1)
      $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) + 1) mod $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
    else
      $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[0]
    end if
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 1
    if((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) >= 14)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) - 1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    if(not in_range(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx), $scroll__up, ($scroll__up + 14) - 1))
      inc($scroll__up)
      if($scroll__up > search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx))
        $scroll__up := search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)
      else
        if((search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up) > 14)
          $scroll__up := (search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - 14) + 2
        end if
      end if
      call update__scrollarea
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
    if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
      if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
        $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
        message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
        if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
          $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message("loading user_preset")
        else
          $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
          message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
        end if
        while($load_id > 0) 
          wait(10)
        end while
        if($load_id = -1)
          call load_preset
          %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
            if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
            end if
            if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
            end if
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
            inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          call update_key_colors
          call panstep_setting_pan1
          call panstep_setting_pan2
          call reset_modulators
          call panstep_bypass_pan1
          call panstep_bypass_pan2
          call update_pan_slot_graphics
          call update_pan_step_text
          call update_pan_head_labels
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($see_page = 4)
      call remote_page_buttons
      call remote_fx_page_buttons
      call remote_instr_number_buttons
      call update_preview_engine_text
      $main_page_button := 1
      $see_page := 4
      $see_main_subpage := 7
      call update_visibility
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_current_favorite)
  if($saving_preset = 0)
    %favorite_presets_array[$preset__idx] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
    %final_favorite_presets_array[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    if(in_range(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx), $scroll__up, ($scroll__up + 14) - 1))
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
  end if
end on
on ui_control($sli_scrollbar)
  if($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS > 14)
    $scroll__up := ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14) - ((($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 14) * $sli_scrollbar) / 1000000)
    $scroll__up := $scroll__up
    ~scroll__realup := int_to_real($scroll__up)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 13) 
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "      " & !final_preset_title_array[$i + $scroll__up])
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %btn_preset_onoff[$i + $scroll__up])
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %final_favorite_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up])
      if(%end_of_presets_array[$i + $scroll__up] = -1)
        set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(%btn_preset_favorite[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((290 - $handle_size) - (($sli_scrollbar * (290 - $handle_size)) / 1000000)))
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_tag1)
  if(%tag_mask_array[0] = -1)
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $tag_active := 1
    else
      $tag_active := 0
    end if
    call filter__toggle_tag_buttons
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[0], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 22) 
        if($i # 0)
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  if($saving_preset = 0)
    if(%tag_mask_array[0] = -1)
      call on_button_tag
    else
      %btn_tags_state[0] := 0
      set_control_par(%tag_button_array[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%tag_button_array) - 1)) 
      if(in_range($i, %category_accum[0], %category_accum[1] - 1))
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      if((get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) or ($i = 5))
        %tag_mask_array[$i] := -1
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
      else
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_tag2)
  if(%tag_mask_array[1] = -1)
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $tag_active := 2
    else
      $tag_active := 0
    end if
    call filter__toggle_tag_buttons
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[1], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 22) 
        if($i # 1)
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  if($saving_preset = 0)
    if(%tag_mask_array[1] = -1)
      call on_button_tag
    else
      %btn_tags_state[1] := 0
      set_control_par(%tag_button_array[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%tag_button_array) - 1)) 
      if(in_range($i, %category_accum[0], %category_accum[1] - 1))
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      if((get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) or ($i = 5))
        %tag_mask_array[$i] := -1
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
      else
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on

      if((get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) or ($i = 5))
        %tag_mask_array[$i] := -1
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
      else
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_tag15)
  if(%tag_mask_array[14] = -1)
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[14], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $tag_active := 15
    else
      $tag_active := 0
    end if
    call filter__toggle_tag_buttons
    if(get_control_par(%tag_button_array[14], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 22) 
        if($i # 14)
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
  end if
  if($saving_preset = 0)
    if(%tag_mask_array[14] = -1)
      call on_button_tag
    else
      %btn_tags_state[14] := 0
      set_control_par(%tag_button_array[14], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%tag_button_array) - 1)) 
      if(in_range($i, %category_accum[0], %category_accum[1] - 1))
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      if((get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) or ($i = 5))
        %tag_mask_array[$i] := -1
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
      else
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        set_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
end on

on ui_control($btn_tag23)
  if((search(%final_favorite_presets_array, 1) # -1) or (%btn_tags_state[22] = 1))
    call on_button_tag
  else
    set_control_par(%tag_button_array[22], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_favorite0)
  %final_favorite_presets_array[$scroll__up] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up]] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
  if(%final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up] = $preset__idx)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_favorite1)
  %final_favorite_presets_array[$scroll__up + 1] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[1 + $scroll__up]] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
  if(%final_preset_numbers_array[1 + $scroll__up] = $preset__idx)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on

  %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[10 + $scroll__up]] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite10), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
  if(%final_preset_numbers_array[10 + $scroll__up] = $preset__idx)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite10), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_favorite11)
  %final_favorite_presets_array[$scroll__up + 11] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite11), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[11 + $scroll__up]] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite11), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
  if(%final_preset_numbers_array[11 + $scroll__up] = $preset__idx)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite11), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on

end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_favorite13)
  %final_favorite_presets_array[$scroll__up + 13] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  %favorite_presets_array[%final_preset_numbers_array[13 + $scroll__up]] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
  if(%final_preset_numbers_array[13 + $scroll__up] = $preset__idx)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_current_favorite), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_favorite13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  end if
  call update__btn_active_status
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_button0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button0), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 25)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button0), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if(($preset__idx # -1) and (%preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] = %final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up]))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 0)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
    if($i # $scroll__up)
      %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
        $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[$i]
      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__btn_active_status
  if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_button1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 25)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button1), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if(($preset__idx # -1) and (%preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] = %final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up + 1]))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up + 1] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 1)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
    if($i # ($scroll__up + 1))
      %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button1), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
        $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[$i]
      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__btn_active_status
  if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up + 2] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 2)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1))

      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while

    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx

        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if

        wait(10)
      end while

        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0

              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while

        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

  end if

    end if

        call load_preset

              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_button4)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button4), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 25)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button4), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if(($preset__idx # -1) and (%preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] = %final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up + 4]))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button4), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up + 4] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button4), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 4)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
    if($i # ($scroll__up + 4))
      %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button4), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
        $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[$i]
      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__btn_active_status
  if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on

    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_button9)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button9), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 25)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button9), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if(($preset__idx # -1) and (%preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] = %final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up + 9]))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button9), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up + 9] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button9), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 9)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
    if($i # ($scroll__up + 9))
      %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button9), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
        $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[$i]
      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__btn_active_status
  if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

        call panstep_bypass_pan2

            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_preset_button13)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button13), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 25)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button13), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  $new_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  if(($preset__idx # -1) and (%preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] = %final_preset_numbers_array[$scroll__up + 13]))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    %btn_preset_onoff[$scroll__up + 13] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 13) 
    if($i # 13)
      set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= ($NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS - 1)) 
    if($i # ($scroll__up + 13))
      %btn_preset_onoff[$i] := 0
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_preset_button13), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
        $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[$i]
      else
        $preset__idx := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  call update__btn_active_status
  if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
    if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
      if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("loading user_preset")
      else
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
        message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
      end if
      while($load_id > 0) 
        wait(10)
      end while
      if($load_id = -1)
        call load_preset
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
          if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
              set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
              purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
              inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
          end if
          %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
            set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
            inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        call update_key_colors
        call panstep_setting_pan1
        call panstep_setting_pan2
        call reset_modulators
        call panstep_bypass_pan1
        call panstep_bypass_pan2
        call update_pan_slot_graphics
        call update_pan_step_text
        call update_pan_head_labels
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $second_click_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  wait(402000)
  if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - $second_click_time) > 400)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_double_click), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_double_click)
  call double_click
end on
on ui_control($btn_save_confirm)
  $btn_save_confirm := 0
  $preset__overwrite := ($preset__overwrite + 1) mod 2
  $i := %preset__array[3]
  $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
  wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka"))
  if($saving_preset = 2)
    if($i = %preset__array[3])
      $load_id := 0
    end if
  end if
  if((($load_id = -1) and (%preset__array[1] # 0)) and ($preset__overwrite = 1))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font_blurred[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font_blurred) * $gui_idx) + 1])
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_overwrite), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "File already exists. Overwrite?")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_overwrite), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts__base_font[(num_elements(%fonts__base_font) * $gui_idx) + 1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_overwrite), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $preset__overwrite := 0
  end if
  if($preset__overwrite = 0)
    if($saving_preset = 1)
      @preset__usr_name := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
      if($saving_preset = 2)
        @preset__usr_name := !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)]
      end if
      $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
      wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka"))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 22) 
        %btn_tags_state[$i] := get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($i)
      end while
      $a100000 := num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1
      $i60000 := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
        $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
        inc($i)
      end while
      %preset__array[2] := $i60000
      %user_deleted_presets[$NUM_USER_PRESETS] := 1
      if(($load_id = -1) and (%preset__array[1] # 0))
        %user_preset_tags[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := %preset__array[2]
        !user_preset_titles[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := @preset__usr_name
        %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := 1
      else
        $a100000 := num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1
        $i60000 := 0
        $i := 0
        while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
          $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
          inc($i)
        end while
        %user_preset_tags[$NUM_USER_PRESETS] := $i60000
        !user_preset_titles[$NUM_USER_PRESETS] := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
        $SIZE01 := $NUM_USER_PRESETS + 999
        call validate__user__preset__idx
        %preset__array[3] := $i41
        %user_preset_numbers[$NUM_USER_PRESETS] := %preset__array[3]
      end if
      %preset__array[0] := $HL_VERSION
      %preset__array[1] := 1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 4) 
        %preset__save_order_array[$i] := $i
        inc($i)
      end while
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      if($saving_preset # 0)
        $preset__n := 4
      else
        $preset__n := 0
      end if
      %preset__array[$preset__n] := $HL_VERSION
      inc($preset__n)
      message("PRESET N: " & $preset__n)
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := %loaded_instruments[%preset__save_order_array[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]
        inc($preset__n)
        inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      %c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        select(%preset__save_order_array[%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          case 0
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__transpose), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__octave), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0

              inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

          case 1

        end select

      end while
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 63) 
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := %pan2__panstep[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        inc($preset__n)
        inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_monophonic), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
