                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
              case 2
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
                inc($preset__n)
            end select
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 3
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
              case 0
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
              case 1
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
              case 2
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
                %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
                inc($preset__n)
            end select
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
        end select
        inc(%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      $save_array_id := save_array(%preset__array, 0)
      wait(150000)
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
        set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, -1)
        set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        %preset__save_order_array[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
        $preset__save_go := 0
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__save_go), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      $preset__save := 0
      save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
      $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
      call update__preset_situation
      if($saving_preset = 1)
        $preset__idx := %preset__array[3]
        call preset_tags_action
      end if
      save_array(%user_deleted_presets, 1)
      save_array(%user_preset_tags, 1)
      save_array(!user_preset_titles, 1)
      save_array(%user_preset_numbers, 1)
      $btn_save := 0
      call off_saving_preset_dialog
      if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
        if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
          $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
          message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
          if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("loading user_preset")
          else
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
          end if
          while($load_id > 0) 
            wait(10)
          end while
          if($load_id = -1)
            call load_preset
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
              if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
              %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
              inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            call update_key_colors
            call panstep_setting_pan1
            call panstep_setting_pan2
            call reset_modulators
            call panstep_bypass_pan1
            call panstep_bypass_pan2
            call update_pan_slot_graphics
            call update_pan_step_text
            call update_pan_head_labels
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if($saving_preset = 2)
        @preset__usr_name := !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)]
        message("@preset.usr_name: " & @preset__usr_name)
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
        wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka"))
        $i := 0
        while($i <= 22) 
          %btn_tags_state[$i] := get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
          inc($i)
        end while
        %preset__array[1] := 0
        save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
        wait_async(save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka"))
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
          %preset__arrayBuffer[$i] := %preset__array[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
        %preset__arrayBuffer[1] := 1
        $a100000 := num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1
        $i60000 := 0
        $i := 0
        while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
          $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
          inc($i)
        end while
        %preset__arrayBuffer[2] := $i60000
        $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
        wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka"))
        %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := 0
        %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := 1
        %user_preset_tags[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := %preset__arrayBuffer[2]
        !user_preset_titles[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
          %preset__array[$i] := %preset__arrayBuffer[$i]
          %preset__arrayBuffer[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
        message("SAVED AS: " & @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
        call update__preset_situation
        $preset__idx := %preset__array[3]
        save_array(%user_deleted_presets, 1)
        save_array(%user_preset_tags, 1)
        save_array(!user_preset_titles, 1)
        save_array(%user_preset_numbers, 1)
        $btn_save := 0
        call off_saving_preset_dialog
        if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
          if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
            $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
            message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
            if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
              $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
              message("loading user_preset")
            else
              $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
              message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
              message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
            end if
            while($load_id > 0) 
              wait(10)
            end while
            if($load_id = -1)
              call load_preset
              %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
                if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
                  %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                  while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                    purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                    inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  end while
                end if
                if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
                  %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                  while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                    purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                    inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                  end while
                end if
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
                %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
                inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
              call update_key_colors
              call panstep_setting_pan1
              call panstep_setting_pan2
              call reset_modulators
              call panstep_bypass_pan1
              call panstep_bypass_pan2
              call update_pan_slot_graphics
              call update_pan_step_text
              call update_pan_head_labels
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $preset__overwrite := 0
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_save_cancel)
  $btn_save_cancel := 0
  call off_saving_preset_dialog
end on
on ui_control($btn_edit_tags)
  if((($saving_disabled = 0) and ($preset_scan = 0)) and (($saving_preset = 0) or ($saving_preset = 2)))
    if($btn_edit_tags = 1)
      $saving_preset := 2
      call on_saving_preset_dialog
    else
      @preset__usr_name := !preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)]
      message("@preset.usr_name: " & @preset__usr_name)
      $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
      wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka"))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 22) 
        %btn_tags_state[$i] := get_control_par(%tag_button_array[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($i)
      end while
      %preset__array[1] := 0
      save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka")
      wait_async(save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & @preset__usr_name & ".nka"))
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
        %preset__arrayBuffer[$i] := %preset__array[$i]
        inc($i)
      end while
      %preset__arrayBuffer[1] := 1
      $a100000 := num_elements(%btn_tags_state) - 1
      $i60000 := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= ($a100000 - 1)) 
        $i60000 := $i60000 + (%btn_tags_state[($a100000 - 1) - $i] * real_to_int(pow(2., int_to_real($i))))
        inc($i)
      end while
      %preset__arrayBuffer[2] := $i60000
      $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
      wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka"))
      %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := 0
      %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := 1
      %user_preset_tags[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := %preset__arrayBuffer[2]
      !user_preset_titles[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__arrayBuffer[3])] := get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
        %preset__array[$i] := %preset__arrayBuffer[$i]
        %preset__arrayBuffer[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
      message("SAVED AS: " & @basepath & get_control_par_str(get_ui_id(@txt_presetname), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT) & ".nka")
      call update__preset_situation
      $preset__idx := %preset__array[3]
      save_array(%user_deleted_presets, 1)
      save_array(%user_preset_tags, 1)
      save_array(!user_preset_titles, 1)
      save_array(%user_preset_numbers, 1)
      $btn_save := 0
      call off_saving_preset_dialog
      if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
        if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
          $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
          message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
          if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("loading user_preset")
          else
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
          end if
          while($load_id > 0) 
            wait(10)
          end while
          if($load_id = -1)
            call load_preset
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
              if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
              %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
              inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            call update_key_colors
            call panstep_setting_pan1
            call panstep_setting_pan2
            call reset_modulators
            call panstep_bypass_pan1
            call panstep_bypass_pan2
            call update_pan_slot_graphics
            call update_pan_step_text
            call update_pan_head_labels
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  else
    $btn_edit_tags := 0
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_delete_preset)
  $btn_delete_preset := 0
  if((($saving_disabled = 0) and ($preset_scan = 0)) and ($saving_preset = 0))
    if($saving_preset # 0)
      call off_saving_preset_dialog
    end if
    $saving_preset := 0
    $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !final_preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
    wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !final_preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka"))
    %preset__array[1] := 0
    %user_deleted_presets[search(%user_preset_numbers, %preset__array[3])] := 0
    save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !final_preset_title_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
    $i := search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)
    while($i <= (num_elements(%favorite_presets_array) - 1)) 
      if($i < (num_elements(%favorite_presets_array) - 1))
        %favorite_presets_array[$i] := %favorite_presets_array[$i + 1]
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
    $preset__idx := %preset_numbers_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - 1]
    call update__preset_situation
    save_array(%user_deleted_presets, 1)
    save_array(%user_preset_tags, 1)
    save_array(!user_preset_titles, 1)
    save_array(%user_preset_numbers, 1)
    $saving_preset := 0
    call on_button_tag
    if(search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) # -1)
      $preset__idx := %final_preset_numbers_array[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) mod $NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS]
    else
      $preset__idx := $preset__idx
    end if
    %btn_preset_onoff[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] := 1
    set_control_par(%btn_preset_button[search(%final_preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx) - $scroll__up], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    if($see_page # 4)
      call update__preset_button_focus
      call update__scrollarea
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
    if(search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__last_idx) = -1)
      message("loaded preset has been deleted")
      if(($preset__is_loading = 0) and ($preset__idx # -1))
        if($preset__idx # $preset__last_idx)
          $preset__last_idx := $preset__idx
          message("preset_numbers_array: " & %preset_numbers_array[$preset__idx] & ", preset.idx: " & $preset__idx)
          if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("loading user_preset")
          else
            $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message(@presetpath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
            message("LOADING PRESET ARRAY")
          end if
          while($load_id > 0) 
            wait(10)
          end while
          if($load_id = -1)
            call load_preset
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
              if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
                  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
                %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
                while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                  purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
                  inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
                end while
              end if
              %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
              while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
                set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
                inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
              end while
              %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
              inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
            end while
            call update_key_colors
            call panstep_setting_pan1
            call panstep_setting_pan2
            call reset_modulators
            call panstep_bypass_pan1
            call panstep_bypass_pan2
            call update_pan_slot_graphics
            call update_pan_step_text
            call update_pan_head_labels
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_scan_presets)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($file_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_BASEPATH, @basepath)
  if($saving_preset # 0)
    call off_saving_preset_dialog
  end if
  if($saving_preset = 0)
    $rr00001 := 0
    call visibility__preset__save__dialog
    $btn_scan_presets := 1
    call on_btn_scan_presets
    if($preset_scan = 0)
      $preset_scan_info := 0
      $frame_count := 0
      $preset_scan := 1
      $preset__usr_display_num := 0
      $preset__usr_count := 0
      $preset__deleted_count := 0
      $preset__count := 0
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%user_preset_tags) - 1)) 
        %user_preset_tags[$i] := 0
        !user_preset_titles[$i] := 0
        %user_deleted_presets[$i] := 0
        %user_preset_numbers[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
        %preset__array[$i] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      fs_navigate(get_ui_id($file_browser), 1)
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($file_browser)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 2))
  wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 2)))
  if($preset__usr_count < 10)
    wait(5000)
  end if
  message("file name: " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0))
  if(($preset_scan = 1) and (%preset__array[0] # -9999))
    if(%preset__array[0] = $HL_VERSION)
      if((%preset__array[1] = 1) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 0))
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Scanning Files: " & ($preset__usr_display_num + 1))
        !user_preset_titles[$preset__usr_count] := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0)
        %user_preset_tags[$preset__usr_count] := (- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31) * %preset__array[2]) + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31)) - 1, 31)) * -1)
        %user_deleted_presets[$preset__usr_count] := %preset__array[1]
        $SIZE01 := %preset__array[3]
        call validate__user__preset__idx
        %preset__array[3] := $i41
        %user_preset_numbers[$preset__usr_count] := %preset__array[3]
        inc($preset__usr_count)
        inc($preset__usr_display_num)
      else
        if(((%preset__array[1] = 0) or (%preset__array[1] = 1)) and (get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1))
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Scanning Files: " & ($preset__usr_display_num + 1))
          $SIZE01 := %preset__array[3]
          call validate__user__preset__idx
          %preset__array[3] := $i41
          %preset__array[1] := 1
          !user_preset_titles[$preset__usr_count] := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0)
          %user_preset_tags[$preset__usr_count] := (- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31) * %preset__array[2]) + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31)) - 1, 31)) * -1)
          %user_deleted_presets[$preset__usr_count] := 1
          $SIZE01 := %preset__array[3]
          call validate__user__preset__idx
          %preset__array[3] := $i41
          %user_preset_numbers[$preset__usr_count] := %preset__array[3]
          inc($preset__usr_count)
          inc($preset__usr_display_num)
          inc($preset__deleted_count)
        end if
      end if
      save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0) & ".nka")
    else
      if(%preset__array[0] < 2)
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%preset__array) - 1)) 
          %preset__arrayOG[$i] := %preset__array[$i]
          %preset__array[$i] := 0
          inc($i)
        end while
        $i := 0
        while($i <= ((num_elements(%preset__array) - 1) - 4)) 
          %preset__array[$i + 4] := %preset__arrayOG[$i]
          inc($i)
        end while
        %preset__array[0] := $HL_VERSION
        %preset__array[1] := 1
        %preset__array[2] := 65536
        $SIZE01 := %preset__array[3]
        call validate__user__preset__idx
        %preset__array[3] := $i41
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Scanning Files: " & "Old User Presets found")
        !user_preset_titles[$preset__usr_count] := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0)
        %user_preset_tags[$preset__usr_count] := (- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31) * %preset__array[2]) + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(- %preset__array[2], 31)) - 1, 31)) * -1)
        %user_deleted_presets[$preset__usr_count] := %preset__array[1]
        $SIZE01 := %preset__array[3]
        call validate__user__preset__idx
        %preset__array[3] := $i41
        %user_preset_numbers[$preset__usr_count] := %preset__array[3]
        inc($preset__usr_count)
        inc($preset__usr_display_num)
        save_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id($file_browser), 0) & ".nka")
      end if
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_scan_presets), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    fs_navigate(get_ui_id($file_browser), 1)
  else
    if((sh_right(%preset_tags[$preset__idx], 16) .and. 1) = 1)
      $load_id := load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
      message(@basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka")
      wait_async(load_array_str(%preset__array, @basepath & !file_name_array[search(%preset_numbers_array, $preset__idx)] & ".nka"))
      if($load_id = -1)
        $load_new := 0
        $preset__idx := %preset__array[3]
      else
        $preset__idx := %preset_numbers_array[$NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS - 1]
        $load_new := 1
      end if
      $preset__idx := $preset__idx
    end if
    save_array(%user_deleted_presets, 1)
    save_array(%user_preset_tags, 1)
    save_array(!user_preset_titles, 1)
    save_array(%user_preset_numbers, 1)
    $preset__count := $preset__count - $NUM_USER_PRESETS
    call update__preset_situation
    $i := $NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS
    while($i <= ($NUM_PRESETS - 1)) 
      %favorite_presets_array[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
    save_array(%favorite_presets_array, 1)
    $saving_preset := 0
    call on_button_tag
    if($load_new = 1)
      $load_new := 0
    end if
    call update__btn_active_status
    $preset_scan := 0
  end if
end on
on ui_control($preset__save)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, -1)
    $preset__save_go := 0
    set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    while(get_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = -1) 
      wait(200)
    end while
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    %preset__save_order_array[get_menu_item_value(%preset__save_order_menu[$i], get_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))] := $i
    inc($i)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__save_go), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  while($preset__save_go = 0) 
    wait(200)
  end while
  %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if($saving_preset # 0)
    $preset__n := 4
  else
    $preset__n := 0
  end if
  %preset__array[$preset__n] := $HL_VERSION
  inc($preset__n)
  message("PRESET N: " & $preset__n)
  %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    %preset__array[$preset__n] := %loaded_instruments[%preset__save_order_array[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]]
    inc($preset__n)
    inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  %c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    select(%preset__save_order_array[%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      case 0
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__transpose), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp1__octave), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp1__rhythm_A[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp1__rhythm_B[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      case 1
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__transpose), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp2__octave), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp2__rhythm_A[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp2__rhythm_B[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      case 2
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_steps), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__rhythm_skip), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__transpose), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp3__octave), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp3__rhythm_A[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
        %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 31) 
          %preset__array[$preset__n] := %arp3__rhythm_B[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
          inc($preset__n)
          inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        end while
      case 3
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__time_signature), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__rate), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_order), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__bar_reset_active), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($arp4__note_repeat), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)

            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 1
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 2
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
            inc($preset__n)
        end select
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1)
        inc($preset__n)
      case 2
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_menu[2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 0
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 1
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 2
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
            inc($preset__n)
        end select
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 2)
        inc($preset__n)
      case 3
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
        inc($preset__n)
        select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
          case 0
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 1
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
          case 2
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
            %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
            inc($preset__n)
        end select
        %preset__array[$preset__n] := get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3)
        inc($preset__n)
    end select
    inc(%c4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  $save_array_id := save_array(%preset__array, 0)
  wait(150000)
  %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, -1)
    set_control_par(%preset__save_order_menu[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    %preset__save_order_array[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
    $preset__save_go := 0
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($preset__save_go), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  $preset__save := 0
end on
on ui_control($preset__load)
  $preset_load_id := load_array(%preset__array, 0)
  wait(250000)
  while($preset_load_id # -1) 
    wait(20)
    if($preset_load_id = 0)
      $preset__load := 0
      $preset_load_id := -1
      exit
    end if
  end while
  call load_preset
  %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 3) 
    if(search(%loaded_instruments, %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]) = -1)
      %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 0)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
        inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
    end if
    if(%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # 0)
      %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
        purge_group(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 1)
        inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
    end if
    %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= (%rr_nums[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] - 1)) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]] + %n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, -1)
      inc(%n21[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    %loaded_instruments_buffer[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %loaded_instruments[%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    inc(%i45[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  call update_key_colors
  call panstep_setting_pan1
  call panstep_setting_pan2
  call reset_modulators
  call panstep_bypass_pan1
  call panstep_bypass_pan2
  call update_pan_slot_graphics
  call update_pan_step_text
  call update_pan_head_labels
  $preset__load := 0
end on
on ui_control($dyn_cc_menu)
  $dyn_cc_num := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($dyn_cc_menu), get_control_par(get_ui_id($dyn_cc_menu), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on

  $motion_cc_num := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id($motion_cc), get_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_cc), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on
on ui_control($content_highlight_bypass)
  call update_content_highlight_label_font
  %content_highlight_setup_elytwo[0] := $content_highlight_bypass
  save_array(%content_highlight_setup_elytwo, 1)
end on

on ui_control($pan1__copy)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 63) 
    %pan_copy_array[$i] := %pan1__panstep[$i]
    inc($i)
  end while
end on

on ui_control($fx_slot_prev)
  dec($fx_slot)
  if($fx_slot < 0)
    $fx_slot := 3
  end if
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($fx_slot_next)
  inc($fx_slot)
  if($fx_slot >= 4)
    $fx_slot := 0
  end if
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($fx_env_view)
  $fx_tab := 0
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($fx_amp_view)
  $fx_tab := 2
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($fx_sat_view)
  $fx_tab := 3
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($fx_filter_view)
  $fx_tab := 4
  call main_subpage_manager
end on
on ui_control($sld_sample_start_rand0)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " %"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Sample Start"
  $ctrl := $sld_sample_start_rand0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0)
  @ctrl_unit := " %"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sample_rand_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := "Sample Start"
  call handle_control_change
  if((search(%sld_sample_start_rand, get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0)) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%sld_sample_start_rand, get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0))] = 0))
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sld_sample_start_rand0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  end if
end on

on ui_control($pre_lowcut0)
  call update_pre_lowcut_labels
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Low Cut"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $pre_lowcut0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($pre_lowcut0)
  @ctrl_unit := "Low Cut"

on ui_control($attack0)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $attack0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($attack0)
  @ctrl_unit := " ms"
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($attack_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
  if((search(%attack, get_ui_id($attack0)) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%attack, get_ui_id($attack0))] = 0))
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  else
    if((search(%decay, get_ui_id($attack0)) # -1) and (%loaded_instruments[search(%decay, get_ui_id($attack0))] = 0))
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack0), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
    end if
  end if
end on
on ui_control($attack1)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " ms"

  @ctrl_unit := " ms"

    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack1), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")
  else

      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($attack1), $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "N/A")

  $ctrl := $sat_knob51
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_knob51)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sat_knob5_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($sat_knob52)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !_sat_type_link_names[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 6]
  $ctrl := $sat_knob52
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_knob52)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sat_knob5_value_label)

end on

on ui_control($sat_gain3)
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !_sat_type_link_names[get_control_par(%sat_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7]
  $ctrl := $sat_gain3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_gain3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""

  @ctrl_label_text := !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($sat_menu0)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%sat_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !sat_preset_names[$sat_menu0] & ".nka")
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(100)
  end while
  if($load_id = -1)
    $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
    else
      set_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_sat_type
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
    inc($preset__n)
    select(get_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob2[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob5[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
      case 1
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob2[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
      case 3
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
      case 4
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_HF_ROLLOFF, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_QUALITY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu0))))
    end select
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_sat_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $sat_bypass0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_bypass0)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sat_bypass0)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($sat_menu1)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%sat_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !sat_preset_names[$sat_menu1] & ".nka")
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(100)
  end while
  if($load_id = -1)
    $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
    else
      set_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_sat_type
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
    inc($preset__n)
    select(get_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
