        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob5[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
      case 1
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob2[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
      case 3
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
      case 4
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_HF_ROLLOFF, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_QUALITY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu1))))
    end select
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_sat_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $sat_bypass1
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_bypass1)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sat_bypass1)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($sat_menu2)
  $load_id := load_array_str(%sat_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !sat_preset_names[$sat_menu2] & ".nka")
  while($load_id > 0) 
    wait(100)
  end while
  if($load_id = -1)
    $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $SAT_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
    else
      set_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_sat_type
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
    inc($preset__n)
    select(get_control_par(%sat_menu[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob2[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob5[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
      case 1
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob2[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
      case 3
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))
      case 4
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_HF_ROLLOFF, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_QUALITY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu2))))

    call update_sat_labels
  end if

  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""

        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob3[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob4[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BITS, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
      case 3
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
      case 4
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_gain[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))) / 2) + 500000)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob0[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_WARMTH, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_HF_ROLLOFF, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_TP_QUALITY, %sat_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%sat_knob1[search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%sat_menu, get_ui_id($sat_menu3))))
    end select
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_sat_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $sat_bypass3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($sat_bypass3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($sat_bypass3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on

  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($filter_type_label_left0), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_filter_picture_list[6 + $filter_type_menu0])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($filter_type_label_right0), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_filter_picture_list[12 + $filter_type_menu0])

    end if
  end if

  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($filter_cut2)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($filter_cut_value_label)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $filter_reso2
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($filter_reso2)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($filter_reso_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($filter_type_button_left3)
  $i := $filter_type_menu3 + -1
  if($i < 0)
    $i := num_elements(!filter_type_list) - 1
  else
    if($i >= num_elements(!filter_type_list))
      $i := 0
    end if
  end if
  $filter_type_menu3 := $i
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($filter_type_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_filter_picture_list[$filter_type_menu3])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($filter_type_name_label3), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !filter_type_list[$filter_type_menu3])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($filter_type_label_left3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_filter_picture_list[6 + $filter_type_menu3])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($filter_type_label_right3), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_filter_picture_list[12 + $filter_type_menu3])
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($filter_type_menu3)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($filter_type_menu3)
  call handle_control_change
  $filter_type_button_left3 := 0
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Hz"
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($filter_cut3)
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($filter_cut_value_label)
  call handle_control_change
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $filter_reso3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($filter_reso3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($filter_reso_value_label)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on

on ui_control($amp_bypass3)
  call update_fx_active_labels
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $amp_bypass3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($amp_bypass3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($amp_bypass3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($amp_menu0)
  wait_async(load_array_str(%amp_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !amp_preset_names[$amp_menu0] & ".nka"))
  if($load_id = -1)
    $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Menu")
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Dev Tools or global preset")
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_amp_type
    select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
      case 1
        set_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
        inc($preset__n)
    end select
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0)))
    inc($preset__n)
    if(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_knob6[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu0))))
    end if
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_amp_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $amp_bypass0
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($amp_bypass0)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($amp_bypass0)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($amp_menu1)
  wait_async(load_array_str(%amp_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !amp_preset_names[$amp_menu1] & ".nka"))
  if($load_id = -1)
    $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Menu")
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Dev Tools or global preset")
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_amp_type
    select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
      case 1
        set_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
        inc($preset__n)
    end select
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1)))
    inc($preset__n)
    if(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_knob6[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu1))))
    end if
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_amp_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $amp_bypass1
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($amp_bypass1)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($amp_bypass1)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on
on ui_control($amp_menu2)
  wait_async(load_array_str(%amp_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !amp_preset_names[$amp_menu2] & ".nka"))
  if($load_id = -1)
    $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $preset__n := 0
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID)
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Menu")
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Dev Tools or global preset")
    end if
    $visible_deny := 1
    call update_amp_type
    select(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
      case 0
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_NORMALVOLUME, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLOSPEED, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREMOLODEPTH, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
      case 1
        set_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))
        inc($preset__n)
    end select
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2)))

    if(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))

      set_control_par(%amp_knob6[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu2))))

  wait_async(load_array_str(%amp_preset_array, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../Samples/<<<Horizon Leads.nkr>>>/Resources/data/" & !amp_preset_names[$amp_menu3] & ".nka"))
  if($load_id = -1)
    $AMP_MENU_CALLBACK_ID := $NI_CALLBACK_ID

      inc($preset__n)
      message("Loaded from Menu")

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)

        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_TONECUT, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_BRILLIANTVOLUME, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_AC_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
      case 1
        set_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n])
        inc($preset__n)
        wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_SIZE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_AIR, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CB_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
      case 2
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob0[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_BASS, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob1[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MID, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob2[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_TREBLE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob3[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRESENCE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PRENORMAL, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_control_par(%amp_knob5[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_PREOVERDRIVE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_OVERDRIVE, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MONO, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_MASTER, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_HS_DEPTH, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
        inc($preset__n)
    end select
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %amp_preset_array[$preset__n], -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3)))
    inc($preset__n)
    if(get_control_par(%amp_menu[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      set_control_par(%amp_knob4[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
    else
      set_control_par(%amp_knob6[search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + search(%amp_menu, get_ui_id($amp_menu3))))
    end if
    $visible_deny := 0
    call update_amp_labels
  end if
  call update_visibility
  !unit1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  !label_text1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  $ctrl := $amp_bypass3
  $ctrl_id := get_ui_id($amp_bypass3)
  @ctrl_unit := ""
  $ctrl_label := get_ui_id($amp_bypass3)
  @ctrl_label_text := ""
  call handle_control_change
end on

on ui_control($amp_cab_type_menu0)
  message(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $fx_slot))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_menu0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - $amp_cab_type_menu0, -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $fx_slot))
end on

on ui_control($amp_cab_type_button_left0)
  $i := get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) + -1
  if($i < 0)
    $i := num_elements(!amp_cab_types_str) - 1
  else
    if($i >= num_elements(!amp_cab_types_str))
      $i := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $i)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($amp_cab_type_label), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_CABINET_TYPE, 10 - get_control_par(%amp_cab_type_menu[$fx_slot], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 3, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $fx_slot))
  $amp_cab_type_button_left0 := 0
end on

  $amp_cab_type_button_right3 := 0
end on
on ui_control($attack_motion0)
  if($attack_motion0 = 1)
    $i330 := %attack[0]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%attack[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %attack[0]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($attack_motion0 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %attack[0]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %attack[0]) = -1))
      if($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%attack[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + -1) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%attack[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + -1) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %attack[0]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %attack[0]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %attack[0]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %attack[0])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %attack[0])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%attack[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($decay_motion0)
  if($decay_motion0 = 1)
    $i330 := %decay[0]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_DECAY
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%decay[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %decay[0]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_DECAY
    $n144 := -1
    $v14 := -1
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($decay_motion0 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %decay[0]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %decay[0]) = -1))
      if($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%decay[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + -1) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%decay[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + -1) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %decay[0]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %decay[0]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %decay[0]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %decay[0])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %decay[0])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%decay[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($sat_gain_motion0)
  if($sat_gain_motion0 = 1)
    $i330 := %sat_gain[0]
    $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1]
    $n144 := 1
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %sat_gain[0]
    $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1]
    $n144 := 1
    $v14 := 0
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($sat_gain_motion0 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %sat_gain[0]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %sat_gain[0]) = -1))
      if(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1] = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %sat_gain[0]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %sat_gain[0]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %sat_gain[0]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %sat_gain[0])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %sat_gain[0])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[0], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on

        set_control_par_str(%decay[1], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + -1) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %decay[1]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %decay[1]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %decay[1]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %decay[1])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %decay[1])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%decay[1], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($sat_gain_motion1)
  if($sat_gain_motion1 = 1)
    $i330 := %sat_gain[1]
    $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1]
    $n144 := 1
    $v14 := 1
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[1], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %sat_gain[1]
    $hold24 := %_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1]
    $n144 := 1
    $v14 := 1
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($sat_gain_motion1 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %sat_gain[1]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %sat_gain[1]) = -1))
      if(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1] = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[1], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[1], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], -1, 1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 1) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %sat_gain[1]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %sat_gain[1]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %sat_gain[1]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %sat_gain[1])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %sat_gain[1])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%sat_gain[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp(%_sat_type_links[(get_control_par(%sat_menu[3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * 7) + 1], %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($filter_cut_motion3)
  if($filter_cut_motion3 = 1)
    $i330 := %filter_cut[3]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF
    $n144 := 2
    $v14 := 3
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%filter_cut[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %filter_cut[3]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF
    $n144 := 2
    $v14 := 3
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($filter_cut_motion3 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %filter_cut[3]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %filter_cut[3]) = -1))
      if($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%filter_cut[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, -1, 2, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%filter_cut[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, -1, 2, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %filter_cut[3]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %filter_cut[3]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %filter_cut[3]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %filter_cut[3])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %filter_cut[3])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%filter_cut[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($mixer__senddel_motion3)
  if($mixer__senddel_motion3 = 1)
    $i330 := %mixer__senddel[3]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1
    $n144 := 7
    $v14 := 3
    $idx24 := 1
    call relink_control_to_ep
    set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, "Motion")
  else
    $i330 := %mixer__senddel[3]
    $hold24 := $ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1
    $n144 := 7
    $v14 := 3
    $idx24 := 0
    call relink_control_to_ep
  end if
  call update_fx_motion_values
  if($mixer__senddel_motion3 = 0)
    if((search(%attack, %mixer__senddel[3]) = -1) and (search(%decay, %mixer__senddel[3]) = -1))
      if($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1 = $ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF)
        set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3) & " Hz")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + 3) & " dB")
      end if
    else
      if((search(%attack, %mixer__senddel[3]) # -1) or (search(%decay, %mixer__senddel[3]) # -1))
        if(search(%attack, %mixer__senddel[3]) # -1)
          $n := search(%attack, %mixer__senddel[3])
        else
          $n := search(%decay, %mixer__senddel[3])
        end if
        $s := find_mod(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], "ENV_AHDSR")
        $i := find_target(%first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
        set_control_par_str(%mixer__senddel[3], $CONTROL_PAR_LABEL, get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, %first_groupID[%loaded_instruments[$n]], $s, $i) & " ms")
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_visibility
end on
on ui_control($attack_min0)
  if($attack_min0 >= $attack_max0)
    $attack_min0 := $attack_max0 - 1
  end if
  $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($attack_min0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 120000.) / 880000.) * 100.)
  set_text($motion_min_value0, $motion_value_hold & "%")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label0), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
  call update_fx_motion_values
end on
on ui_control($decay_min0)
  if($decay_min0 >= $decay_max0)
    $decay_min0 := $decay_max0 - 1
  end if
  $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($decay_min0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 180000.) / 820000.) * 100.)
  set_text($motion_min_value1, $motion_value_hold & "%")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_min_label1), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
  call update_fx_motion_values
end on

end on
on ui_control($mixer__senddel_max2)
  if($mixer__senddel_max2 <= $mixer__senddel_min2)
    $mixer__senddel_max2 := $mixer__senddel_min2 + 1
  end if
  $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($mixer__senddel_max2), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 0.) / 630000.) * 100.)
  set_text($motion_max_value2, $motion_value_hold & "%")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label2), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
  call update_fx_motion_values
end on
on ui_control($attack_max3)
  if($attack_max3 <= $attack_min3)
    $attack_max3 := $attack_min3 + 1
  end if
  $motion_value_hold := real_to_int(((int_to_real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($attack_max3), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 120000.) / 880000.) * 100.)
  set_text($motion_max_value0, $motion_value_hold & "%")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($motion_max_label0), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $motion_value_hold)
  call update_fx_motion_values
end on
